Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhf2hbup9qmmhinr8g8b48khnrvdor3e46uek9a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1chgecp72cjh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8udapqce8beuoh36mjg9dl0orrbubincfn0d39o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1chgecp72cjh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zae5nd7ulb5viaji09h1m37o17c56d28stm4rcso_rp22sh2s8i6epj1chgecp72cjh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd6rt0solibh554jp15jmfvvmmvclpjr113a7m1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1chgecp72cjh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" **Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." **Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5gllqtbcrc4gi0ih7ad1s1582nfolaqsrcpc9d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1chgecp72cjh2bs)

body:

| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19372/6374453/73d5337c399811a97e652039b2f5c1ab637eed16/91a25342e669e5f48741c08c86c3235f8924fc1b)

_December 14th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see:

In fact, you’ll never see the world the same way again...

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them...

**[Claim Your 7-Level Infrared Night Vision Binoculars - 50% OFF!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19372/6374453/73d5337c399811a97e652039b2f5c1ab637eed16/91a25342e669e5f48741c08c86c3235f8924fc1b) **

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The Babylon Bee was DOXXED by the SPLC
body:
We won’t be intimidated, but we need your help to stay on the frontlines of the culture war.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eed867340b634df1823dfaf1117b5fd3&_e=0AW4H0irtaRvWrWlyukoDf1uIs7T2npj8B6vQZg21CJSbFZzDw51JNAS1YPY99Svt1LuSwK5XQf4Is3RWEtYAqo7wSKvnH7cw44Bx5aNvC5Yjz8qZtos0gtZnsxOZ-FfG27i2r4ZzKWLPpmkg7VyShJktBa1TWtx9hUQN5IKeSOd0DiwYnFeiz4g9Qd-WxmvlQ6M1CKhvcSyIkMw0Hx7AdyjlAg7rzfUgU6rVUSBhKD7PAjy-SZHJlaiEWYIQx5BPbzfx9UF-VjiwAzuhQDYGA%3D%3D)
---
| | Last week, the Southern Poverty Law Center published the identities of anonymous staff writers for our sibling site, Not the Bee, which covers news so absurd that it seems like satire. We at The Babylon Bee and Not the Bee remain committed to mocking woke insanity, but**this is serious. **
The SPLC is a “scandal-ridden, discredited smear factory,” as our CEO Seth Dillon puts it, but **_government agencies, corporations, and violent leftists still take it seriously_****.****
**
---
* Last year,**the FBI used SPLC data** to connect traditional Catholics with extremism.
* In 2020, **Amazon relied on the SPLC’s “hate group” designations** to disqualify conservative nonprofits from access to customer donations.
* In 2012, **the SPLC’s listing the Family Research Council as a “hate group” inspired a mass shooting plot at their headquarters**.

---
**We’ve been deplatformed, demonetized, and now doxxed by the SPLC.** We won’t be intimidated, but **[we need your help](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eed867340b634df1823dfaf1117b5fd3&_e=0AW4H0irtaRvWrWlyukoDf1uIs7T2npj8B6vQZg21CJSbFZzDw51JNAS1YPY99Svt1LuSwK5XQf4Is3RWEtYAqo7wSKvnH7cw44Bx5aNvC5Yjz8qZtos0gtZnsxOZ-FfdxcrGu4LJ_J3t-STqP2gVgM67X_87A6DL1Y_TJFUY3rKxjxSNavsbWH146Gxfrta4JP2bKQ0DCC4jMl5SuXdehSOKM_keSDdloumzuLPvFqpYOyMl3NIkZcoeUrKy2LMxyM7GcgVoT3-IXNe0wMNEQ%3D%3D) to stay on the frontlines of the culture war. **The only reason we’ve been able to survive these kinds of attacks is because we’re mostly reader-funded. And that’s where you come in. **What can you do?** **[**Join the fight and become a premium subscriber today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eed867340b634df1823dfaf1117b5fd3&_e=0AW4H0irtaRvWrWlyukoDf1uIs7T2npj8B6vQZg21CJSbFZzDw51JNAS1YPY99Svt1LuSwK5XQf4Is3RWEtYAqo7wSKvnH7cw44Bx5aNvC5Yjz8qZtos0gtZnsxOZ-Ff4hA9MTS58kytDB6FnOECpzSKcTUzpdSfmYDAWgZU1HgesokFQZ6gTup9aAwBphOygBuQpJlCuCgXGywH7pBypAuILDvnXXU8VdbWkOP9VOS544psBD1f3ebCLMs8x-IXTCBUfDa2swIEdoISYog-RA%3D%3D)**
---
| | Your subscription enables us to continue producing comedy that points to truth – and you’ll receive perks!
---
* **Connect** with a fast-growing community of other Bee fans
* **Access** exclusive content, including our **new movie**
* **Enjoy** an ad-free experience and member **discounts** on merch
* **Receive** a free copy of our new book **The Babylon Bee Guide to the Apocalypse**

---
Thank you for your support; we can’t do it without you.
---
[ **Join the Fight today**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eed867340b634df1823dfaf1117b5fd3&_e=0AW4H0irtaRvWrWlyukoDf1uIs7T2npj8B6vQZg21CJSbFZzDw51JNAS1YPY99Svt1LuSwK5XQf4Is3RWEtYAqo7wSKvnH7cw44Bx5aNvC5Yjz8qZtos0gtZnsxOZ-FfocccDAfmKhN7Sw3alCj5LjjQxGWmFS8N4DfmCaV-ZT7eyUKrARag5zDErjwsOv5RjeYRlOxVeSoaJuUb-ueQWb4eUhbcllrsrD9RsDLQxUPvZ02EHrxI0la5e0CgOdYCBmdIVuxsRb6gF9Iw0wi50g%3D%3D)

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: The Alarming Reality of Malibu's Wildfires
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqkcq-nzg1q0-kyd76rh0/)
---
# **The Alarming Reality of Malibu's Wildfires**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqkcq-nzg1q1-kyd76rh1/)
---
| | | | folks, The devastating fires in Malibu are more than a local disaster—they are a stark reminder of the escalating wildfire crisis fueled by climate change. Over 4,000 acres scorched, homes reduced to ashes, 20,000 residents evacuated, and countless lives disrupted. This is not an anomaly; it’s part of a dangerous pattern. Wildfires across the West are becoming larger, deadlier, and more frequent. **The Cause is Clear** Climate change is the driving force behind this crisis. Rising temperatures and prolonged droughts have created the perfect storm for wildfires to ignite and spread uncontrollably. Research confirms that human-driven climate change has doubled wildfire activity since the 1980s. Without decisive action, a mere 1°C temperature rise could expand burned areas by an astonishing 600% in some forests. **What’s at Stake** These fires are not just destroying homes; they’re devastating communities, erasing ecosystems, and costing billions in recovery efforts. Families are displaced, first responders are pushed to their limits, and the damages can last for decades. But this path isn’t inevitable. We can still turn the tide. **A Call to Action** This is a pivotal moment. Climate change is not a future threat; it’s a present emergency. Together, we can demand bold action, champion sustainable solutions, and protect our communities from further devastation. [**_Now is the time to demand action. We must hold leaders accountable, advocate for bold climate policies, and support efforts to combat this escalating crisis. Together, we can fight for a safer, more sustainable future. Will you join us in taking a stand for our planet?_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vqkcq-nzg1q2-kyd76rh2/)
---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Get Your Free Copy of "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" Today!
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWnn72FWUN
Don't miss this opportunity to expand your intellectual
horizons...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWnn72FWUN

Dear Friend,

I'm excited to offer you a free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" by the eminent economist, Thomas
Sowell.

In this captivating ebook, Sowell dissects the arguments of
those opposed to tax cuts. He challenges common misconceptions
about so-called "trickle-down" economics and provides insights
into how tax cuts have positive impact across the entire income
distribution.

I think you'll appreciate how Sowell makes discussions of taxes
and economics fascinating to readers from all backgrounds. You'll
gain valuable knowledge that will deepen your understanding of
economic principles so you can impact discussions on current
policy debates.

Claim your free copy now by clicking here.

Don't miss this opportunity to expand your intellectual
horizons and join the conversation on tax reform and economic
prosperity.

Thank you for your interest, and happy reading!

Best regards,

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With its eminent scholars and world-renowned
Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan,
data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve
the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic
prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over
more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to
policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and
opportunity in the United States and around the world.

body:
Joe Biden's DOJ has completed most of their cruel case against Stephanie. They put two witnesses on the stand who had no personal knowledge of the facts.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=132cc614080b4cd4a6afcc601189de9e&_e=xDuk8NaeCkYgu8PohTnAQi5yTnzmgi7k9Cviv_ABIlqZxVTTJGTFucH05rnbbHbPl_LjZ5rhcy9-5Ru_kHSzn_-P49r-Evhx4cOJ5GO0rV3AkxH_uBCrBzbfZ9rakcpyGPBLPydJFYm-HhznzWXeN8Fsc60dy0gGPpLdwhLCRtoNnVSjdE1VtGalBmhZXWxFWwoZdu2Ec50vD6GkD8ni5yaVwVq-mPCWB0TVSN-H6PxJy6cEMuRgzOCfegGT6VYzn2n3L1LrYtPVg-23u2yD19MpJya2-6HXeHzoV4hNFhVIxGXG4WD5MZisax6A-W_5bJXiX2MSS6zPJcmUYZ9hQtpeaNE6tlRXTKZawvMifUdzpG4Yur73YE9EuifX0JpfpA1GT7JkPCH2rm5qix_irmEx5O5C1TEmYWGI3YZuhsE%3D)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=132cc614080b4cd4a6afcc601189de9e&_e=xDuk8NaeCkYgu8PohTnAQi5yTnzmgi7k9Cviv_ABIlqZxVTTJGTFucH05rnbbHbPl_LjZ5rhcy9-5Ru_kHSzn_-P49r-Evhx4cOJ5GO0rV3AkxH_uBCrBzbfZ9rakcpyGPBLPydJFYm-HhznzWXeN8Fsc60dy0gGPpLdwhLCRtoNnVSjdE1VtGalBmhZXWxFWwoZdu2Ec50vD6GkD8ni5yaVwVq-mPCWB0TVSN-H6PxJy6cEMuRgzOCfegGT6VYznk1CysABHTGTRgGxxOiVagt9BXBhf1DeISYP5vOWScAxdNWC4sbFYQCfxx8g_DoaJQ1faATGyuDdFjZV39VW4DGga0So8AhzAVVY_uAThv6s78lAg_y5lI-mdm_8yDcZb9_uaTk6qsnbxrWHEzzXy-k2OYqZO-2iXLP2Qnq6CI8%3D) Dear Patriot,

**[Your crucial gift of a critically important $25, $50, $100 or more immediately will help us fight for Stephanie and keep beating Joe Biden's DOJ in court!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=132cc614080b4cd4a6afcc601189de9e&_e=xDuk8NaeCkYgu8PohTnAQi5yTnzmgi7k9Cviv_ABIlqZxVTTJGTFucH05rnbbHbPl_LjZ5rhcy9-5Ru_kHSzn_-P49r-Evhx4cOJ5GO0rV3AkxH_uBCrBzbfZ9rakcpyGPBLPydJFYm-HhznzWXeN8Fsc60dy0gGPpLdwhLCRtoNnVSjdE1VtGalBmhZXWxFWwoZdu2Ec50vD6GkD8ni5yaVwVq-mPCWB0TVSN-H6PxJy6cEMuRgzOCfegGT6VYzzyjlWBJx60jjzwd829f55eWbzFE1fBbDCU9XSn9JhB9jAuEcFhcYXEvn_D-rdgJFNNuKg5xih8FXhGMpk_qUIO5i1o6RE_8ipFH0inYh_5ts7VUj6XdMWXiKvjoQi_76XKHnHYs4XkUvaABR1edWZrRfd36vDp0Myv_7l8vy1UI%3D)**

As you know, Stephanie Baez's trial started on December 3rd.

Because you're a loyal supporter of NCLU, I knew it was urgent to get you an update just as soon as I could.

**Joe Biden 's DOJ has completed most of their cruel case against Stephanie.**

They put two witnesses on the stand who had no personal knowledge of the facts. They basically just showed some cherry-picked text messages from Stephanie.

The judge recessed the trial, so we can file a motion to acquit.

He will then rule on that motion.

[ DONATE NOW ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=132cc614080b4cd4a6afcc601189de9e&_e=xDuk8NaeCkYgu8PohTnAQi5yTnzmgi7k9Cviv_ABIlqZxVTTJGTFucH05rnbbHbPl_LjZ5rhcy9-5Ru_kHSzn_-P49r-Evhx4cOJ5GO0rV3AkxH_uBCrBzbfZ9rakcpyGPBLPydJFYm-HhznzWXeN8Fsc60dy0gGPpLdwhLCRtoNnVSjdE1VtGalBmhZXWxFWwoZdu2Ec50vD6GkD8ni5yaVwVq-mPCWB0TVSN-H6PxJy6cEMuRgzOCfegGT6VYzsHMORijygETMW_hcKRSWr8ghDS4PFHMc0mX6R5-6uhbwaNvNLly-o8dHWC0uM_gj1dO74RxR5dOyZIzkQVsp1nrTfG7s-kblyYsmKt7jqvXl6H1eamc7KR4PpCHfp2CGXhHN2h-2LaoSFQRjb6TS6ozT1N_eVhlXW5HJeqXsRJc%3D)
**Let me tell you, this is a really important development. I 've never seen a judge recess a trial like this before.**

You see, judges don't do that, and allow briefing and decision before resuming a trial.

Usually it's a five minute oral motion, and the judge denies it on the spot. Then the defense starts immediately with its case.

**But this is a good sign the judge may acquit Stephanie.** (This is one of the fairer judges in DC by far.)

[ DONATE NOW ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=132cc614080b4cd4a6afcc601189de9e&_e=xDuk8NaeCkYgu8PohTnAQi5yTnzmgi7k9Cviv_ABIlqZxVTTJGTFucH05rnbbHbPl_LjZ5rhcy9-5Ru_kHSzn_-P49r-Evhx4cOJ5GO0rV3AkxH_uBCrBzbfZ9rakcpyGPBLPydJFYm-HhznzWXeN8Fsc60dy0gGPpLdwhLCRtoNnVSjdE1VtGalBmhZXWxFWwoZdu2Ec50vD6GkD8ni5yaVwVq-mPCWB0TVSN-H6PxJy6cEMuRgzOCfegGT6VYzhtTWot_4Tn-FQW0a--yA-1dqc2NX202NEK1BjgYJyUsf2NpZ-fLPieMfGqdzrOCHE7fe0hudoduWMcNnD9AWjjwTuXs8_J3XB2KWHflXecca-xj2jsdG2BI2e8fc91J3a5mOExjnWVUtT9SkTbzpbQp_UbXCcL_RMua1akeNRbQ%3D)
Here's what happens next:

Our motion is due on December 20th.

Joe Biden's DOJ's response is due on January 3rd.

Our reply to that motion is due on January 10th.

**So, we have a TON of work to do, very little time to do it, and it will be very expensive.**

You and I know the DOJ is determined to terrorize Stephanie and throw her in prison for 20 years ... even though they KNOW she's innocent.

**They 're just not satisfied that they helped her lose two of her babies ... or that they helped wreck her health, leading to 10 surgeries in two years. Joe Biden's DOJ wants to destroy Stephanie for good.**

And the clocking is ticking now.

**[Patriot, please help us fight for Stephanie and all our January 6 clients with your critically important gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=132cc614080b4cd4a6afcc601189de9e&_e=xDuk8NaeCkYgu8PohTnAQi5yTnzmgi7k9Cviv_ABIlqZxVTTJGTFucH05rnbbHbPl_LjZ5rhcy9-5Ru_kHSzn_-P49r-Evhx4cOJ5GO0rV3AkxH_uBCrBzbfZ9rakcpyGPBLPydJFYm-HhznzWXeN8Fsc60dy0gGPpLdwhLCRtoNnVSjdE1VtGalBmhZXWxFWwoZdu2Ec50vD6GkD8ni5yaVwVq-mPCWB0TVSN-H6PxJy6cEMuRgzOCfegGT6VYzVJV85hEtGCDiktchzVwa4h8lKt9vSaoFqxiD697hkpGpQ6QPq7RA7JWNfuNj5uGmVVrFeZt17vFAqpgSgytECA-xZd5C_0t3PqItRO_wJByTxXXSQSnPYp8cRTUPPjfKPO1j7pk-3AExA5td2UTnvi9I-QM2T2R-FLkbXZzMgHE%3D)**

In Vigilance,
John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder

Dear Patriot, As you know, Stephanie Baez's trial started on December 3rd. Because you're a loyal supporter of NCLU, I knew it was urgent to get you an update just as soon as I could. Joe Biden 's DOJ has completed most of their cruel case against Stephanie. They put two witnesses on the stand who had no personal knowledge of the facts. They basically just showed some cherry-picked text messages from Stephanie. The judge recessed the trial, so we can file a motion to acquit. He will then rule on that motion. Let me tell you, this is a really important development. I 've never seen a judge recess a trial like this before. You see, judges don't do that, and allow briefing and decision before resuming a trial. Usually it's a five minute oral motion, and the judge denies it on the spot. Then the defense starts immediately with its case. But this is a good sign the judge may acquit Stephanie. (This is one of the fairer judges in DC by far.) Here's what happens next: Our motion is due on December 20th. Joe Biden's DOJ's response is due on January 3rd. Our reply to that motion is due on January 10th. So, we have a TON of work to do, very little time to do it, and it will be very expensive. You and I know the DOJ is determined to terrorize Stephanie and throw her in prison for 20 years ... even though they KNOW she's innocent. They 're just not satisfied that they helped her lose two of her babies ... or that they helped wreck her health, leading to 10 surgeries in two years. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The Connection Between Faith and Freedom
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af7fba9bb9724061a0bd128b2062be4c&_e=iUm--g1lqGi8TQefBKKByRelUlxibMFeZBV3jTynsv0UqdZs49lbHXG63shUXxEoqrjcD-dpxqFbhqz7OB-kKoC-M9lCIKz0XMmX6G6vLqg4GFC44LyxzHZ4fpbvA2JEZzXhIbU8N8uI5mEQ8hwAzEHn9TE6Ll0c5tPL6adc1LFpm8D11aZ173-KVVIn7a5HXxslqJ8CFEbViTFpxdVmfqPZ816fWWe439tb_f07liO3fclobTDwLyOcQf1BJyovEAWyyRR221UtaRhcNWy04zm5JuS-KjITqLYJkp_nOVHvRv7QV_sCuU-dO_VktmscLcPA-DXqEUaJ2UNLgRrrpmQFrK4x39PQijX5En3TYC8RzlUoynfpc4TcLqiGgm1slIrlYYlTPsYjXUUyGnP1SCaSZrg1xNN1ziTTdlylKYY%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af7fba9bb9724061a0bd128b2062be4c&_e=iUm--g1lqGi8TQefBKKByRelUlxibMFeZBV3jTynsv0UqdZs49lbHXG63shUXxEoqrjcD-dpxqFbhqz7OB-kKoC-M9lCIKz0XMmX6G6vLqg4GFC44LyxzHZ4fpbvA2JEZzXhIbU8N8uI5mEQ8hwAzEHn9TE6Ll0c5tPL6adc1LFpm8D11aZ173-KVVIn7a5HXxslqJ8CFEbViTFpxdVmfqPZ816fWWe439tb_f07liO3fclobTDwLyOcQf1BJyov4E5hVRs2jRvZm3pU5QSDp_JLIaFFBzfUE-_eqiTJYpMSG64RMXEvKRcck8meSeEV5f6A8lJcwgpotQdsWgkGdF-luPXl5iQu-EtpHctrROp-9KMtdt0Forb8tH5kAAxmGjOwayD9zFSqYNzUyS7WelteiVMnWiD-cyEXTs9GHuw%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af7fba9bb9724061a0bd128b2062be4c&_e=iUm--g1lqGi8TQefBKKByRelUlxibMFeZBV3jTynsv0UqdZs49lbHXG63shUXxEoqrjcD-dpxqFbhqz7OB-kKoC-M9lCIKz0XMmX6G6vLqg4GFC44LyxzHZ4fpbvA2JEZzXhIbU8N8uI5mEQ8hwAzEHn9TE6Ll0c5tPL6adc1LFpm8D11aZ173-KVVIn7a5HXxslqJ8CFEbViTFpxdVmfqPZ816fWWe439tb_f07liO3fclobTDwLyOcQf1BJyovSy_bj8c4wHU615CPR-WbRv8sCYz7K3gSltrw56jsLnsB7WTgB-4bByYHciGT4itXiGTTro8x-ehQmkv2A12qVSpTHs1L55F_Neo3Mfx6qnF6VLJoVWK9DFinithEb2UGbVvheb3c_6dWFVOuaW4HudNpTLVI0ju98b7WyYNIQOA%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af7fba9bb9724061a0bd128b2062be4c&_e=iUm--g1lqGi8TQefBKKByRelUlxibMFeZBV3jTynsv0UqdZs49lbHXG63shUXxEoqrjcD-dpxqFbhqz7OB-kKoC-M9lCIKz0XMmX6G6vLqg4GFC44LyxzHZ4fpbvA2JEZzXhIbU8N8uI5mEQ8hwAzEHn9TE6Ll0c5tPL6adc1LFpm8D11aZ173-KVVIn7a5HXxslqJ8CFEbViTFpxdVmfqPZ816fWWe439tb_f07liO3fclobTDwLyOcQf1BJyovF8W_gZFcXf1RJG-qUq6wr8vrH6ZqQSyXoWi2PV4J9p3zqjAOkYH7KddclUQ39jv_iFzp3-tMDx0t9R5t-vjYuNV3SNJ4Efhef9QufhE30xxJswdp0HuVkruLlDW2YV5WfsPqQugzqXWYZ3Gl_1ZnD19UdZAl0v8dqLDp1Jh5U1E%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservative Liberty Wire

_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=af7fba9bb9724061a0bd128b2062be4c&_t=2nVPlaG05rUEIfkXvT3q4QLv0JpAE2JxjjjPCkb_g37-8n4UDo-93eaGQQWxqNY436CkYTT_Z6UKMQUgUulXHAHV5gt_sWGwvN6w5b1zcbFsLztBwunAh7uwHir6Xf_05LAgWcppuu4hZ-dGcQ02ZHUnAgoF21CumFTjtfTBWKU%3D)

body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20f6c72e649a472cb8c9064bea19b6c4&_e=CsQ2Tx9tov3NzP876uAMUuIetNZkx1Gpi2LEEn2m7YN8HWL76VTjFRyO5hyszgPYOr0X_qUyEyB6pLPTRk5oKV32zTFHoF4CU_ORfTeZUWfr-6xpC5pY6V8iiaIn37Wm1T3yCIRpGTQIb1X8ZCJrg_QXUiW2TLWj6WSnUIkeD-BTsd_5Mvnn54TUhl_WKNi34rdmNmiM9MXdLrvnhJXGwEVLCC9oUArvWxwQjf9U9UBnPXtyZrxWXHzH5rgxbWK4aDxLqEjaUMKVfRS_uUMAOUWk1OWnu3c5XmoIqtyqzSsS4IQ2rMb2wI_sPIi98s-ixbyDQXE5_E4_o-65vf4wOHOk6C3uffduU-VsglCaQkoA0_-ep_Wwbs440zlUqQLbtK2JR58_Ay2qiY-No3A5PHecA8e8c7P0G0bQyteSiaE1F-U9P-YxNOZj-CQ8EqVX3UcqOQkCmcN5oO7IDLAogdWY-Vaoy9Vg0SKzvr37bpU%3D)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20f6c72e649a472cb8c9064bea19b6c4&_e=CsQ2Tx9tov3NzP876uAMUuIetNZkx1Gpi2LEEn2m7YN8HWL76VTjFRyO5hyszgPYOr0X_qUyEyB6pLPTRk5oKV32zTFHoF4CU_ORfTeZUWfr-6xpC5pY6V8iiaIn37Wm1T3yCIRpGTQIb1X8ZCJrg_QXUiW2TLWj6WSnUIkeD-BTsd_5Mvnn54TUhl_WKNi34rdmNmiM9MXdLrvnhJXGwEVLCC9oUArvWxwQjf9U9UBnPXtyZrxWXHzH5rgxbWK4aDxLqEjaUMKVfRS_uUMAOUWk1OWnu3c5XmoIqtyqzSsS4IQ2rMb2wI_sPIi98s-ixbyDQXE5_E4_o-65vf4wOFwtCkODlWsgxpMAMYI8YuMEovIdoHqnZGbrhpQ6EerUCc98NwSjOWaJDaX6ZoL90kKxfvzELtJxC7EcqeW-mYvuMdgUd-i1eL1VBgOkMQA5HUJekSkSCVNYbHShHLoXJW_jIfzBJwSeRoq7EsrjBUo%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20f6c72e649a472cb8c9064bea19b6c4&_e=CsQ2Tx9tov3NzP876uAMUuIetNZkx1Gpi2LEEn2m7YN8HWL76VTjFRyO5hyszgPYOr0X_qUyEyB6pLPTRk5oKV32zTFHoF4CU_ORfTeZUWfr-6xpC5pY6V8iiaIn37Wm1T3yCIRpGTQIb1X8ZCJrg_QXUiW2TLWj6WSnUIkeD-BTsd_5Mvnn54TUhl_WKNi34rdmNmiM9MXdLrvnhJXGwEVLCC9oUArvWxwQjf9U9UBnPXtyZrxWXHzH5rgxbWK4aDxLqEjaUMKVfRS_uUMAOUWk1OWnu3c5XmoIqtyqzSsS4IQ2rMb2wI_sPIi98s-ixbyDQXE5_E4_o-65vf4wODxawqj2CY9dLevumSVTH-MwhoWnu7pKgzBomDdlAnCfV6djyBAEdj677OooSNNqZHc9DlL4JGd8C96BRa5onVpC-p7F_EaoXHuTi4rvOjiozYdxGBXw-fIyL-UqjrjoSPFr-JjkIEsnHirpQHJ_V3s%3D)

What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

clean_body: This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's called Horizon by hear.com. And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It's no wonder Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023 , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes Horizon so special? It's one of the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing. With Horizon, they can. Imagine effortless hearing in every situation --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to understand every word clearly with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it. This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. "It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize." In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design! ## SpaceX Proposes Starbase Become a City
Elon Musk and workers living at the site of SpaceX's operations in South Texas, known as Starbase, [want a special election](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vwyAQBfBPY29E3BkKHhi6ZEvXjtaZOxJUHFuG5s-3r5K949OTfnp636fpRLnk6_mLFgntkdYJNRoFqMBMTLk8J9NzmDWP0EsANxhw1lvfXwKQeAcjA46MoNmiYRvNSJI4EWCfwwsDBAOADuwBJRHHwc_a4-Bg7owWzm3dD-0iTR5UU3muN9kPcV36Ei6tbbUbPjs8dnik7Sr3-qpeYW85FunwWDeK8lAxt6eqjfaZqqg3pqSsV7X81h_FaIGsTwO60SXWRgyCJWOdFucx9Xvg7Z5LyfXDdUafF8rlvaL9e8st4F8AAAD__3uSY5Y) to turn the site into an incorporated city. Residents [submitted a petition](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdIvYxRykcHENXa69Ei22CdYZG-FNSN7-RPq_HI30zej7e5_uHGJIjz-8eSPvJU_UkAYkQD05DvEz6cqZuXE3rLzBvtXYd0M3VKvRt0Xz4LRtZupvmth2iHppXUu2m5e-CuaCIaFGpB67mvzCzrbD3AzU9jgr3XgXJB-1rF78m8sSP_nlj9rmrYpmFdmLan8rGhWN53nWyZ8Fm6tWNF5B0SjerinH_PgoGnkHH3OC7Vn-wclJCkgGeR4Jys7WvwsU4WPm4qEE8RCSZGD4roMNckGqw7j9DDGG8qtXunlsHOL3k_wo6WXofwAAAP___mFrnw) to Cameron County Judge Eddie Treviño Jr., saying that incorporating the site would streamline efforts to make Starbase a world-class place to live. The spaceport is [on the edge of the Gulf of Mexico](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO6yAQxvGnwR0RMybGp6A4jbtsu6U1mLEzEr4IyO3tV4m05fZ__T7p-76MF5Ik2_JFK_v6nPcRDVoNqMGOkSS9RttEH0z8Bw17cK0Fd-7PfXP1YUI0ce7a2NnZTRRs7EMwFNsO0M2mEf_GAMECoIPzCXmmOLV9MD22DoKyhqPUPZ_qlSs_qczptd85n6Z9bZK_1noU1f5XOCgcSqUcqHDI_OD8ejcKh4MWLgqHuxSp-rfRH00vN4ms637LUlZdsxz6SLRtsi1N9vF4SEpSOqesWVaS9Nmtfx5x9_gTAAD__4eOY2I) at Boca Chica Beach, about 25 miles east of Brownsville, the state's southernmost city. A single stretch of highway connects Brownsville to the launch site. More than 3,400 employees and contractors work at the site.
## Pollution Fine Against Exxon Holds
A federal court upheld a 2021 ruling imposing a [$14.25 million penalty](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOpCAURp8GO4z3CqIFxTZ0_7ZbGoTLSBZhoow6b7-Z6bf-ku-cnD8_84-NKebHb7uRrncoM3YoOCAHMXsb03sWjddL5ydoSIPqBSg5yrFZNQWLQU0Oe7HQoOQoOkkenJ0WN8qFmqg_Z4AgAFCBbJGC9a4fl27EXsHCREc-1rK3daVKtz1CepeT9taVrUl6rfV5sP4XQ8PQXNfV_j1f9BkZmjN6KgxNJbcyNIeLlB0xNJTPuJe8Ua4MTYiZON13yfxZUnrVWDL_shgaHCYuhgAwQc-lA8eFo57bMAk-hKmTyrkFvGt27Z9XTCkeg2Kie2w2pq9k_W-1U-O_AAAA___IpW4N) on Houston-based ExxonMobil for violations of the federal Clean Air Act at the company's refinery and chemical plant complex in Baytown. The decision by a majority of the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals rejects Exxon's latest appeal and comes more than a decade after the Sierra Club and Environment Texas sued the company. An Exxon spokesman said the company is reviewing legal options. In 2017, a [federal judge ruled](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kT-PnDAQxT-N6Yzw2CxcQbHKCUWRLk0UpVwNeFgseW1kDwvX5LNHsFG6VJ7389Pzn_fr4_aBzrtw_44P6nif4g0qMFKBVOZm0fnPmylsN1T2TRXUqUYb1dRt3RZz147qopUGbG2LA1hl8K2a8AIKmwpMW7juCFOgjFLQqLoEmtCOuh2qFnSjBmEqso5jKnkmph3z5D_jk1I5xkfhu5l5yUJfBfQC-m3byjUH2vKxLaA_RgH9QJllZmQ61BkjoMfEbvQn-vckENBPZCmhl7gshD7LMa6J5brM0dsslZFQy4fz3sUgJxdI4h1dyCxp3w8Uk1yi9ysfBhfk3_O00NffQl-Zdhb6_Wf5oxRQQ_XuMic38im-rfZOL4xPZ8_pq2MOlAR8ceEEifISQ375OL6W-SXTepRVFqmzy3ZcMl8aYar7A50__4z_W-Kzgz8BAAD__92em_k) Exxon's plants in Baytown released 10 million pounds of pollution beyond its state-issued air permits, including carcinogenic and toxic chemicals.
## More Staff Sought to End Driver's License Delays
The new director of the state Department of Public Safety called for hiring more than 1,500 additional workers, citing a [lack of staffing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0UD2zoyAU_TXaXYeLGExBsY1dtt3SQbkkdxbBBVaTf_8mmXnlq05xPuf8uc03y4Hj_bfdyNSnT7MUUgFKQDU7y-E1q9aZRbgrtmRQ9wr1MA5j-zD94Hul0V8suusVF1R6UReFkuziiMaWzTsMJSpEqXHoJHnr1n5cxCh7jUujBDmuKXf1QZWetvjwSgflbk1bG8yj1r00_a9GTo2czvPs_j5tfJONnCKdpZHTx_aN4PYCmf79p1I53gEHIWBPhSunWMCnDMGeQNGnvNJGsYKNDlzmgzIEXikWgkL54JWAtz2n4yN7N7TZuP3kELhcdKPEfbMcPkvrj9cdRn4FAAD___u_dEw) as the the main reason for long wait times to get a driver's license. Col. Freeman Martin said a staffing shortage is impacting law enforcement and driver's license services, resulting in wait times of up to 90 days for Texans to get an ID. The agency [requests an additional](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd0HeNQ64oLjGXa690gLvkiDhYBliJ39_Sq6-ZjQajWak93OZLi6meL9-u4VtfYY8YYvqBHgCNZGL6TWphqxvaYCGLehOge5Nb5qbnfFMw8ysDDrV94Y1KhpcF8LgDRnfRPseAwQFgBp6iRwczZ3xrcFOgxeqZYo1b7LeuPLTlZBeeedNznlpkr3VuhbRfQkcBY7HcUhai_wU5TXvAscSKxeBI3Fwj1QFjiGmvyTPj4Xv9e2T9291G7Z4PqGe9pxArhSazdJ6xJRiOWuh2uviYvqc139p7BZ_AwAA__9kGGHC) 1,525 non-commissioned positions over the next two years, with about 80% of the positions to be used to increase staffing for driver's license services.

clean_body: A federal court upheld a 2021 ruling imposing a on Houston-based Exxon Mobil for violations of the federal Clean Air Act at the company’s refinery and chemical plant complex in Baytown. | | | | | | SATURDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1837, the state legislature approved the of San Antonio, previously known as Presidio San Antonio de Bexar and the Villa of San Fernando de Bexar. It's , and we're curious how many of you have made, or plan to make, a gingerbread house this holiday season? Take our poll at the bottom of this email. We are sponsored this weekend by , offering an unlimited cash back match on their credit cards. Abilene 🌤️ 70/49° | Amarillo ☀️ 63/39° | Austin 🌦️ 77/64° | Brownsville ⛈️ 82/69° | Corpus Christi ⛈️ 78/68° | DFW 🌤️ 74/55° | El Paso 🌤️ 66/38° | Houston ⛈️ 78/64° | Lubbock ⛅ 67/38° | San Antonio 🌤️ 78/66° | Texarkana 🌦️ 65/56° | SpaceX Proposes Starbase Become a City Elon Musk and workers living at the site of SpaceX's operations in South Texas, known as Starbase, to turn the site into an incorporated city. Residents to Cameron County Judge Eddie Treviño Jr., saying that incorporating the site would streamline efforts to make Starbase a world-class place to live. The spaceport is at Boca Chica Beach, about 25 miles east of Brownsville, the state's southernmost city. A single stretch of highway connects Brownsville to the launch site. More than 3,400 employees and contractors work at the site. Pollution Fine Against Exxon Holds A federal court upheld a 2021 ruling imposing a on Houston-based ExxonMobil for violations of the federal Clean Air Act at the company's refinery and chemical plant complex in Baytown. The decision by a majority of the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals rejects Exxon's latest appeal and comes more than a decade after the Sierra Club and Environment Texas sued the company. An Exxon spokesman said the company is reviewing legal options. In 2017, a Exxon's plants in Baytown released 10 million pounds of pollution beyond its state-issued air permits, including carcinogenic and toxic chemicals. More Staff Sought to End Driver's License Delays The new director of the state Department of Public Safety called for hiring more than 1,500 additional workers, citing a as the the main reason for long wait times to get a driver's license. Col. Freeman Martin said a staffing shortage is impacting law enforcement and driver's license services, resulting in wait times of up to 90 days for Texans to get an ID. The agency 1,525 non-commissioned positions over the next two years, with about 80% of the positions to be used to increase staffing for driver's license services. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1be751d141974b388485f8c799899157&_e=bOmc_KVRUSZdLzDec7JHHAptUoRna43qyz9Nrxeg-dNZNLh5NS0YvW7QMAfBjNLfRbcqLigNJhCfyd69yqfT3UzgxsSP11pSHvBnBZbZgRSowGqrxD1gBomyxkuOBuDDoCxDGlkuhkaIyR3JwPcwUl41D7i3ZYWoxkqiL106SXaWQu0BAfnBLCaYNep-G1EPKWipbsv_cUXvPoTKmQ2KvgbfVFLvQ9CuggReI_6jeksRLI5uNgTNZYyOXDMzFC0KutmGNWNJtbx7dp9sbMAIGLBBfRFPk6aSzdjqIxhA1j3lsQxdzHk2qW0RKl1I9-twztzGDtiQKUeuWsCR69dfkXBg7q9BD8FlAPgC9C-O-WR2NnY-5TLJF6xavgpnhmyMTl-U53oGbfVmkpfkUYa1kS3VNT9eXmnA47pj3zBoJGI%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1be751d141974b388485f8c799899157&_e=bOmc_KVRUSZdLzDec7JHHAptUoRna43qyz9Nrxeg-dNZNLh5NS0YvW7QMAfBjNLfRbcqLigNJhCfyd69yqfT3UzgxsSP11pSHvBnBZbZgRSowGqrxD1gBomyxkuOBuDDoCxDGlkuhkaIyR3JwPcwUl41D7i3ZYWoxkqiL106SXaWQu0BAfnBLCaYNep-G1EPKWipbsv_cUXvPoTKmQ2KvgbfVFLvQ9CuggReI_6jeksRLI5uNgTNZYyOXDMzFC0KIhgDMqA2AnL_BXScBxMbbu_ObmWXAvFnUKugGmFo57MvU7ECWhQwcVuupoFRNv-Vcw2HJha2UM5ME4IUKnP0fWBpOHg9mYdMuw6aggyVCRpHCFIS4iXukCI7irTQOdrPQbP3hl5GCy3X-7yrukID-SQecHOCHupSU43Up0YG9GY%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1be751d141974b388485f8c799899157&_e=bOmc_KVRUSZdLzDec7JHHAptUoRna43qyz9Nrxeg-dNZNLh5NS0YvW7QMAfBjNLfRbcqLigNJhCfyd69yqfT3UzgxsSP11pSHvBnBZbZgRSowGqrxD1gBomyxkuOBuDDoCxDGlkuhkaIyR3JwPcwUl41D7i3ZYWoxkqiL106SXaWQu0BAfnBLCaYNep-G1EPKWipbsv_cUXvPoTKmQ2KvgbfVFLvQ9CuggReI_6jeksRLI5uNgTNZYyOXDMzFC0KouC_a-m-mEO7Mgy4F2hdS3h8Ux2Qv7BseRvIyZ3Uv4LbVEZJ_iBtW4mP9j-FLDXNaZBb4IRPdth_OX3T_CK9olsKL-oZv7pi1RmgTVEJVVkGqjknlqkO8omRzJuWFEp0l3ftezBc34ROiaIpPzpohVTtg1hJ4N-GHYZpVLfWBW4%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1be751d141974b388485f8c799899157&_e=bOmc_KVRUSZdLzDec7JHHAptUoRna43qyz9Nrxeg-dNZNLh5NS0YvW7QMAfBjNLfRbcqLigNJhCfyd69yqfT3UzgxsSP11pSHvBnBZbZgRSowGqrxD1gBomyxkuOBuDDoCxDGlkuhkaIyR3JwPcwUl41D7i3ZYWoxkqiL106SXaWQu0BAfnBLCaYNep-G1EPKWipbsv_cUXvPoTKmQ2KvgbfVFLvQ9CuggReI_6jeksRLI5uNgTNZYyOXDMzFC0K74EkP6Pgq8qio7YMPyJcmhp_TfhEZds7cW0LprmdWng8ZlUApiGgXZ8mJ_dO_C027iS5mSAs66tDqUhJuTTCVi6q65ySxhYdrtkyVAReZE8oUkvzNXHRLZuev73IYO2mPX-Zxw3pks3nU3jS4GSciGMluFL3-Qd5wz1kyWgkXJI%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservatives Give

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country. To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including Imprimis , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty. Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions. Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding. So please complete your National Referendum on the Administrative State and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution. Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work. So please complete the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail. Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty. | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: The Flyover
subject: Pelosi Falls, Drones in Germany, and Comedy Wildlife Photos
body:
Rep. Nancy Pelosi was hospitalized on Friday after falling and injuring herself during a congressional delegation trip to Luxembourg, with [one outlet reporting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8GdxvBguP8BcXfuMu1V1rILPZGGCzAifz2J19_zTQz-jT6vp_T03HktHy5jWwLeUKJBhSCMpN3HM_JdN4GIiTdkVWDNmro_yF2q3V37AM5dx-kfDw0BU_Y9352vTT9MMiO7UVTqIxSGqW6zUGTm7VEZRAJgzCSPLdcbq_Mqa0U4pnfVG5z3rpo19b2KvR_gaPAMZ17ru2qBI4XWOCo8AotcDwqJPrUa-fSfMJOMVeGh4Fy1JU8tAxrrjs3F8GFRgU4vY5ygj8KpwVCLsRLglZ4Fzh2xfr9wzFyvQ_CyGVzHH9_tb88vS3-BAAA__9uimm2) that she broke her hip.

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAQBeCnwV0sGDCOC4orRely2y0RMYPNih8LsFd5-5Ujbblbz6fROefjoR_GB5-W_yaiai5roCAuDC5MaGt8eGnRWeUQAXmHio1csHGYALpVTcCdvBoK8ilwMIObnIThSYdZOgfTs_Pq_MaACcY4UNbPjqOZOQUmABAcERStb7n0n9mntqILr3xg6eccu6DW1rZK-D8CdwJ3nw6srceEZcl7Pc154Pe9RV3zXmYk_GZj-RHBJOvTspkFCchTRbR-j4TfNlNawlJXv7ErvfCB63dnArIlE7H-YTTANI2CAcDYFWW3Lx-Cr3Ikgi7R-PBO335b81DwHQAA__8tWXVm) | |
# Saturday, December 14, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1911, Norwegian Roald Amundsen became the first explorer to [reach the South Pole](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngQ0LLiSOB4Yu3tK1o4XhEm6FjWVILL99lapr5086R__Xfbo7yrQ-Pt2CtsUygQQjFAhlpuAon5PhwUZEQM3Rql4b1V8GAJ4sejMP2IdbgNnfLm6Y1WxCDPoatLy5Cyf7XlOgjFIapOp81Oi8lqAMAEJkRmKgVvbuu9DaEsZ8lhfunS8Lzza1tlWmPxiMDMbjOLpEtZX9fDuDsSWqIrhT0Cr-hMHolucaKq5iR-cTVlHLsyWxlYx8t2E7KGeq154Z-Vgc5d-z9l_8y8JPAAAA__-BWF4c), beating his British rival, Robert Falcon Scott. Today marks the 125th edition of the [Army vs. Navy game](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFutDAQhJ_GdIvw2ncchYu_obu_TYkWewEnBiPbAvH20V2kdOm_Gc03H8_hST74bf5PK5syxQEb1CARpB4c-XANunJmYkZWFRvZKi3bW4dYLYbUHZmlGiXprp1uyNy1I7bcKfd43B6VN682iVJLqbCRtZ0Uk1UNSo3IOAndsPMlpvoz-q0sPIUrHpxqG9cqmKWUPQv1T2AvsD_Ps7ZjzntMJb8Igb2NIfDMMMVYRgpBYL_xmQX2bw9K6wVHho2OC2ZaGfbEztvi4wa7t1-Q98TkfvM_UHQuw7lwYigRTip2gXKAXWjbOEDwB0Muiek1oUrG7acPwed7K3Qzr-TDW6D8dehh8DsAAP__wZ57Gg), a historic rivalry that symbolizes the conclusion of the college football season. In honor of this tradition, we would love to hear from our readers who are veterans. Please hit the reply button and share a little about yourself and your service. We're sponsored today by [Energous](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAQBeCnwV0sGDCOC4orRely2y0RMYPNih8LsFd5-5Ujbblbz6fROefjoR_GB5-W_yaiai5roCAuDC5MaGt8eGnRWeUQAXmHio1csHGYALpVTcCdvBoK8ilwMIObnIThSYdZOgfTs_Pq_MaACcY4UNbPjqOZOQUmABAcERStb7n0n9mntqILr3xg6eccu6DW1rZK-D8CdwJ3nw6srceEZcl7Pc154Pe9RV3zXmYk_GZj-RHBJOvTspkFCchTRbR-j4TfNlNawlJXv7ErvfCB63dnArIlE7H-YTTANI2CAcDYFWW3Lx-Cr3Ikgi7R-PBO335b81DwHQAA__8tWXVm), offering an investment opportunity in an up-and-coming wireless power transmission technology.
|
---
## Former Speaker Pelosi Breaks Her Hip
Rep. Nancy Pelosi was hospitalized on Friday after falling and injuring herself during a congressional delegation trip to Luxembourg, with [one outlet reporting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8GdxvBguP8BcXfuMu1V1rILPZGGCzAifz2J19_zTQz-jT6vp_T03HktHy5jWwLeUKJBhSCMpN3HM_JdN4GIiTdkVWDNmro_yF2q3V37AM5dx-kfDw0BU_Y9352vTT9MMiO7UVTqIxSGqW6zUGTm7VEZRAJgzCSPLdcbq_Mqa0U4pnfVG5z3rpo19b2KvR_gaPAMZ17ru2qBI4XWOCo8AotcDwqJPrUa-fSfMJOMVeGh4Fy1JU8tAxrrjs3F8GFRgU4vY5ygj8KpwVCLsRLglZ4Fzh2xfr9wzFyvQ_CyGVzHH9_tb88vS3-BAAA__9uimm2) that she broke her hip. The former House Speaker [fell after a group photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQheGnwR2WGfB1UlDcxl223dKawBBPFhsLcJzs06-y_dZHOvr1fV6mC3Lk9faBC9ka0gQdGKlAKjN55PiaTONtIALSDVk1aKOG_gzQzDacEJRzWvXnvj_50F-vhvCEAxHC2WHD9v2mQBmlNHSqdUETOt2BMgAEQZiOPNeU23vitc4U4is9KLcuLU20c61bEfq_gFHAeBxHG9JzpaO8dwHjliJXdkXAGFJeKMs57YVk2Qi_KMsVV_eSG8VUWPJ63zN5OaeyccXI3-TlMXMkWTM-6K0g4_6k5Zr2fGuy9dvBMXL5NwjT3Rbk-NtV_3J6WPgJAAD__4-hb3Y) taken to commemorate the 80th anniversary of the Battle of the Bulge, which included other lawmakers and officials, a source confirmed. A spokesperson for Pelosi said that [she was under excellent care](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb8GOiLPeMBy4eI16fLaLZGxx2EigxE4yfL3q2y_5dWVjo7O1228ecmy3v_7hV1NZUSF1AF2QGP0ks-R2ugSM7Ju2YHRBKa3iO3sqJ8ssh6iB2ZLKpC30WgYQtCUVN-K-9AAgQA0KriEpNkHrRAIkTE1pDhKLfvlUWStM6d8lhfvl1CWNru51u1o9L8Grw1e_bby-_hcn7FXCZkbvK5-DWe3cS6HdLI-nvvZzeXYpPrc5ec3L1N57vcu9r22OEGMlqeAPhljbD9NNLAeiGO7u7i9JWc5BtOQui9e8q9I_SvMy-FPAAAA__805WUg) and wouldn’t join other lawmakers for the remainder of the trip, stating she was “ _strong_ ” and would be “ _back on her feet in no time_.”
## Lawmakers Frustrated with Drone Response
New Jersey lawmakers have [expressed their frustration](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQBb8GOiJY1nFSUFzjLtdeaRG8NhthE5lVovz9yddf_fRmpPm5jbfIhbflO64UZK4jWEDjwDgcp8jlM6KewkwE5DUF13t0fXcF0DkkgnPssUu-7_E-pQveLfh4uaObY4peczhoDhw658G6U5o9xeQtOAQgmBVamljqfnpU3iTTXD71Rfsp1VWXkEWeTfkvBYOCQTJlLuXYFAy5rrTRuykYmkQh846SsoKhs_4KXWe2h3nUls1SRTLxSruZ9rqRabxk4W05rnoP0_PNpXA79wrtskb-M2j5r8YrwG8AAAD___G3Yec) with the federal response to mysterious drones flying over the state, with one congressman urging the authorization of local authorities to down the aircraft. Rep. Josh Gottheimer criticized federal agencies, stating that the lack of information was unacceptable, while referring to 11 confirmed sightings from November. Assemblymember Brian Bergen, [a former U.S. Army helicopter pilot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LHO2yAUxfGngY0ILsS4A0MXb-na0cL42twEQwQolt--SvdvPtLvSP-_j_nhKVHe__gDXd_KDBKMUCCUmVdP6ZoNX92GCKg5OmW1Ufb-C4BHFyzYwdtlBW1t8KPyox3MIPWiRr0tmpP7agqUUUqDVLewafRBS1AGAGFjRuJKvdTbs1DuEbd0lQ_WWygHTy72_m5M_2YwMZh6xEgpfTcGUywHZjwbg6l131GcvofIYLpLPdoRRMZTPLE2vETy5-FfWMWzxCxeVJdLhEqdArVDrLVkFI322CnvX5BXt75PSonaYJmR--Hp_y_vPzX6OPgXAAD__3GfacU), was more personal with his disapproval, calling national security spokesperson John Kirby a “fool” following his remarks about the unidentified drones. Concerns about the [numerous drone sightings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kEFr9CAUAH-NuRnynkbzHTx8UHLbXkrpMZj43HUxGtTukn9ftveeB4Zhvi7LxYYY0vXd7mSazwsOKDkgB7k4G-K5yM4ZT4QkOjKghQQ9_kPsbka7YdRaTtOq_KTUOKrJA42j116tGtYumJcNECSAwAH6zQuymxgQJCKhZ3IgF1ou_T2H1G7k45kfVPot7100t9aOysR_hjPD2a5bomftr_mFGc6fHwzn_Tu2cETiruRElVNqVMhxG0o97EY80ZPfqVQ6ebIPG3lttoWcGM615XIyMQfHxBuA0kqMeuiKccczxBiq0kwO192G-FvU_jr0MPgTAAD__3j7Z9s) persisted on Friday as officials reported multiple instances of drones entering the airspace over a Navy weapons station in New Jersey.
## List: Wealthiest Zip Codes in the U.S.
Atherton, California, ranked as [the wealthiest U.S. zip code](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFzhCAQRn8NdDjuwh1HQZHG7tKmdDhZz83g4QjRmF-fMX36b7733se9vwdO_Hq-h5l8HXOPLRoFqMD0MXA6eiOjH4mQtCQPVhuwF4coJ--i1s5huJno4EIUSV8fgMHaeNPWoWR_vgGCAdDYQjOMmsKgWwSDSDgK01LkmtfmM_OrTjSmI2-0NkOeZfJTrUsR-k1gJ7Db971ZKaR6THk5FwK7R8pPgd2cS1X0vdCr8Ebqq6gfXtSQIxV1Kgjs5OrjsnNKXK5WmPY5B05_nPpf9-bxNwAA__9gAVmb) for the fifth time, with a median home price of $7.75 million, over $7 million higher than the cheapest, Rogers, Arkansas. Real estate platform [RealtyHop analyzed listing prices](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuhDAQBNCvMZ2Rd_GducJFGrpLmxKBvT42MhhhB0K-PiJ9mmlGeiPNx7N_Dhx5eb0PM9kSUo8KtQSUoHs_cDx7XXkbiJCaiiyYRoO5PRCryXrT6juYUY361o7hHpR-4APNCNCatvUV20sDBA3QoILahYYG1ygEjUgYhFbkuaSt_ky8lIlCPNNOW-3SXEU7lbJm0bwJ7AR2x3HUbhndVQrsLlpgB3gFCOzmlIuk75WWzDvJH16lS56y5EXSTtspv7LMZShUT2WO1Wb9enCMnO9GaPWaB45_w-W_I3aLvwEAAP__gk5eFQ), sorted areas by zip code, and ranked them by median list price to identify the three most expensive zip codes in each state. The three most expensive zip codes, Atherton, Miami-Dade, Florida, and Suffolk County, New York, all reside along the coasts and sit on or near beaches. The cheapest zip codes were found in Arkansas, Mississippi, and North Dakota. [See where your state ranks here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFzhCAQRn8NdDjuwh1HQZHG7tKmdDhZz83g4QjRmF-fMX36b7733se9vwdO_Hq-h5l8HXOPLRoFqMD0MXA6eiOjH4mQtCQPVhuwF4coJ--i1s5huJno4EIUSV8fgMHaeNPWoWR_vgGCAdDYQjOMmsKgWwSDSDgK01LkmtfmM_OrTjSmI2-0NkOeZfJTrUsR-k1gJ7Db971ZKaR6THk5FwK7R8pPgd2cS1X0vdCr8Ebqq6gfXtSQIxV1Kgjs5OrjsnNKXK5WmPY5B05_nPpf9-bxNwAA__9gAVmb).
|

**➤ Consultants **McKinsey & Company agreed Friday to pay $650 million in a deferred prosecution agreement, resolving federal charges for conspiring to misbrand OxyContin and other opioids to boost prescriptions and obstruct justice. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn8N3rC4g-BkYKhUeUuXqupoETiSazFYNkrqf1-le-dP39PT-zxPZ8-Zy_XNz-RaqhMqNBJQgpmi57xPposuESHpjhwM2sBwOCF2NwfHeELrD_py8jHawZMBlYwfbCLwQB27Jw0QDIBGBX1ImnzQCsEgEiZhFEVude2_Kpd2o5T3eqe1D3Xusru1tmxCvwgcBY7-Ego9tv5an7PA8eNd4DiHby4b7XLxu7QHJWfOmWuRa80k688eamlcJC0caeYgcNxaXXehR45CvwLYwcJR6W51cXk8z5sdhFHX2XP-E2n_hbk7_A0AAP__Ep5kdQ)) **➤ The former **stripper and convicted murderer who accused three Duke University lacrosse players of raping her at a 2006 team party admitted she lied and asked for their forgiveness. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8N3l4ED2KnA0MXb-na0cLwcGgxWIAT-d9XrtSxy-l0J33S3ed9upsQQ1o-zEq6-TwhRwUCQajJmRCPSXVOeyIk2ZEWg1RiuL4hdg9tFfZcCD9fB0sSh9t14Dcz9AK9tM6ILuiTJlAoISRycbFekrGSo1CIhJ4pTi60XC5fOaT2IB-P_KRysXnton60tlUm3xmODMd0bLm2s2I4nmCGo8A_2SskelWGo89lpQK1lbBtVGDdi6MCNqdnsA1sOWozEVaTln09Y0-1UoWWIR4hLWDmvDeY6fTFbORgPsDt3wTR2JJrJdiiOahUCAmQ857h2BXttleIMdR-YIovqwnxd0f779enxp8AAAD__3T2e0s)) **➤ Amazon confirmed **on Thursday that it donated $1 million to President-elect Donald Trump's inaugural fund, one day after Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram, announced a similar donation. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71uwzAQg59G3mzoKCVuBg1dvKVrR-MQSckV-gkcOW769IW7dyEIEPiI7_M8n1mSlOsH5-BarDM0bE_oyc6eJb1m23kXQ0AwXXA0Gkvj4QR0N8d8OiKQQWR4gtUHMhTfaLQR_jjaTtxOI5AlMtA0XKIJfDEaZIGAqKwOXlpdhq8qpd1CTK_6DMtwqblL7tba_aHMu8KkMG3bNvC31Me-Kkw7W2Ei7GEUJs78U0vfljXfeym8XteFm9TSU58lJamlW5y_b3t_HEdl9TWzpL-39p_90-E3AAD__5SmWjs)) ****➤ **President-elect** Donald Trump announced that the GOP would work to eliminate daylight saving time, calling it "_inconvenient_ " and "_costly_ " in a post on Truth Social on Friday. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu6yAUgOGngY0IDjhcDwx3YUvXjhYxBzgVGMumifL2Vbp3_qVv-D9vyy1QpS1_hIZupL6ABCMUCGWWGKi-FsOjS4iAmqNTVhtlpxmAF2c14N3MKUiAZNRdT5ONq7Zz_GfA2jsn99YUKKOUBqkua9IYVi1BGQCExIzESKMfl69O2yiY6qs_8LisvfHqyhj7yfR_Bp6BHwUL1fpuDHzpDTd8ngz8GtoeKG8M_CT1fLVajOO77SL3XcTwqpTLEGd40JbFoIYMPD9c3J9UK51Xy4zMLdAvzcdfGx4OfgIAAP__lwReeg))
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAQBeCnwV0sGDCOC4orRely2y0RMYPNih8LsFd5-5Ujbblbz6fROefjoR_GB5-W_yaiai5roCAuDC5MaGt8eGnRWeUQAXmHio1csHGYALpVTcCdvBoK8ilwMIObnIThSYdZOgfTs_Pq_MaACcY4UNbPjqOZOQUmABAcERStb7n0n9mntqILr3xg6eccu6DW1rZK-D8CdwJ3nw6srceEZcl7Pc154Pe9RV3zXmYk_GZj-RHBJOvTspkFCchTRbR-j4TfNlNawlJXv7ErvfCB63dnArIlE7H-YTTANI2CAcDYFWW3Lx-Cr3Ikgi7R-PBO335b81DwHQAA__8tWXVm) **Goodbye Power Cord, Hello “IoT Innovation of the Year”** Nikola Tesla said powering the world without wires was of “all-surpassing importance.” This technology wasn’t possible in Tesla’s time, but a company called [Energous](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAQBeCnwV0sGDCOC4orRely2y0RMYPNih8LsFd5-5Ujbblbz6fROefjoR_GB5-W_yaiai5roCAuDC5MaGt8eGnRWeUQAXmHio1csHGYALpVTcCdvBoK8ilwMIObnIThSYdZOgfTs_Pq_MaACcY4UNbPjqOZOQUmABAcERStb7n0n9mntqILr3xg6eccu6DW1rZK-D8CdwJ3nw6srceEZcl7Pc154Pe9RV3zXmYk_GZj-RHBJOvTspkFCchTRbR-j4TfNlNawlJXv7ErvfCB63dnArIlE7H-YTTANI2CAcDYFWW3Lx-Cr3Ikgi7R-PBO335b81DwHQAA__8tWXVm) making it a reality today. Energous’ patented technology is like Wi-Fi for power. It transmits power to devices through the air, [eliminating the need for cables and batteries ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAQBeCnwV0sGDCOC4orRely2y0RMYPNih8LsFd5-5Ujbblbz6fROefjoR_GB5-W_yaiai5roCAuDC5MaGt8eGnRWeUQAXmHio1csHGYALpVTcCdvBoK8ilwMIObnIThSYdZOgfTs_Pq_MaACcY4UNbPjqOZOQUmABAcERStb7n0n9mntqILr3xg6eccu6DW1rZK-D8CdwJ3nw6srceEZcl7Pc154Pe9RV3zXmYk_GZj-RHBJOvTspkFCchTRbR-j4TfNlNawlJXv7ErvfCB63dnArIlE7H-YTTANI2CAcDYFWW3Lx-Cr3Ikgi7R-PBO335b81DwHQAA__8tWXVm)and providing a constant, reliable energy source for IoT devices that track and deliver data in real-time. It’s such a powerful innovation, it earned Energous “IoT Innovation of the Year” honors. But their innovation could also be crucial to retail, manufacturing, and logistics operations, [a combined $650B market.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAQBeCnwV0sGDCOC4orRely2y0RMYPNih8LsFd5-5Ujbblbz6fROefjoR_GB5-W_yaiai5roCAuDC5MaGt8eGnRWeUQAXmHio1csHGYALpVTcCdvBoK8ilwMIObnIThSYdZOgfTs_Pq_MaACcY4UNbPjqOZOQUmABAcERStb7n0n9mntqILr3xg6eccu6DW1rZK-D8CdwJ3nw6srceEZcl7Pc154Pe9RV3zXmYk_GZj-RHBJOvTspkFCchTRbR-j4TfNlNawlJXv7ErvfCB63dnArIlE7H-YTTANI2CAcDYFWW3Lx-Cr3Ikgi7R-PBO335b81DwHQAA__8tWXVm) Data is the oil that keeps these companies running smoothly. And thanks to Energous’ wireless power network transmitters, all of these industries could get a **24/7 flow of data** without depending on batteries or cords. That’s why Energous already landed a contract to supply wireless power network solutions to a **Fortune 10** multinational retailer, opening them up to **4,700 retail locations across the U.S.** Sounds like it’s time to cut the cord and [become an Energous shareholder as they work to scale nationwide.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAQBeCnwV0sGDCOC4orRely2y0RMYPNih8LsFd5-5Ujbblbz6fROefjoR_GB5-W_yaiai5roCAuDC5MaGt8eGnRWeUQAXmHio1csHGYALpVTcCdvBoK8ilwMIObnIThSYdZOgfTs_Pq_MaACcY4UNbPjqOZOQUmABAcERStb7n0n9mntqILr3xg6eccu6DW1rZK-D8CdwJ3nw6srceEZcl7Pc154Pe9RV3zXmYk_GZj-RHBJOvTspkFCchTRbR-j4TfNlNawlJXv7ErvfCB63dnArIlE7H-YTTANI2CAcDYFWW3Lx-Cr3Ikgi7R-PBO335b81DwHQAA__8tWXVm)

We want to congratulate [Luther Cifers and team for winning a hard fought Republican nomination for Senate](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wnqh-nbHFtHL9uTBm5UVBp1spLWnDdhWTS2M6mIHRljXUdQf5n28VqkyXugbTt_zig9uVMpXbUgdIKxOLY0WWn57orRaqFgy0FqiWYIms9vFMvziIBX26L_tuxQwz8DvybCIULrPxrPlBLHFoZ2HR07Bx2EQy5lO22aR0eUbbK2KZV9NhwVQwBNdSObGkJBMuKVF6l_48A4LN97LVWN4Ryetkv2uTEi5neNAkXa6Q8WoaGlebhVWHLAa5PpiVKnxG3xyNwK9FytfM_MUKlx5b5xFq8Dsp5E6vv2NE8oMuyCPLlYPmVYLM1DOqmN9-D96m4yK2TbAmRqq8hotHrbFtOnrGVrbflkm0wJcGcLkn0PDlrYY5oEscmFUCWuFonwZiZEz9DrtmQ9FNynQl8JYbvNF-Y5ebbUWKs2jj9fLx54aLCQ-vArUZncLAiv2IhLXSCF-2jM94EUI3u8bA9cQIeysF6lPyhtOdPHt2NqN6YmVFbAYyBgAoYpY7BWZnbDVkCVf3ItpjrM=&c=FHeY7wv0vae6WguAgx6xsJNq16wY1keoJgxakE9SDbV8OyKirNjktQ==&ch=lgZ2VuN_cxh3xynazjc-dkmJ_vWCQ34iLjB0bBIAdFaj6nljMjTEkQ==) District 10. Now we must unite and help him defeat the democrat opponent on 7 January.
---
| |
---
| Thank you to all the voters who came out on a Friday night to support their candidate. Their were well over 1,000 voters who took time out of their Friday to ensure we elected a strong America First Candidate to replace me for the State Senate District 10.
---
| |
---
| Running for office is tough on your family and takes much time and courage. Thank you to all the candidates who stepped up to advance our conservative values. I called Luther last night to congratulate him and we both ask that everyone show all of the other candidates some grace. We must now put our differences aside and unite as a party and focus on the greater good, a win against the democrat on 7 January!
---
| Luther is a Christian Conservative and a self made businessman. Thank you to many members of my team who stayed to the end such as Ramona Christian and Sean Brown to help out. We could not be more happy with the outcome and we know Luther will do a great job representing you in SD 10. My team and I look forward making sure Luther Cifers finishes strong on 7 January in the General Election!
In the News:
[https://www.yahoo.com/news/cifers-triumphs-multi-round-vote-065507457.html?fr=sycsrp_catchall](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wnqh-nbHFtHL9uTBm5UVBp1spLWnDdhWTS2M6mIHRljXUdQf5n28VqkyXugbTt_zK04WasMc4ldmmnIx27udNYJSd5AcVxmwb_H2uMumgvMLvBaRBJBf3MlZ_ts8LSUEbaiQLgWtuNncP7mqxJoIt6V_ikQohLv0mBgdNmr_6_2GRcaVu7KOpZSZD-WWNkFlUm8f0x-dsLtFpEVIL6MN9l-f1TjbwSY_E-3WZKaA0vmJQcdO5wrgZ9FxJVpFTnY3&c=FHeY7wv0vae6WguAgx6xsJNq16wY1keoJgxakE9SDbV8OyKirNjktQ==&ch=lgZ2VuN_cxh3xynazjc-dkmJ_vWCQ34iLjB0bBIAdFaj6nljMjTEkQ==)

| John McGuire Congressional Swearing In Ceremony
---
| | |
---
I am looking forward to my next chapter in representing you and my larger community in Congress VA 05, a district that includes 24 counties, cities, and towns. Almost all of State Senate District 10 is in the 5th Congressional District. On January 3rd, I will become the first Congressman in history to live in Goochland County.

[Click here to RSVP and get details on my swearing in ceremony to Congress scheduled for January 3rd.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wnqh-nbHFtHL9uTBm5UVBp1spLWnDdhWTS2M6mIHRljXUdQf5n28Vnnr31i9ozRASNH5_MB7oRc7j4G8KFXsSPTRKabWU64V2VeWi_lmbb6RxDfgxL0OlXUpFY2LjEP9pkQdILyaIhvIhCuuLbFCWSF64rdC6Fa1KPjdZPdQlpsXY-kXNh2jacU4O6rApuhhmzl27UuBxVwb2P_0kKYIavcYiK9jCmvUsUwFm6CbFXNsICEIJdFzVw==&c=FHeY7wv0vae6WguAgx6xsJNq16wY1keoJgxakE9SDbV8OyKirNjktQ==&ch=lgZ2VuN_cxh3xynazjc-dkmJ_vWCQ34iLjB0bBIAdFaj6nljMjTEkQ==)

On November 5th, through the grace of God, Trump won, we won the US Senate and the House, and John McGuire received the most votes ever in Virginia's 5th district! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to serving you in VA 05 as a member in the 119th Congress!
| For God and Country,

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Obama judge threatens me with “imprisonment”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/02f5c54d0b442740/?utm_campaign=20241212&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

I pray to God that President Trump can drain the swamp, because our
Republic is in a very dark place right now.

The freedoms you and I always took for granted as U.S. citizens are
GONE.

My rights and fate are now at the mercy of an Obama-appointed federal
judge who has intervened in my $148 MILLION legal battle.

“RUDY GIULIANI’S LEGAL WOES CONTINUE TO WORSEN AS A FEDERAL JUDGE
IN WASHINGTON, D.C., THREATENED THE EMBATTLED FORMER NEW YORK CITY
MAYOR WITH SEVERE SANCTIONS AND POSSIBLE ‘IMPRISONMENT’”

[Source: _Law & Crime News_]

Stalin never could’ve _dreamed_ of having a weaponized legal system
like the one wreaking havoc on America right now!

_How in the world am I supposed to pay $148 million?_

They’ve already taken my home, my car, my money, my credit card.

_THEY EVEN WANT TO FREEZE MY SOCIAL SECURITY!_

What happened to the Eighth Amendment of the Constitution:_ "Excessive
bail shall not be required, nor excessive fines imposed, nor cruel and
unusual punishments inflicted."_

That’s why I will say for the hundredth time that this battle goes
beyond _me_ as an individual. It’s about whether we are still a free
Republic or if vengeance and lawfare now rule our nation.

AS I FACE THREATS OF “IMPRISONMENT” AND “SEVERE SANCTIONS,”
I’M TURNING TO MY FELLOW CITIZENS LIKE YOU IN ONE FINAL HOPE TO
FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM.

SO PLEASE, MAKE A CONTRIBUTION OF ANY AMOUNT TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST
– THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND – TO HELP ME KEEP UP THE FIGHT
FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE DEEP STATE TRIES TO JAIL ME FOR THE
REST OF MY LIFE.
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/02f5c54d0b442740/?utm_campaign=20241212&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

subject: We have a Christmas present for you, Friend!

body:
We're proud to present you with...

|

body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f035ed0c65594d50aa7250078ac41e23&_e=D_yD2btF77CKp-0udwulsz_XvUOc-8x1CjKPLJDRL5MJrBMr3zI9IasGrDaJPXsc8CEEX35-Ego1MqPxgN4Q0goelHdOrcpVMzZorKHl860XwSjH72lXtTV78k6EKnCMzmqGOdUMW-DuLXITyWwLnGCpmq0qC9AVRupgGN6LX9Y3CoaNveYZUHTEd1-N0JaOswThn12KBtxXsQ7xxGqKQV_7xZ-BYMuJ1xm2pWeiy2Fp01haSIVU3RQfUYi-k854VFXBqp7ZSed3yKJtXTtsiM9xYlySeQUkGipe0qoNTH_IfUm-MIKip6GjQQmVNoL1ZiEJ08Y6qvTHG8CN8vDuZK6Ups5Bo20gXHmjNeuXvAA_w4evJRYpDvtgTtnP5La5U7gW1RwDP38oNLVglnnufuO9YPlDtQGNi6GdDtzyfqSf6r9r1BTe7eFN3GTi6aq26ImzpV65ectllDgTYSqq8re8XxAVWRufc_UmDUw6WlA%3D)
