| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f035ed0c65594d50aa7250078ac41e23&_e=D_yD2btF77CKp-0udwulsz_XvUOc-8x1CjKPLJDRL5MJrBMr3zI9IasGrDaJPXsc8CEEX35-Ego1MqPxgN4Q0goelHdOrcpVMzZorKHl860XwSjH72lXtTV78k6EKnCMzmqGOdUMW-DuLXITyWwLnGCpmq0qC9AVRupgGN6LX9Y3CoaNveYZUHTEd1-N0JaOswThn12KBtxXsQ7xxGqKQV_7xZ-BYMuJ1xm2pWeiy2Fp01haSIVU3RQfUYi-k854VFXBqp7ZSed3yKJtXTtsiM9xYlySeQUkGipe0qoNTH_IfUm-MIKip6GjQQmVNoL1ZiEJ08Y6qvTHG8CN8vDuZCvOdl8aEYCX9oO1WdqtyULPmEofOcX0mBg_xRbq5i_JOa_ilH_dzIOC2YqMaChbF0c3rEDbt3w99pPfgKWzHNRtu6pMJsySzO16M5s72H1TFyMLXXDiYZjf6nENGFkJMl3Gpc1sKEoJ9NO7FK_7OIs%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f035ed0c65594d50aa7250078ac41e23&_e=D_yD2btF77CKp-0udwulsz_XvUOc-8x1CjKPLJDRL5MJrBMr3zI9IasGrDaJPXsc8CEEX35-Ego1MqPxgN4Q0goelHdOrcpVMzZorKHl860XwSjH72lXtTV78k6EKnCMzmqGOdUMW-DuLXITyWwLnGCpmq0qC9AVRupgGN6LX9Y3CoaNveYZUHTEd1-N0JaOswThn12KBtxXsQ7xxGqKQV_7xZ-BYMuJ1xm2pWeiy2Fp01haSIVU3RQfUYi-k854VFXBqp7ZSed3yKJtXTtsiM9xYlySeQUkGipe0qoNTH_IfUm-MIKip6GjQQmVNoL1ZiEJ08Y6qvTHG8CN8vDuZGeZ64xqSigLk9Jp1PhmuLLw_jx1K94ct5A3REyMwd9nvsIHUrTPCcV3RBtA-aBhHXGKdNdpMZZBt2C1Qh1m_i59-1Jmy0lRkjVhmVnfhtNKnslrcfrq6s6SdeX3N7SaP2caZq6c21oCOo_lrOiA3G8%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f035ed0c65594d50aa7250078ac41e23&_e=D_yD2btF77CKp-0udwulsz_XvUOc-8x1CjKPLJDRL5MJrBMr3zI9IasGrDaJPXsc8CEEX35-Ego1MqPxgN4Q0goelHdOrcpVMzZorKHl860XwSjH72lXtTV78k6EKnCMzmqGOdUMW-DuLXITyWwLnGCpmq0qC9AVRupgGN6LX9Y3CoaNveYZUHTEd1-N0JaOswThn12KBtxXsQ7xxGqKQV_7xZ-BYMuJ1xm2pWeiy2Fp01haSIVU3RQfUYi-k854VFXBqp7ZSed3yKJtXTtsiM9xYlySeQUkGipe0qoNTH_IfUm-MIKip6GjQQmVNoL1ZiEJ08Y6qvTHG8CN8vDuZOccOMz43MzeKGMuenwPpsqUI_SxVDZRsy-3GCUqLYy97ubNcmm5nwl7s5PMbgmxXeT_Kqya1Vs-B3jYF7NYXrVtDOD09il6uGP11PYKBti_6rmPYXg6pR_UTLjgko-UYGTc_-gHhSZ2NTzUH0ORoIA%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f035ed0c65594d50aa7250078ac41e23&_e=D_yD2btF77CKp-0udwulsz_XvUOc-8x1CjKPLJDRL5MJrBMr3zI9IasGrDaJPXsc8CEEX35-Ego1MqPxgN4Q0goelHdOrcpVMzZorKHl860XwSjH72lXtTV78k6EKnCMzmqGOdUMW-DuLXITyWwLnGCpmq0qC9AVRupgGN6LX9Y3CoaNveYZUHTEd1-N0JaOswThn12KBtxXsQ7xxGqKQV_7xZ-BYMuJ1xm2pWeiy2Fp01haSIVU3RQfUYi-k854VFXBqp7ZSed3yKJtXTtsiM9xYlySeQUkGipe0qoNTH_IfUm-MIKip6GjQQmVNoL1ZiEJ08Y6qvTHG8CN8vDuZGqkJiC2EqNL_DIn5oZrkGgnebsiwnFW0LSIxSddUlVOq78moVZVKyywOSTU9T-R94REXtRk8DpMJJVDeGQNWIAoxUe56uo1M1gA9JWcVwNwb1VkRLou6cxcqr4BvqfwdodLyMkC93l0wSyoydzvkXA%3D)
[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f035ed0c65594d50aa7250078ac41e23&_e=D_yD2btF77CKp-0udwulsz_XvUOc-8x1CjKPLJDRL5MJrBMr3zI9IasGrDaJPXsc8CEEX35-Ego1MqPxgN4Q0goelHdOrcpVMzZorKHl860XwSjH72lXtTV78k6EKnCMzmqGOdUMW-DuLXITyWwLnGCpmq0qC9AVRupgGN6LX9Y3CoaNveYZUHTEd1-N0JaOswThn12KBtxXsQ7xxGqKQV_7xZ-BYMuJ1xm2pWeiy2Fp01haSIVU3RQfUYi-k854VFXBqp7ZSed3yKJtXTtsiM9xYlySeQUkGipe0qoNTH_IfUm-MIKip6GjQQmVNoL1ZiEJ08Y6qvTHG8CN8vDuZImuzrxDkgjKxvgpyF4JkJ18A8i1GIQO95g_vl0j6DhTuB_Q5f7aGDy0spVxryUzAnz0FGp_THrHx0fmWc1S_Lhy-lkXFBeJgZar-9lRGx1p1eJAcHsDQofBzpwt8t_zBnclLAaaaTWes1p-IQr2rsI%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f035ed0c65594d50aa7250078ac41e23&_e=D_yD2btF77CKp-0udwulsz_XvUOc-8x1CjKPLJDRL5MJrBMr3zI9IasGrDaJPXsc8CEEX35-Ego1MqPxgN4Q0goelHdOrcpVMzZorKHl860XwSjH72lXtTV78k6EKnCMzmqGOdUMW-DuLXITyWwLnGCpmq0qC9AVRupgGN6LX9Y3CoaNveYZUHTEd1-N0JaOswThn12KBtxXsQ7xxGqKQV_7xZ-BYMuJ1xm2pWeiy2Fp01haSIVU3RQfUYi-k854VFXBqp7ZSed3yKJtXTtsiM9xYlySeQUkGipe0qoNTH_IfUm-MIKip6GjQQmVNoL1ZiEJ08Y6qvTHG8CN8vDuZJqzF3DQpLv5XudblAGygZLNfKuvNbvCe-_fFRwhIMC5gyMed35vRAao8NESzI1QO5Uo-_brhn8aNZ1XJrI93QMKhpFUkWSRJXDafB7gFgJersINvcZND4aoh5UMB3_FiyxkefWfaCYoU5ffElnyfGU%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f035ed0c65594d50aa7250078ac41e23&_e=D_yD2btF77CKp-0udwulsz_XvUOc-8x1CjKPLJDRL5MJrBMr3zI9IasGrDaJPXsc8CEEX35-Ego1MqPxgN4Q0goelHdOrcpVMzZorKHl860XwSjH72lXtTV78k6EKnCMzmqGOdUMW-DuLXITyWwLnGCpmq0qC9AVRupgGN6LX9Y3CoaNveYZUHTEd1-N0JaOswThn12KBtxXsQ7xxGqKQV_7xZ-BYMuJ1xm2pWeiy2Fp01haSIVU3RQfUYi-k854VFXBqp7ZSed3yKJtXTtsiM9xYlySeQUkGipe0qoNTH_IfUm-MIKip6GjQQmVNoL1ZiEJ08Y6qvTHG8CN8vDuZCh7sLPH42HNrIWdYaA93GP8wkBcGnfBUijlfZyY2LftNdMCh4-9rVs_K7ky5MEMo7RRZfltY6Stsj5ZStqnUl9NBspscOgfJHfUPuX6wiU1RRRq397OIcbLKGf29sZA6NRYJxK0kcYLyzV3CRZ1PEw%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." name: History Facts
subject: What the Dutch traded Manhattan for
body:
In the 17th century, the Netherlands, through the Dutch East India Company, had control of the tiny, remote archipelago of Banda where all of the nutmeg trees on Earth grew — except for one island, Pulau Rhun, which was under British control. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cnrccfy2smzlldemclfd7jol2mfb47wuo9lzab7mx15qn49ydq11kkab9on08n4x3thswyumizndz4mh2v72jrve89x16cnvkaye4wgrtygj07c5u8exhsszprgmoo7qqb7n6dpjtgylvtv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Manhattan was once "traded" for a tiny Indonesian island.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n the 17th century, the Netherlands, through the Dutch East India Company, had control of the tiny, remote archipelago of Banda where [all of the nutmeg trees](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) on Earth grew — except for one island, [Pulau Rhun](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), which was under British control. The Dutch were pretty unhappy about that holdout, and spent four years fighting their way onto the island, eventually seizing it in 1621. Then, in 1664, as part of a larger conflict over international trade and shipping, the British sent frigates to New Amsterdam, a marshy Dutch colony and fur trading outpost on the Atlantic coast of North America, to claim it for the British Empire.
---
Both nations were adamant about taking over these territories — and neither was putting up much resistance at that point — so in 1667, when the Treaty of Breda ended the Second Anglo-Dutch War, they struck a deal. The Netherlands, presented with an opportunity to control the entire world’s nutmeg supply, ceded control of New Amsterdam, which comprised what is [now lower Manhattan](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in New York City, to the British. (Today, neither country has control of either territory — the United States won independence from Great Britain, and the Banda Islands are officially part of Indonesia.)It may seem surprising from a modern perspective: A country traded what became an economic and cultural powerhouse for a volcanic island less than 2 miles long. But at the time, the so-called Spice Islands, which included the Banda archipelago, were extremely valuable territory to European colonial forces, which had been violently competing for shares of the spice trade for [more than a century](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). The remote islands were the only source of many seasonings we take for granted today, including not only nutmeg, but also cinnamon, ginger, cumin, and black pepper.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sohgfg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## New York was briefly called New Orange.
It didn’t take the Dutch long after the Pulau Rhun “trade” to take another shot at controlling the island of Manhattan. In 1673, the Netherlands briefly reconquered the city — but instead of reverting the name back to New Amsterdam, it was dubbed New Orange in honor of Dutch leader (and later king of England) William of Orange. After about a year, the British retook the city and reinstated the New York name.

subject: a shocking trend

body:
| | | | |

| | |

| |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f11a71f-ff4a-47ab-aded-f5f8b65c1370/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, This presidential election showed us an alarming trend that could impact our race in 2025. Donald Trump gained ground nationwide, including in key counties across Virginia. This election was a crucial test for Democrats as we approach 2025. National Republicans have the momentum, and they think that 2025 will be a key opportunity to keep this Governor’s seat red. We can’t afford to let Donald Trump and his allies gain any more ground next year. We must demonstrate that Virginia is not turning its back on progress or on our neighbors. We must have the resources to continue our campaign for stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families. And we must show that we can build a future that brings people together and listens to the challenges facing all Virginians. Next year, National Republican groups and GOP leadership will work relentlessly to defeat us. We need to build a strong foundation now. [Will you split a contribution today between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us prepare for the tough race ahead in November 2025?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa834c33-20e2-4b0f-8f78-64df6fd18504/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Thank you, Abigail

| | |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a3e76f7-dae5-4065-8c60-dacf733ce519/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Dear Friend,

This is Julia from House GOP Membership Services.

We're auditing our members, and I noticed you are on track to have one of the longest membership streaks in House GOP history!

I talked to House Leadership about this extraordinary circumstance and as a small token of our appreciation, we are offering you **[EARLY ACCESS to PRE-ORDER your 2025 membership card.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=42ccfd7be45a4566ba74a723375cd7b0&_e=IzGYxh_vUNI3ds6Wwthffw-WX7RxWqugvuQOvy8Gh9w2UhUoM_a71DeW5N1cwINftsYEQbjGF87Yok2ID76AW1C2XJQ5A5ce8hJv_Cejlsk7VHCiouh1swYdO9MMcY9vUdvONNSj1z2v-xcZLQnq1snNeUBHyNLJWL3JTPMAPWXURkzGetqkWpsyrga0r8dY-wCYTPYUBtGxL1-TsbkpEHntSPQMev8oDszInsM2qb5vi2f3k4H3ggiAn_MhhnVeD3vdhCbWVM-lOyDpbeQOEgZ3uBjo2ojE41aI2kh6E4Yv2-TfbxqFGiDrDgDUI23DmSNUPxwe1vcaSbBYAu__3T2fulfd9qSy5WkgO-IGY86z9BfR9ADiFyE7MimsCf5QPZ2FcdP4sBeEazM38ahulcA6qtJ7SYWhJsdC0jMYUW42byEOq1bHJ8MVvhR_nuNkw7IGZy2fxL0GE33CSdbNeITZNwVHzSTVisPUT7izqD4%3D "EARLY ACCESS to PRE-ORDER your 2025 membership card.")**

Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af44cd049c204423a4a114bea570e62f&_e=pWOUH7M6xQ6lUxE4CXh7SThctCgVXx0Pj7SAxW3ABIODmgUWtMkLyUeeqvFQh6hOeqqXWu85kI6YfykepbnhkA-2dqNBVvwz-uFRNpZ1id_cV-5e44XAI9NWiufvX8fuR4JXgJ37l7zvAzweZFOKV23y8kU2NyFBUc5KFyqz9f0P915hwS1e9r9lEyJQDXGYpiFmVtGbOj4tuMYxFpXFcPnErK44Lhg4R_XAyuvGlDQn4Y1ClPyS73iOcgZkGAJBp9GpCgkU5ZA1bPLVY6_UuZGVGiROTCaZHpws2jmzffoic3A52WbloumDo3iY3Ofdn0ezHo2Fixg4NKhSkJf-qvuKqs_d2msV3HgO1GAzUAeM2DTIIcE8zzNqjxZn2sTF). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government Is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Customers Are Raving About Their Solar Generator Joe B. "My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" Bob A. "Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" Carla U. "The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" Bernice L. "Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" Patricia T. "This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" Angel H. "Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name to become a grassroots co-sponsor of my Accountable Capitalism Act:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
When big corporations do well, their workers should do well, too.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2428%2E4032634%2E6gaYRx)
---
This shouldn’t be controversial: When big corporations do well, their workers should do well, too. When corporate profits and employee productivity go up over time, workers’ wages should go up over time, too. But that’s not the case right now. Something’s broken at the core of our economy — because even though workers are a major reason that corporate profits are soaring, their salaries are barely budging. You know who does reap the benefits of those soaring profits, though? Corporate executives and shareholders. Over the last 40 years, harmful trends have encouraged giant corporations to prioritize short-term gains for a small group of shareholders and CEOs over everyone else who’s got a stake in their decisions — including employees and customers. I’ve got a bill to fight back: the Accountable Capitalism Act, which I just reintroduced in the Senate this week. It would put more power in the hands of workers, and it would make sure America’s largest corporations pursue growth in a way that helps workers and consumers as well as shareholders. [**Add your name here to sign on as a grassroots co-sponsor of my Accountable Capitalism Act. And let’s fight side by side to make our economy work not just for wealthy CEOs and shareholders but for everyone.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prez-transition_copy/?source=EMZ24D_ENG_E_20241214_V1S1&t=8&akid=2428%2E4032634%2E6gaYRx) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prez-transition_copy/?source=EMZ24D_ENG_E_20241214_V1S1&t=9&akid=2428%2E4032634%2E6gaYRx)
---
Here’s how the legislation would work:
If a corporation has more than $1 billion in annual revenue, they’d need to get a federal charter.
And the corporation would then have to follow these practices:
* Company directors would need to consider the interests of _all_ corporate stakeholders, including employees and customers, along with shareholders.
* 75% of their shareholders and 75% of their Board of Directors would have to approve of any political spending. That way, political expenditures would have to benefit all corporate stakeholders.
* The corporation’s employees would select at least 40% of that company’s Board of Directors — giving workers a meaningful seat at the table when powerfully important decisions are made that will shape their future.
* Directors and officers of the corporation wouldn’t be allowed to sell company shares within five years of receiving them or within three years of a company stock buyback. This would make sure they’re focused on the long-term interests of all corporate stakeholders — not just their own short-term compensation.

You know, big corporations weren’t always so narrowly focused on shareholders.
For much of their history, American corporations tried to balance the interests of all of their stakeholders, including employees, customers, business partners, and shareholders.
But around the 1980s, corporations adopted the belief that their only legitimate and legal purpose was “maximizing shareholder value.” By 1997, the Business Roundtable declared that the “principal objective of a business enterprise is to generate economic returns to its owners.”
Now, let’s remember who those “owners” are. Around 93% of American-held corporate shares are owned by just 10% of our nation’s richest households, and 40% of Americans hold no shares at all.
So when corporate America commits to “maximizing shareholder return,” they commit to making the rich even richer, while leaving workers and families — the groups that these businesses rely on — behind.
It wasn’t always like this. And today’s status quo isn’t inevitable. We can make structural change through strong public policy.
The work ahead may feel like a long, uphill battle, but I’m going to fight like hell for this. I need to know if you’re on board to get this done, as we keep pushing to make our economy work for working people.
[**Add your name if you agree: We must hold giant companies responsible for decisions that hurt workers and consumers while lining shareholders’ pockets.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prez-transition_copy/?source=EMZ24D_ENG_E_20241214_V1S1&t=10&akid=2428%2E4032634%2E6gaYRx)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2862?t=14&akid=2428%2E4032634%2E6gaYRx)
---

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Speaking up on school choice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/speakingup?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Imagine a world in which the President of the United States could prevent you from reading a story about incriminating emails found on his son’s laptop?**

Actually, that’s what happened. When the _New York Post_ ran a story about Hunter Biden’s laptop, administration officials put pressure on media outlets to prevent you from reading it.

**Envision an America in which articles about the origins of Covid could be taken down by administration officials during the pandemic? **You don’t have to imagine. That’s literally what they did.

If you are appalled at the prospect of powerful politicians trying to suppress awkward opinions, I suspect you’d be concerned at any attempts by some in our state to restrict debate and discussion on certain topics, too.

**Unfortunately, some state officials seem to think they can bully organizations like MCPP in order to shut down what we say.** This seems to be the case with school choice, an issue on which every conservative ought to agree. Some evidently don’t agree and are mad at us for promoting change.

MCPP is 100 percent committed to parental choice as the only certain way to raise standards and counter left- wing values in the classroom. We relish the opportunity to listen those with different ideas and engage with those that have a different viewpoint.

**Anyone is free to disagree with us. But no one that disagrees with our stance should ever try to shut down our advocacy the way Biden’s gang shut down the Hunter laptop story. **

Here’s why we won’t be cowed:

1. **It’s a question of credibility:** MCPP is a conservative think tank. That means we’re cheerleaders for conservative policies, but not for any politicians.

To be sure, we probably agree 90 percent of the time with most elected state-wide officials. But when we disagree, we won’t hide the fact. Instead, we will do so openly, honestly and dispassionately (maybe even using a little humor from time to time ....)

**A think tank that shied away from asking state leaders questions that they’d rather not answer wouldn’t be worth a dime.** Why would anyone take such an organization seriously?

1. **You are the media:** Biden’s gang, like politicians down the ages, tried to bully media organizations into ignoring inconvenient stories. That tactics doesn’t work anymore since Musk set social media free.

Each week, MCPP reaches tens of thousands of folk across our state. We do so with published articles and media appearances. **But the single biggest way we reach people is directly, the way I’m connecting with you now.**

Our email list has tens of thousands of subscribers, and a phenomenal open rate. This Wednesday, I uploaded a short video in the morning. By lunchtime it had been viewed 48,000 times. As of now, it’s been seen over 130,000 times – a high percentage in Mississippi. Thanks to Elon Musk’s X, we reach several million people every month, again many in Mississippi.

**Unless anyone has the power to shut down our social media operation, we are going to keep going. **

1. **School Choice is right:** The most important reason we’re going to keep advocating for school choice is because its right. School choice is, as President Trump has said, the civil rights issue of our time.

It's more than about school standards. The case for giving families control over their child’s share of tax dollars is moral. MCPP has outlined a three-step strategy to achieve universal school choice in our state. We are surrounded on three sides by conservative led states that have adopted school choice.

People are free to disagree with us. **So, too, are state-wide officials who can vote against school choice or kill it in committee (like some did with the ballot initiative, and anti DEI legislation and much more besides). **

**But equally organizations like MCPP are free to explain to the public who is supporting school choice and who is trying to kill it. **We won’t be cowed.

Of course, what made the story about Hunter Biden’s laptop so explosive was not what was on the laptop. It was the realization as to what some were prepared to do to suppress stories they didn’t like. Nothing perhaps could be more ruinous the reputation of any politician.

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6720722a23&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6156bb0fdc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=6156bb0fdc).

clean_body: Game time | Hi Peter, As we approach the holidays, I want to take a moment to express how grateful I am for you. Your support has made all the difference this year. Whether it’s standing up for working families, protecting our progress, or building a better future for Pennsylvania, none of it would be possible without you. But before we get too comfortable, I need to be honest with you: now is the time to double down. Once the new year starts, it’s game time. There won’t be any breaks, pauses, or second chances. We’ll be up against those who want to dismantle our progress and roll back the rights we’ve fought so hard to protect. That’s why the work we do now is so critical to setting the tone for the battles ahead. We need to strengthen our grassroots movement, connect with voters, and prepare for what’s coming in 2025 and beyond. There’s no time to waste. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for being part of this fight. body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, We recently reached out asking for your signature on our letter for President Trump, but we have NOT seen your name come through! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f5e4aa2dfad4821cb6d8b35a1815ea35a51a2eeee11ba74732bf8a14077ddf3b5ff1a1fc4c674fdd208e97cef05927cbb51f75763211759ebd1b5d9007f12d9e As one of the TOP Trump supporters on our file we wanted to follow-up and bump our message so you don’t miss out on this exclusive opportunity: https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f5e4aa2dfad4821cb6d8b35a1815ea35a51a2eeee11ba74732bf8a14077ddf3b5ff1a1fc4c674fdd208e97cef05927cbb51f75763211759ebd1b5d9007f12d9e >" alias="READ THE FULL LETTER & SIGN NOW >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">READ THE FULL LETTER & SIGN NOW >> ---------- Forwarded message --------- To: < https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f5e4aa2dfad4821cb6d8b35a1815ea35a51a2eeee11ba74732bf8a14077ddf3b5ff1a1fc4c674fdd208e97cef05927cbb51f75763211759ebd1b5d9007f12d9e dpwillis67@gmail.com > Date: Tue, Dec 10, 2024 at 8:47 PM Subject: TO: President Trump Hey there – Now that the election is behind us, we are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP. You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f5e4aa2dfad4821cb6d8b35a1815ea35a51a2eeee11ba74732bf8a14077ddf3b5ff1a1fc4c674fdd208e97cef05927cbb51f75763211759ebd1b5d9007f12d9e So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Sincerely, https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f5e4aa2dfad4821cb6d8b35a1815ea35a51a2eeee11ba74732bf8a14077ddf3b5ff1a1fc4c674fdd208e97cef05927cbb51f75763211759ebd1b5d9007f12d9e X_________________ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f5e4aa2dfad4821cb6d8b35a1815ea35a51a2eeee11ba74732bf8a14077ddf3b5ff1a1fc4c674fdd208e97cef05927cbb51f75763211759ebd1b5d9007f12d9e >" alias="SIGN THE LETTER >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">SIGN THE LETTER >> Thank you, Team Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@updates.marshablackburn.com "info@updates.marshablackburn.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? body:

We’ll be blunt.

In one month, Donald Trump will be sworn in as our 47th president.

We know you probably feel tired, sad, and angry about another Trump presidency.

And so do we.

But too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines: Our health care, our reproductive rights, Social Security and Medicare – even our very Democracy!

This is a moment that will require a UNITED Democratic Party, which is why we’re reaching out to you. For every dollar you give, our top Democratic donors have agreed to donate 5 dollars more. That means a $10 donation would have a $60 impact. And a $100 donation would have a $600 impact. Please, their offer expires at midnight – can we count on you to chip in $15 or whatever you can spare? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2024?amount=15]

Because of your support in 2024, you helped us:

FLIP 9 Republican seats from Red to Blue.

RE-ELECT 98% of our House Democrats.

GAIN seats in the House – against all odds.

And your $15 today will help us do the same in the midterms to hold Trump and Republicans accountable for their vile Project 2025 agenda.

So we’re asking one more time if you’ll STEP UP, help Democrats UNITE against Trumpism and every House Republican pushing it, and rush a 500% MATCHED $15 before this offer expires. We spent down nearly all of our funds to keep the House razor-thin in this election. name: Holiday Team @ USO
subject: Imagine the holidays without family or a warm meal
body:
You make all these things possible for service members this season:
[](https://www.uso.org)
[DISCOVER YOUR IMPACT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JWedKEBb~/TmMwK0NIYW41T1Z3K2t5TDZKdFFmYUFJSFd4c1ZRZ1Fqb1NINnRJbkpvYUNIc3BvbURWakFWMzJ1TzNRR2ZZWHVhNWFUK2cyaW50UzRCdzhVV3Rqamw1Ull6VUNKcHBnMEpyd3N6azBRclE9S0/b0pza01RQ0wwVTJRTndIa1VUMjBPTnk5SUlmOHpuWkNJZXBNU2wrUG5yV2JWbi9jSTdZR0JCbitSZUxkMTlsNENxM3VLQWtMSElzWHBEL1VvYjlSRE9Xb3hEcjF0bGFHS0)
[**See how we help our service
members celebrate the holidays
with your support! **](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-0~AKFX/TmMwK0NIYW41T1Z3K2t5TDZKdFFmYUFJSFd4c1ZRZ1Fqb1NINnRJbkpvYUNIc3BvbURWakFWMzJ1TzNRR2ZZWHVhNWFUK2cyaW50UzRCdzhVV3Rqamw1Ull6VUNKcHBnMEpyd3N6azBRclE9S0/b0pza01RQ0wwVTJRTndIa1VUMjBPTnk5SUlmOHpuWkNJZXBNU2wrUG5yV2JWbi9jSTdZR0JCbitSZUxkMTlsNENxM3VLQWtMSElzWHBEL1VvYjlSRE9Xb3hEcjF0bGFHS0)
| | [DISCOVER YOUR HOLIDAY IMPACT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
Many of our brave service members have to spend the holidays far away from home and loved ones. But thanks to the USO and the generosity of this community of military supporters, none of these heroes ever have to celebrate alone.
From organizing festive holiday celebrations to hand-delivering Holiday Care Packages, the USO is always there for our service members wherever they are in the world to help them feel the spirit of the season.
**But spreading all this holiday cheer to our service members wouldn 't be possible without military supporters like YOU. That's why we'd like to invite you to take a moment to learn more about the holiday impact we make together:**

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

clean_body: The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. And we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

| | Fellow Patriot, Donald Trump and the Republicans have won a huge victory...and I don’t want to spoil the joy of victory, but I have to warn you that NOW is the time to FIX our BROKEN election system.If we don’t, we’ll likely never see this kind of victory again... You see Joe Biden and the radical Democrats LURED hordes of illegals into the country by offering **FREE** shelter, **FREE** healthcare, **FREE** food, and even **FREE** Pre-Paid Debit cards.And they did it **_to win elections by giving illegals a pathway to vote_**. And don’t think for a moment that just because we won this past election that they've thrown in the towel.This is **_STILL_** their long-term scheme to win dominant power for a generation. And it can still happen if you and I don’t stop it.**We are working with Congress to push emergency legislation to stop this scheme dead in its tracks..._before it’s too late._**
---
_**_Can I count on you to_** __**_help?_**_
---

I want to stop illegals from voting**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=8b8bdf99d4e340ac9c63e5b135105e88&_e=-Z-EkAcFyIuny5GmER7jiQoygwjN_BC-P2hM57Jv7oTwP0aPF264ZreqTvVraDfnr0lE6RkAR58tz6HAdBcIdwbPViU3tPalDGlOgFRlJHXywo3jkUdO_B7cheI8g5vWlE1mjEGywFfyJkJzCTPumO8og9l8fQrf9r2KXvRVMFY_gP-GH1t33SQdS_efF6S9EJwsqM4ZRbia97bG7gSqfrzCxNk-quN9SqmRLeRXP6i5_6__wuHBE7hQrA_itHxzY8ebPPYEwdfNNPHoEnTMvTHhSdkWJyrZoga8ka15LsQ24kgjPBK6Nl_jlnAf_Q1ZNBXMH4uRsf2W3Ejh6Y0TDE9PTBAUeDiQ3BaiOJTouTGcFTc0MBeJkTi9Hahwws9blAHmn_pEeZpkaqZyb8ACETiorhLEiT0kJ-MU9GAG-EM%3D)

| | Remember the Biden Administration has allowed 20 million illegal immigrants to enter the United States – **and now radical Democrats are scheming in Washington and the states to give all of them a pathway to vote in our elections.** And this scheme WOULD HAVE worked this year if the Democrats hadn’t faced a huge uphill battle.A faltering economy, huge conservative turnout, an incompetent nominee followed by ANOTHER incompetent nominee, the downfall of the mainstream media... All of these fell right into place to make this election Too Big to Rig. But my friend, we can’t count on Democrat incompetence every election cycle.They will be back with a vengeance, and this time they will lie and cheat and steal harder and smarter.**They’ve already laid the groundwork with the plan to let illegal aliens vote.**** ** **And they are going to fight tooth and nail against the deportation plans President Trump has laid out.** That’s why if we want to stand a chance in 2026, 2028, and beyond, this despicable Democrat scheme must be stopped now! **[**If you agree illegals MUST NEVER be allowed to vote in our elections, I need you to make a special contribution of $25 to stop illegals from voting.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=8b8bdf99d4e340ac9c63e5b135105e88&_e=-Z-EkAcFyIuny5GmER7jiQoygwjN_BC-P2hM57Jv7oTwP0aPF264ZreqTvVraDfnr0lE6RkAR58tz6HAdBcIdwbPViU3tPalDGlOgFRlJHXywo3jkUdO_B7cheI8g5vWlE1mjEGywFfyJkJzCTPumO8og9l8fQrf9r2KXvRVMFY_gP-GH1t33SQdS_efF6S9EJwsqM4ZRbia97bG7gSqfrzCxNk-quN9SqmRLeRXP6i5_6__wuHBE7hQrA_itHxzY8ebPPYEwdfNNPHoEnTMvc4hmQWqcqIuVM2urlgLK7t-gyGljnTUpk13GDismy2G35dCeiFD7z0xr3-cWynQIMU8U5dN5_fCVO7AP-J0vWcFA79Mqh-9P2RESLAgtk3H2RS8pvs5j1uxaX8i5AO_5eisgRR8a7Ox-UfrkP4udSU%3D)** Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. **Civil asset forfeiture** is a controversial legal process that allows law enforcement agencies to seize property suspected of being connected to criminal activity, even if the property owner has not been charged or convicted of a crime. While initially designed as a tool to combat organized crime, drug trafficking, and terrorism, civil asset forfeiture has faced increasing criticism for its potential for abuse and its violation of fundamental principles of justice. Here are several reasons why civil asset forfeiture laws are considered bad.
### **1\. Property Seized Without Criminal Conviction**
One of the most significant problems of civil asset forfeiture is that property can be seized without the property owner being convicted of a crime. In many cases, the owner is not even charged. Law enforcement agencies only need to suspect that the property, such as cash, cars, or even homes, was involved in illegal activity. This means that an individual can lose their property based on suspicion alone, without the due process of a criminal trial.
In criminal law, individuals are considered innocent until proven guilty. However, in civil asset forfeiture cases, the property itself is treated as the defendant, and the burden of proof is shifted to the property owner to demonstrate that the assets were not connected to illegal activity. This reversal of the presumption of innocence undermines fundamental legal protections.
### **2\. Disproportionate Impact on Innocent People**
Civil asset forfeiture laws often harm innocent individuals who have not committed any crime. For example, a person carrying a large amount of cash for legitimate purposes, such as a down payment on a car or house, could have their money seized by law enforcement on the suspicion that it is tied to illegal activities like drug trafficking. Even if the individual can later prove that the money was legally earned, they may face lengthy and expensive legal battles to get it back.
Because legal representation is not guaranteed in forfeiture cases, many people cannot afford to hire an attorney to fight for the return of their property. This can lead to a situation where innocent people lose their assets simply because they cannot navigate the complex legal process required to recover them.
### **3\. Incentivizes Profit Over Justice**
Civil asset forfeiture laws create a significant financial incentive for law enforcement agencies to seize property, as the proceeds from forfeited assets often go directly into the budgets of the seizing agencies. This creates a conflict of interest, where law enforcement may prioritize seizing assets to fund their operations rather than focusing on enforcing the law impartially.
In some cases, this has led to widespread abuses, where law enforcement targets individuals and property not because of a clear link to criminal activity, but because of the financial gain that comes with the seizure. These incentives can distort law enforcement priorities and undermine trust in the justice system.
### **4\. Lack of Accountability and Oversight**
Another major issue with civil asset forfeiture is the lack of transparency and oversight in how seizures are carried out and how forfeited assets are used. In many states, there is little or no requirement for law enforcement agencies to report how much property they seize or how the proceeds are spent. This lack of accountability allows potential abuses to go unchecked, with little recourse for affected individuals.
Additionally, because the process is a civil matter, it operates outside of the stricter safeguards that exist in the criminal justice system. Property owners facing civil forfeiture do not have the same rights and protections as they would in a criminal case, which further exacerbates the risk of abuse.
### **5\. Erosion of Public Trust**
Civil asset forfeiture laws undermine public confidence in the fairness and integrity of the justice system. When people see law enforcement agencies seizing property without clear evidence of wrongdoing and profiting from the seizures, it can erode trust in the system's impartiality. This is especially true in communities that are disproportionately affected by forfeiture practices, such as low-income areas or communities of color.
Restoring trust in law enforcement requires fair, transparent, and accountable practices. Civil asset forfeiture, as it currently exists, often runs counter to these principles, fostering mistrust rather than collaboration between the public and law enforcement.
### **Conclusion**
Civil asset forfeiture laws, while intended to combat crime, have serious flaws that make them ripe for abuse and harmful to innocent individuals. The ability to seize property without a criminal conviction, the financial incentives for law enforcement, the lack of oversight, and the disproportionate impact on vulnerable populations all contribute to the growing call for reform. To uphold justice and protect citizens' rights, it is essential to reevaluate and restrict civil asset forfeiture practices, ensuring that property cannot be taken without due process and a fair trial.

clean_body: They can take your stuff even if you are innocent. Restoring trust in law enforcement requires fair, transparent, and accountable practices. Civil asset forfeiture, as it currently exists, often runs counter to these principles, | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? from the desk ofDana Criswell They can take your stuff even if you are innocent | | | Dec 14 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Photo by on Civil asset forfeiture is a controversial legal process that allows law enforcement agencies to seize property suspected of being connected to criminal activity, even if the property owner has not been charged or convicted of a crime. While initially designed as a tool to combat organized crime, drug trafficking, and terrorism, civil asset forfeiture has faced increasing criticism for its potential for abuse and its violation of fundamental principles of justice. Here are several reasons why civil asset forfeiture laws are considered bad. 1\. Property Seized Without Criminal Conviction One of the most significant problems of civil asset forfeiture is that property can be seized without the property owner being convicted of a crime. In many cases, the owner is not even charged. Law enforcement agencies only need to suspect that the property, such as cash, cars, or even homes, was involved in illegal activity. This means that an individual can lose their property based on suspicion alone, without the due process of a criminal trial. In criminal law, individuals are considered innocent until proven guilty. However, in civil asset forfeiture cases, the property itself is treated as the defendant, and the burden of proof is shifted to the property owner to demonstrate that the assets were not connected to illegal activity. This reversal of the presumption of innocence undermines fundamental legal protections. 2\. Disproportionate Impact on Innocent People Civil asset forfeiture laws often harm innocent individuals who have not committed any crime. For example, a person carrying a large amount of cash for legitimate purposes, such as a down payment on a car or house, could have their money seized by law enforcement on the suspicion that it is tied to illegal activities like drug trafficking. Even if the individual can later prove that the money was legally earned, they may face lengthy and expensive legal battles to get it back. Because legal representation is not guaranteed in forfeiture cases, many people cannot afford to hire an attorney to fight for the return of their property. This can lead to a situation where innocent people lose their assets simply because they cannot navigate the complex legal process required to recover them. 3\. Incentivizes Profit Over Justice Civil asset forfeiture laws create a significant financial incentive for law enforcement agencies to seize property, as the proceeds from forfeited assets often go directly into the budgets of the seizing agencies. This creates a conflict of interest, where law enforcement may prioritize seizing assets to fund their operations rather than focusing on enforcing the law impartially. In some cases, this has led to widespread abuses, where law enforcement targets individuals and property not because of a clear link to criminal activity, but because of the financial gain that comes with the seizure. These incentives can distort law enforcement priorities and undermine trust in the justice system. 4\. Lack of Accountability and Oversight Another major issue with civil asset forfeiture is the lack of transparency and oversight in how seizures are carried out and how forfeited assets are used. In many states, there is little or no requirement for law enforcement agencies to report how much property they seize or how the proceeds are spent. This lack of accountability allows potential abuses to go unchecked, with little recourse for affected individuals. Additionally, because the process is a civil matter, it operates outside of the stricter safeguards that exist in the criminal justice system. Property owners facing civil forfeiture do not have the same rights and protections as they would in a criminal case, which further exacerbates the risk of abuse. 5\. Erosion of Public Trust Civil asset forfeiture laws undermine public confidence in the fairness and integrity of the justice system. When people see law enforcement agencies seizing property without clear evidence of wrongdoing and profiting from the seizures, it can erode trust in the system's impartiality. This is especially true in communities that are disproportionately affected by forfeiture practices, such as low-income areas or communities of color. Restoring trust in law enforcement requires fair, transparent, and accountable practices. Civil asset forfeiture, as it currently exists, often runs counter to these principles, fostering mistrust rather than collaboration between the public and law enforcement. Conclusion Civil asset forfeiture laws, while intended to combat crime, have serious flaws that make them ripe for abuse and harmful to innocent individuals. The ability to seize property without a criminal conviction, the financial incentives for law enforcement, the lack of oversight, and the disproportionate impact on vulnerable populations all contribute to the growing call for reform. To uphold justice and protect citizens' rights, it is essential to reevaluate and restrict civil asset forfeiture practices, ensuring that property cannot be taken without due process and a fair trial. FROM REVOLUTION TO REPUBLIC

The Cottage Meetings for TEENS!!!

Tuesdays starting January 28, 2025

11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET

Just in time to introduce our BRAND-NEW, HIGH SCHOOL CREDIT EARNING CURRICULUM, veteran Cottage Meeting Hostess Tami Hirsch is
presenting Moms for America’s classic Cottage Meetings but for TEENS! Based on Kimberly Fletcher’s original, foundational program,
Revolution to Republic is an interdisciplinary course that, using American history and classic literature, will explore the
overarching theme of freedom and liberty and why principles of representative government, individual rights, and religious
freedom, the foundational values of the United States expressed in the Declaration of Independence and the United States
Constitution, are worthy of protection and propagation. This is one series that you and your family won't want to miss!

curriculum...and they actually prove it. This district gives parents choices in education, embraces the marketplace, and has become

clean_body: Register for a LIVE webinar and watch Kitchen Table Lobby from the archives! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] [] We hope you enjoy your holiday season... take some time to enjoy a live or archived webinar this month and register for all the excitement in JANUARY! [] [] RAISING SERVANT LEADERS Monday, January 13, 2025 9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET Have you ever wondered how to infuse your homeschooling with intention and purpose? There's no better time than January to tackle this so join Homeschool Mom2Mom host, Liz Ackerman, as she welcomes Audrey Rindlisbacher, the Mission-Driven Mom, to find the answers you're looking for! Get your new year off to the best start! Register - RAISING SERVANT LEADERS [] [] [] YOU Can Be a Cottage Meetings Hostess! Here's Why You Should Tuesday, January 14, 2025 11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET Ever wonder why, how, and if YOU should be a Cottage Meetings Hostess? In this webinar, a panel of new and seasoned hostesses will share their whys, their experiences, and how it has impacted their lives and how it could impact yours as well! Be prepared to be inspired and to TAKE ACTION! Register - COTTAGE MEETINGS HOSTESS [] [] [] FROM REVOLUTION TO REPUBLIC The Cottage Meetings for TEENS!!! Tuesdays starting January 28, 2025 11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET Just in time to introduce our BRAND-NEW, HIGH SCHOOL CREDIT EARNING CURRICULUM, veteran Cottage Meeting Hostess Tami Hirsch is presenting Moms for America’s classic Cottage Meetings but for TEENS! Based on Kimberly Fletcher’s original, foundational program, Revolution to Republic is an interdisciplinary course that, using American history and classic literature, will explore the overarching theme of freedom and liberty and why principles of representative government, individual rights, and religious freedom, the foundational values of the United States expressed in the Declaration of Independence and the United States Constitution, are worthy of protection and propagation. This is one series that you and your family won't want to miss! Register - COTTAGE MEETINGS FOR TEENS [] [] [] SUCCESS = When Children's Academics, Health, and Safety Matter Most December 19, 2024 4pmPT/ 5pmMT/ 6pmCT/ 7pmET The Cobb County School District in the suburbs of Atlanta, Georgia has been at the center of social debate for almost 10 years. As one of the largest school districts in the country, they believe their job is to protect students from sexually explicit curriculum...and they actually prove it. This district gives parents choices in education, embraces the marketplace, and has become one of the highest achieving districts in the country. This district has been in the news and is a hero to the students, parents, and community they serve. Listen and learn how this is being done. Register - SUCCESS [] From our webinar archives... Kitchen Table Lobby with Rebekah Ricks Think highly paid lobbyists are the only ones who can have an in with our elected representatives? Think again! You can develop a relationship of trust with local, state, and national leaders, all from the warm and cozy comfort of your kitchen table. With the new elected slate of representatives coming in at multiple levels, now is the time to take this kind of action! [] [] Watch KITCHEN TABLE LOBBY [] BOOKMARK THIS PAGE! 👇👇👇👇👇 [] [] LIKE WHAT WE DO? Your tax-deductible gift to Moms for America® will help support us in our mission to Empower Moms, Promote Liberty, and Raise Patriots! DONATE TODAY [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2024 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Reserve your 2025 Member Card today!
body:
---
Derek, did you see our message about our Official 2025 Democratic Member Cards? **We want your input on which design we should move forward.** Pick your favorite today, and the design with the most votes will be sent straight to the printer! **[SELECT DESIGN NOW](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&t=1&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3)** After you vote on the design you like best, don’t forget to chip in $3 to [**reserve your Official 2025 Democratic Member Card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&refcode2=2399_22930333_c8hIR3&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3) Thank you, The Democrats
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **The Democratic Party** <feedback@act.democrats.org>
Date: Tue, Dec 10, 2024
Subject: We want to hear your thoughts:
Derek, as a dedicated DNC supporter, we wanted to make sure you saw this: **We’re gearing up to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but first, we need your input on which design to use.** [**So we’re asking: Can you take a few seconds to tell us which member card design is your favorite? The sooner we hear from you, the sooner we’ll be able to get the winning design ready to print and ship.**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&t=2&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&t=3&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&t=4&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&t=5&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&t=6&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3)
Democrats all over the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into 2025 as a reminder of the work we can — and will — accomplish together.
We will not follow Donald Trump and J.D. Vance down a path of darkness, chaos, and hate. But here’s what we will do:
We will elect Democratic leaders who will stop Trump’s destructive agenda. From school board members to city council members, state legislators, governors, and members of Congress — every Democrat we elect is an additional check on Trump, his administration, and his allies in Congress.
We will organize and mobilize on the ground, learn lessons from this past election, and continue our investments in state parties to prevail in upcoming watershed elections in 2025, like Virginia and New Jersey.
And we will bolster our infrastructure and technology to reach voters, listen to voters, and learn from voters.
You’re a key part of this team, and your input is critical to our work. That’s why we want to hear from you today: [**Can you be one of the first supporters to select your favorite member card design?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&t=7&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3)
Thanks for everything,
The Democrats
[**Don’t wait — after you cast your vote on your favorite member card design, make a $3 donation to reserve your card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&refcode2=2399_22930333_c8hIR3&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241214_2399_so&amount=3&refcode2=2399_22930333_c8hIR3&akid=2399%2E22930333%2Ec8hIR3)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

clean_body: Here are the best reasons to claim your spot on his Official Donor List. | | | | | | Looking for a reason to claim your spot on President-Elect Trump’s First Official Donor List? We’ll give you 5 of them! 1. Your $5 or $10 donation enters you to win a FREE TRIP to Trump’s Inauguration! 2. We hope to hand this list directly to President Trump. He might see your name! 3. Democrats are raising millions for recount fights. We need your help to beat them. 4. We only have 50 spots left for your area. You may never get this chance again. Thank you, Team Trump | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. All contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (i.e., without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are strictly prohibited. Contributions made in the name of, or refunded by, any other person are unlawful. | Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc., P.O. Box 509, Arlington, VA 22216. name: Christmas Special
subject: We're on a roll with this America First wrapping paper, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Secure yours before we run out! Only 1,000 in stock!

|
---
| | | **🎶Dashing through the halls
In a MAGA garbage truck
To the House we go
Wrappin' all the way
The gifts under the tree
Wrapped in MAGA paper
What fun it is to save the country
And make us all safer 🎵**

body:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6789ea82-988e-4754-9222-f0e5b7682365/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter – you’ve been selected to complete our CRITICAL survey about the House Ethics report on Matt Gaetz. Will you take a moment to submit your response in the next 5 minutes? SHOULD THE GAETZ REPORT BE RELEASED? [[YES] [NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ccfe00b-5f0e-4c94-97c4-fb3c876dc473/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Now that Gaetz has completely resigned from Congress and withdrew his nomination as Trump’s attorney general, his reputation is IN SHAMBLES. Because of Democrats like you, we’ve defended our democracy from one insurrectionist running our country before Trump has even taken office. But our work here is not done – we’re calling for the House Ethics Committee to release their report on Matt Gaetz, which is a VITAL part of our 2024 Post-Election Strategy. If you don’t act now, Republicans will continue to ram in judicial nominees who are election deniers and Project 2025 supporters. **Will you please** take just a few seconds to tell us if the Gaetz report should be released? SHOULD THE GAETZ REPORT BE RELEASED? [[YES] [NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td95dca7f-c9a1-4d01-a725-e3b669140847/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69f57dc8-8d78-4fe6-af8c-495db7adf4fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:
In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.
And we need you to join us.

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c4d3ae6ee6f24713ba47a43331d818e5&_e=-1L8nTCXx6Ewf5wRJQg3SFgMtYyuA02_Fg9AOyUNjZbOFg0QcoYlKxv76yUO63KxcMk1BbewNT4wHNxZIAmZc6TUPQzzNhi9bWOH9uA3-JwJhLhrzAi6v2Y5bmyfx1HNrFhZ19RAZa4X5Avwvw71RrTnPnSUk-0vMxcfu1GUk8TWwtNyHhfwI6qXWNBHvycFb7LKbJA8_9Rpi8IuEACn3ESH9-KR2R2OOvgBKPTpo1RsF9w_ezP-fT9MwY-BgIAlX5cCTNsB5H07TnyqCr4UhZMIcYM6ZCx8vXYIAsC-l7piBmc73kGG2SrT5kpudHKndXGNed_ea9_rmg5Pk6l6Pwq5AS66308I_mnAIJUc-GvqXRkIwoQpdW6_CqF0Xbo3)

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c4d3ae6ee6f24713ba47a43331d818e5&_e=-1L8nTCXx6Ewf5wRJQg3SFgMtYyuA02_Fg9AOyUNjZbOFg0QcoYlKxv76yUO63KxcMk1BbewNT4wHNxZIAmZc6TUPQzzNhi9bWOH9uA3-JwJhLhrzAi6v2Y5bmyfx1HNrFhZ19RAZa4X5Avwvw71RrTnPnSUk-0vMxcfu1GUk8TWwtNyHhfwI6qXWNBHvycFb7LKbJA8_9Rpi8IuEACn3ESH9-KR2R2OOvgBKPTpo1T8e_ehM0_ehHrtdj2tM2JenRkgqhIvNVo6uHo4wC_rYVxt7vtvdyp8K2fxSJrzKH0yfWRjhdlHrSjrF8L-PGXVyhDOnNfnTK7BLKuMmi1TGRbPCyGHySFM5S4kW_QnMDp8IplWG98rbUVQ32i_likL)
---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
