clean_body: In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. And we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Peter In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: 2025 is a critical year
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWuKCGFWgN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWuKCGFWgN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are
expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through
Education in 2025.

Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life-not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech-will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government,
including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you-citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and
expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education.

We must do all that we possibly can.

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to …

Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with Imprimis, our monthly digest of liberty. With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of Imprimis to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses. Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
Restore excellence to American K-12 education. Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

With your help, we will succeed-because we must succeed for our country!

Hillsdale College conducts its educational outreach efforts-as it does all its work-while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between $25 and $100. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000 donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the December 31 deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our $6,000,000 online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Today marks 12 years since the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This unfathomable loss is one that we will never, ever forget
#

Friends -
Today marks 12 years since the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut.
On this devastating day, 20 innocent children’s lives were stolen—all of them just six or seven years old. Six school staff members went to work that morning and never returned home.
I wanted to take a moment today to ask you to join me in keeping the families impacted by the tragedy in your hearts. This day is particularly harrowing for these families this year because in 2024, every child who was killed would have been at least 18 years old.
I’ll never forget when Mark and I traveled to Newtown shortly after the tragedy to spend time with grieving families.
We gathered in a living room filled with parents of some of the children killed in their classrooms, as well as family members of some of the school staff members who lost their lives. After talking to every family there that day and tearing up at every picture of the innocent victims, I remember walking to a chair in the corner, collapsing into it and saying, "Enough."
A few short weeks later, we launched our gun violence prevention organization, then known as Americans for Responsible Solutions. Back then, I could never have guessed that we would have built a coalition of millions of people—just like you—committed to our mission to save lives from gun violence.
In the 12 years since the Sandy Hook tragedy, I can tell you confidently that the work we’ve done has changed hearts, minds, and laws.
Make no mistake: the fight isn’t over yet, and the headwinds we are about to face will be stiff. But if we all keep working together, I know that someday, there will be a future where we no longer live under the constant threat of gun violence.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**Please consider making a contribution of $5, $10 or anything you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC today. Especially today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in. That’s how we’ll create the change we need on gun safety. Together.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241214-1-b&t=1&akid=9625%2E3935704%2EYwocZg)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=9625%2E3935704%2EYwocZg) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: might as well throw in the towel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress

But here’s the catch: this takes time, and it sure as hell takes money – a lot of it. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: At the heart of this movement is a simple but powerful ideal:
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241214-1152-foote&t=1001&akid=1152%2E342411%2EiQo-XO ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

At the heart of this movement is a simple but powerful ideal: Anyone who
is committed to building a more equitable and just world is a part of the
Squad.

That’s you, Peter!
You're an essential part of this movement, and we’re so grateful to have
you with us as we continue our critical work in Congress.

Since the election, we’ve seen a bit of a slowdown in our fundraising
— but we know that with you on our side we can turn this around. That’s
why we’ve set a goal to reach $25,000 by our mid-month fundraising
check-in tomorrow.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241214-movement.wDoGjl&refcode=em20241214-1152&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1152%2E342411%2EiQo-XO ]We’ve still got to raise $7,113 before time runs
out[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241214-movement.wDoGjl&refcode=em20241214-1152&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1152%2E342411%2EiQo-XO ], Peter.
Can we count on you to chip in right now?

Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and Alexandria are all counting on us. The
far-right MAGA agenda is gearing up to attack the rights and values we
hold dear. To fight back, we need the resources to push against the chaos
and ensure our voices are heard.

Every member of the Squad rejects corporate PAC donations, which is why
we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us stay strong.
Your donation will help us reach voters and grow our movement as we work
toward a more just future.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241214-movement.wDoGjl&refcode=em20241214-1152&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1152%2E342411%2EiQo-XO ]None of this is possible without you. If you’re in a place to do so,
will you chip in to help us reach our December mid-month goal before
midnight tomorrow?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241214-movement.wDoGjl&refcode=em20241214-1152&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1152%2E342411%2EiQo-XO ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1152%2E342411%2EiQo-XO

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

America's violent health system, when that health system denies life saving care, debunking every myth against universal healthcare, where is our corporate reckoning, and a health insurance corporation gets a woman charged with terrorism. Let's dive into this week's recap for _Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid_.
* * *
## Call to Action
* **WHAT?** [Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/6577976f-66e3-4e85-aea6-e70f2b7701e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* **WHY?** At a time of growing distrust in corporate media, Ground News brings critical transparency to news. The app and website help you spot sensationalism and media bias offering insights into each source's bias, reliability and ownership--so you can make informed decisions.
* **HOW?**[Click here to get 50% off the Vantage Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/6577976f-66e3-4e85-aea6-e70f2b7701e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

* * *
**Quick Note!** I am doing everything in my power over the next 4 years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-YXkQqqrY0UYt68lQfbLGVrptNXuPqWdh_hXG55_n6M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153033934)
## Posts This Week
* **Sunday:**[When Insurance Rejects Life Saving Care](https://substack.com/redirect/3a5cc664-0b18-4c8d-b231-b75b0c2d9b3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): A deeply personal story about our daughter, the power of resilience, and the desperate need for change
* **Monday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 149](https://substack.com/redirect/587b573d-53df-4916-ad1d-ff0bcb65e9f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): The killing of a CEO, why the country seems united around it, & the actual problems with Joe Biden's pardons
* **Tuesday:**[Debunking Every Myth You Hear Against Universal Healthcare](https://substack.com/redirect/d2f351dc-0010-4d90-b1ed-a32bdc0f1582?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Whether you are left or right, you want Universal Healthcare as a human right
* **Wednesday:** [Where Is Our Corporate Reckoning? ](https://substack.com/redirect/dd9a3c0d-46d9-4555-9427-6e83dfd70baf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)If we agree murder is wrong, and it is, then why do we tolerate corporate policies that kill Americans?
* **Thursday:[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/8020cac7-d76a-44a9-b1fb-21a67bfeadac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Interview with ](https://substack.com/redirect/8020cac7-d76a-44a9-b1fb-21a67bfeadac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[THE LEFT HOOK with Wajahat Ali](https://open.substack.com/users/5345375-the-left-hook-with-wajahat-ali?utm_source=mentions) on Universal Healthcare: Wajahat and I share stories of our daughters surviving life threatening illness while overcoming the crucible of obstacles from insurance corporations
* **Friday:**[Florida Woman Charged With Terrorism](https://substack.com/redirect/2846b3a2-1fe1-4a97-898a-3e18bc490998?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Briana Boston has been charged with terrorism for repeating back to BCBS their own policy strategy. Why?

## **Dad Joke of the Week**
I dreamt I was drowning in an ocean of orange soda. Guess it was my Fanta Sea.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We need your help to reach voters year-round
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re coming up on our December mid-month deadline, and we’ve been taking a look at our donation records.
#
It's already that time again, Derek.
We’re coming up on our December mid-month deadline, and we’ve been taking a look at our donation records. Here’s what we have for you:
**John Fetterman for PA** _Record for:_
dpwillis67@gmail.com _2024 donor:_
Not yet _Suggested donation:_
$5 **[Pitch in now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241214?amount=5&refcode=em20241214-9689&refcode2=9689_434096_MeBysl&akid=9689%2E434096%2EMeBysl)**
---
[**Our deadline is Monday night at 11:59 pm, and we have a goal of raising $6,000 before then. Will you pitch in $5 to help us get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241214?refcode=em20241214-9689&refcode2=9689_434096_MeBysl&akid=9689%2E434096%2EMeBysl)
Even right after an election, setting these goals (and reaching them!) helps us ensure that we have the resources to organize in every corner of PA and talk to as many voters as possible _year-round_.
With so much $$$ being spent to turn PA red, we need your help to fight back, Derek.
[**Pitch in $5 today to help us reach our $6,000 goal and CRUSH this December mid-month deadline:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241214?refcode=em20241214-9689&refcode2=9689_434096_MeBysl&akid=9689%2E434096%2EMeBysl)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMyu3BYAxwZYRqtRhEU2PIw4ECtcY6ITFoMX_0I-r0O-nyHVDQVtYcty1unleZszzOatBVZwmz9G6AWJo65e8ulBDQZX3T_fO73O8EI2n9sY2Svz_X3AftT2BW61yf4Vb-DhZP6VL7JJM6ZzveKw7Licw%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMyfAJjbRt9MhtD-4devH5mmMSpLR0qW9jQP5lxDMXu68iy8qJEcTkUzEyD2yW8A78Q2OjWs7i2wu2pG4iZFld4C1pQWylyi1EJkEHhcxr9BfcsHg-acnyj26jeQOwmDDPt-5MDeUYRPcDxrbCIiatrcw%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMySEoTpUYC4BHl5uKgbfE9MHc83hVi-T4s0QF_YFc_QRr-EPTGBtG83o0aEdWpJoOX3Q6vydqlah9EN2LVvnzyI-Qv5pWddBDfO1EATiTFNldlQeGEwGfKTkaA226PnXK_Tl3dXaoG5F5pdP7JJsCawA%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMy4qNV7TgrAj9d6wewBD3R5KCymzYAVRvCTZC9PC1wKCKEpe0b5RqRgmH8Lmhk1YKi2PfZ8OAe6fq7ZvkJWdEwDzMNBRFYB8lI9p_5vA0W_jvqtVNdqdZDcZdMjqAbCO-HdEXHsPdmELTB2EXXnZ3ucQ%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMyXdS8pC2GdV0yDHhFl5DBrKzBGxaxKUlltEdVqIatarT9S_b-igc2D5AyluO_mhG4Ivr_E1i_PXwlbb0pimVHtXwki01TVwiCJYnwhqhmJ0ILuUhFZ0sMUrNk72uSWZID_dfKz_Fl33B7364KuIERiQ%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMy5dcH3ER3BaC9Gh1P-arGllKpfL5-sJZYYpG3B8hZwEmNep-LLT5sdZuNzPlz3A36Vk5Vt8-kjgp5v8gtk7611_TRmweKzBEEJjNR97xGvMVG-x1xs37Op5zR3ZJxlzLwwEfveC8Y6VX8i1Ap9hqpyg%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMyqx6xVRT8Cry7I9DGb9U9ApTIFUDZ21LwWfyOxvOeW_T5b09Ji1mOxzP_lesB6Cz4PrUYJZjyEhnzww5_rSAU1g90ostivTHyhoLSzPfWHwaQ_iRUF3_skeqIJmf3sSr3gm5-T3ElnlRX43NQEzSmIg%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMyvOtnZO7djmpz4nMeA9xR-gJvzTxlBiIlVzCN3X25f_bfPsDl9QFdbEn9VVkeqNl94gHPnjDR67F9pc4UrMThGhwOnaQIriz9o9M-Dwgy2avw9Pk_W-pA0o9ro7Mkp9RDxuQOq_xQzBdFcbBRXL-guQ%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMye9vv7eMHbL-FaZG4HdQIFpu_ARH-1IKpQuvYIjHsSV9tdtuOfsIKvecWAt1Uob0QGWkhwgIfMBCc83mO62qJqqybgLDEjN_OyMc9x5lnwYNwkpJGM1H6gPM4y0_LdrJKdi6hTG7Ap3VMESVDX4CkZw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines

| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72a32649480c48d48399588e02170e80&_e=z6oQC8ec38Y3qfTkULmtF3M87_OBKK0EC779w44n86m6rZfdgKrh5pHt_iTXAZn-asbnXXb5OEho-ZJxDydIufXLfnmwRK2cwPlnpD85Q0Xh1Kvw0kAxPpBAqkc571DjycuHysqHhOtBAHGFP4Ts5z-FeKotCQJMtqoHOCNv9yp6E1XL-ewWD63x-1YVi09_aX9vcNprWLTOLnAAKMLOQ9L7cO7SdmrOnBJWbfxvSgQcLRzmQTS172OV9SehxUMy2J_-fJU3lWIFd2HyjhdhbA9MhLw8tb2qCqEOOjCAIqXBFQ5DiLeYpt7TrNvxUfG4_VTcgDu9semMM6BCXsQPBDdDm-mwHDX5DWQe7HKyogYEAdxAia-WzJsHaFDRkRjhCzzaYCShmDQ-Pc3GmBI0Sw%3D%3D)** God made man and God made woman. clean_body: There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

The Tide is Turning in America
[IT’S ONLY THE BEGINNING](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fought_for_12_14_24_rnd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
The tide is turning in America. Can you feel it?
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ignited a movement—a sea change—demanding truth, transparency, and accountability in every corner of Washington.
Despite relentless opposition, RFK Jr. stood firm, exposing corruption in our regulatory agencies and challenging the status quo to protect our health and freedoms.
**And through it all,_you stood with him_.**
Now, the impact is undeniable.
Dr. Robert Califf, the outgoing FDA chief, has publicly echoed what RFK Jr. has been saying for years: America’s food system is broken. Harmful chemicals like Red No. 3, banned in other nations, are still being served to American families.
_But a sea change is only the beginning_. We have an opportunity right now to ensure this momentum turns into lasting action that promises safer food, cleaner water, and healthcare that puts YOU first.
[**We built this movement together, supported by your belief in what’s right. But there’s more work to be done.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fought_for_12_14_24_rnd1&n=6)
[Help Retire Kennedy Debt](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fought_for_12_14_24_rnd1&n=7)
The campaign debt we face now is a direct consequence of the hard-fought progress we’ve made.
Together, we can pay Kennedy’s private security debt before he is confirmed, allowing him to focus fully on transforming this movement into meaningful action for the American people.
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fought_for_12_14_24_rnd1&n=8)
[**Donate now to retire the debt >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fought_for_12_14_24_rnd1&n=9)

Scott Jennings **[sparked MASSIVE backlash](https://substack.com/redirect/a30a1299-93b4-4bc5-a149-4e156bb92c5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from his woke CNN colleagues when he said a simple fact... the WNBA is a total business failure.
"What do you mean Scott?!!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6f720222-be35-4867-a829-39471f4f7fec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
His comment was made amid WNBA player Caitlin Clarks viral Time magazine piece bringing attention to black female players who she says the league has been "built on."
"I want to say I've earned every single thing, but as a white person, there is privilege," Clark said. "A lot of those players in the league that have been really good have been Black players. This league has kind of been built on them. The more we can appreciate that, highlight that, talk about that, and then continue to have brands and companies invest in those players that have made this league incredible, I think it's very important."
**[Jennings questioned how proud these players should be](https://substack.com/redirect/6f720222-be35-4867-a829-39471f4f7fec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for "building" a failing business.
"What did they build? A league that loses money every year?" Jennings asked.
**[Watch CNN's reaction to his bold comment:](https://substack.com/redirect/6f720222-be35-4867-a829-39471f4f7fec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/6f720222-be35-4867-a829-39471f4f7fec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Whoopi says RFK Jr. is FAT SHAMING: "You don't know what you are doing!!"**
"The View" host Whoopi Goldberg **[went off on RFK Jr.](https://substack.com/redirect/105e2267-ee24-47f1-92ef-b4ae2d123d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for his plan to make America healthy again, saying that "this isn't just about food" and that sometimes "people are born genetically larger."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/105e2267-ee24-47f1-92ef-b4ae2d123d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
RFK Jr. has been very vocal about his plan to remove harmful food additives from the American diet. Trump picked the Kennedy to lead the Department of Health, putting him in a position to make many of his plans a reality.
"For too long, Americans have been crushed by the industrial food complex and drug companies who have engaged in deception, misinformation, and disinformation when it comes to Public Health," Trump said in a Truth Social post. "The Safety and Health of all Americans is the most important role of any Administration, and HHS will play a big role in helping ensure that everybody will be protected from harmful chemicals, pollutants, pesticides, pharmaceutical products, and food additives that have contributed to the overwhelming Health Crisis in this Country. Mr. Kennedy will restore these Agencies to the traditions of Gold Standard Scientific Research, and beacons of Transparency, to end the Chronic Disease epidemic, and to Make America Great and Healthy Again!"
RFK has also **[spoken out against](https://substack.com/redirect/4aaa1c53-2894-43fc-8be7-68041d3b1963?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the harmful effects of some popular weight-loss drugs, encouraging people instead to opt for a healthy diet and exercise.
**[Watch Whoopi lose it on live T.V.](https://substack.com/redirect/b82bd341-0180-4f77-918c-f810b8989057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over the prospect of America being made healthy again.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/105e2267-ee24-47f1-92ef-b4ae2d123d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Virginia deserves better than Youngkin

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98696002/517514734/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY0Y2EyYy0zOGJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eNoGe58JFFweqOR57sHPtyaP1_uOQjTTk_TSX93vJM=&emci=395c018f-1fb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=44f4ca2c-38ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15759664)
---
Hello Derek, We’re gearing up for a fight in 2025 — a fight to take back the governor’s mansion and undo the damage Youngkin and his Republican allies have inflicted on our Commonwealth. Under Youngkin’s leadership, Virginia has seen progress rolled back. From chipping away at voting rights to advancing an extremist MAGA agenda that ignores the needs of hardworking Virginians, **it’s clear that Republicans are more interested in political games than governing for the people.** But we have a real opportunity to turn the page in 2025. With your support, we can elect a Democratic governor who will restore voting rights, defend our freedoms, and make Virginia a leader in progress once again. It won’t be easy. Youngkin and his allies are already gearing up to hold their ground. That’s why we need to build our movement now. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: The Seven Stocks Set To Dominate Trump’s Second Term
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Dear Reader,
For the last 20 years, The
Magnificent Seven have dominated the stock market.

Apple, Google, Tesla, Amazon,
Nvidia, Microsoft, and Facebook delivered average returns of more
than 16,800% each.

But according to Alex Green,
seven new stocks are set to take over during Trump's second term.

Thanks to the sudden rise of AI,
he says these stocks will dominate the coming years.

In fact, he's claiming that
$1,000 in each could turn into more than $1 million by 2030.

Is he right?

Get the facts and decide for
yourself right here.

Good investing,
Rachel Gearhart
Publisher, The Oxford Club

P.S. Here's a few quick details
about these seven amazing stocks...

One of them just signed a
contract to get their AI tech in the iPhone and iMac through
2040. Nvidia itself also is buying this stock. It's their largest
holding.
Another created a new network
that is faster than Amazon and Google. It's being adopted by 30%
of Fortune 1000 companies.
And a third just signed a
contract to get its AI into every single one of Walmart's
regional distribution centers.

These are just a few of the
reasons Alex is saying to buy these stocks before the end of the
month.
Get the details on all of what
Alex calls "The Trump Seven" right here.

This ad is sent on behalf of The
Oxford Club, 105 W. Monument Street Baltimore, MD 21201. If you
would like to opt out from receiving offers from The Oxford Club,
please click here.

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

body:

**[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to rush $5 before tomorrow's mid-month deadline to flip the Senate out of Donald Trump's tiny hands?!](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241214-JamesCarville-CarvilleAnythingICanSayRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241214-JamesCarville-CarvilleAnythingICanSayRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19137%2E9716520%2EV4KihI)**

What if I told you that Donald Trump's already hammering his MAGA majority in line to pass his wacko agenda?

What if I told you we have a helluva shot at retaking the Senate -- especially with TWO possible special elections coming up for Vance's and Rubio's seats?

**What if I told you that if we pull this off and flip the Senate, we'd be cutting the Trump agenda's shelf life in HALF?**

Folks, there's plenty of reasons Trump and his cronies want you to give up the fight. But that's all the more reason to keep on fighting.

**So I'm going to say this as directly as I can: MAGA Republicans may have control for now, but you better believe we have a shot to take it ALL back. That's why I'm talking your ear off now, so please:**

**[It's time to roll up our sleeves. Will you donate $5 or more before tomorrow's mid-month deadline to fight for every seat? clean_body: | | | Ya'll -- I'm scratching my head trying to figure out if there's ANY WAY I can convince you to ACT! Right now, Trump is teeing up his next wild administration, and every second we hesitate is another second MAGA Republicans could get the jump on us to stay in power even longer. I've got a lot to catch you up on, but first I have to ask: | | What if I told you that Donald Trump's already hammering his MAGA majority in line to pass his wacko agenda? What if I told you we have a helluva shot at retaking the Senate -- especially with TWO possible special elections coming up for Vance's and Rubio's seats? What if I told you that if we pull this off and flip the Senate, we'd be cutting the Trump agenda's shelf life in HALF? Folks, there's plenty of reasons Trump and his cronies want you to give up the fight. But that's all the more reason to keep on fighting. So I'm going to say this as directly as I can: MAGA Republicans may have control for now, but you better believe we have a shot to take it ALL back. That's why I'm talking your ear off now, so please: We need your help to fight for the Senate. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Peter, with Republicans in a position to strip us of our most fundamental rights and threaten all the progress we've made, Letitia James' fight has never been more important.
**As we head into 2025, Letitia's top priorities will be:**
* **Safeguarding abortion access,** ensuring that _anyone_ seeking reproductive care can get it in New York, no matter where they're coming from or what their situation is

* **Defending our democracy,** even in the face of bad actors who seek to undermine the rights, freedoms, and needs of the American people

* **Holding bad actors accountable** for their attempts to take advantage of the vulnerable and voiceless,** ** no matter how much money or power they have
* **Fighting for a fair economy** where consumers are protected from price gouging and corporations are held accountable for taking advantage of hardworking families.

_And that isn't even half of it, Peter._
Letitia has been – and always will be – committed to protecting our freedoms, putting big businesses in their place and holding powerful institutions accountable. **But with Republicans upping the ante on their attacks against her, we need to know what you think.**
**This poll will only stay live until 11:59 p.m. tonight, so please take just a moment now to tell us:**
| | **Do you approve of Attorney General Letitia James?**

clean_body: | | | = | | Do you approve of Attorney General Letitia James? | | | | Goal: 5,000 Responses | Deadline: Midnight Your response: MISSING Peter, with Republicans in a position to strip us of our most fundamental rights and threaten all the progress we've made, Letitia James' fight has never been more important. As we head into 2025, Letitia's top priorities will be: Safeguarding abortion access, ensuring that anyone seeking reproductive care can get it in New York, no matter where they're coming from or what their situation is Defending our democracy, even in the face of bad actors who seek to undermine the rights, freedoms, and needs of the American people Holding bad actors accountable for their attempts to take advantage of the vulnerable and voiceless, no matter how much money or power they have Fighting for a fair economy where consumers are protected from price gouging and corporations are held accountable for taking advantage of hardworking families. And that isn't even half of it, Peter. Letitia has been – and always will be – committed to protecting our freedoms, putting big businesses in their place and holding powerful institutions accountable. But with Republicans upping the ante on their attacks against her, we need to know what you think. name: David Hogg
subject: Ups and downs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’m asking – are you with us in the fight?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241214-1&t=1&akid=1530%2E587540%2EFu9urm)
Peter,
2024 has been a year of ups and downs. None of us have any illusions about the challenges ahead with an incoming Trump administration and GOP majorities in Congress. Democrats have some real reckoning to do after the national elections.
Still, that doesn’t erase our victories in 2024. We elected six young progressives to state legislatures – leaders like Sarah McBride, the first transgender person ever elected to Congress, and Oscar De Los Santos, the Arizona lawmaker who blocked Republicans from resurrecting an 1800s-era draconian anti-abortion bill.
**Bold young leaders that we helped elect – 100% thanks to the support of this grassroots team – are going to play a major role in fighting the MAGA agenda.**
**[Can we count on you to power our work recruiting, training, and funding the next generation of progressive leaders? Make a $5 contribution now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241214-1?refcode=em20241214-1530&amount=5&refcode2=1530_587540_Fu9urm&akid=1530%2E587540%2EFu9urm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241214-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241214-1530&refcode2=1530_587540_Fu9urm&akid=1530%2E587540%2EFu9urm)**
When I think about how much we’ve accomplished in our first year at Leaders We Deserve, I start getting even more excited about what we can do in years to come.
The truth is that we did not launch Leaders We Deserve because of one election. This work has always been about playing the long game. Conservatives spent decades building local power, taking over the majority of state legislatures, and appointing far-right judges. **_Now, progressives need to do the same exact thing._**
**We’re up against the clock to meet our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal before tomorrow night’s deadline. So I’m asking – are you with us in the fight?**
**[Donate $5 or anything you can to help elect the future of our country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241214-1?refcode=em20241214-1530&amount=5&refcode2=1530_587540_Fu9urm&akid=1530%2E587540%2EFu9urm)**
Thank you for everything you’re doing, Peter!
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241214-1&t=2&refcode2=1530_587540_Fu9urm&akid=1530%2E587540%2EFu9urm)**

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: TAKE ACTION: The House wants to cut $30 billion from SNAP nutrition assistance. The Senate bill would strengthen SNAP.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We have an opportunity to address long-standing hunger and inequities through the Farm Bill. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWagAKMZbD6yK5h_eZEQ_vI12woGkZ9yq4K93DJe7pwsvUnpdbtgJlqbe7U8wJEw9XZ5ZwXEuBbp0dr-ExnFGtIzTpaq4Qy1l8pBwUz10BvQEUFDQvP4_wU1P61oP130meZbwr-GA9BF03St3R1M74QFYp5n02lrUO0RJn4KVKRfr4-YLtL8XEGAdVnA0tT4qQm0pFvQJr6Nu9PQLpyoSYN4BDvV8DNeoM1peHZUyMq_98s-bdLGah2vOI3-Hcjf6zyTMZhwxi4q8bL--9GINoxVPHndlxmVZMx925VdLKlyeqN_S3msGV9C_NcLWShGM-6tFcVj8o8AR-2bepxMV_FUGp915vQtTpRo9F1lIHnFLZ6Udb9ygTvtggIHd5ql3G/4ca/BjreELhRRHmLCc3pSUvsJQ/h0/h001.uTHg3Z4yAXolVeiIpJx0IuuWb9E33aHyetFZGVfcXQ8)
---
Friend, Congress is rushing to finalize critical legislation before it adjourns for the year and one bill that needs passage this month is the Farm Bill. **Included in the Farm Bill are critical nutrition assistance programs including SNAP (food stamps), which millions of Americans need in order to feed their families.** Most Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, and according to Feeding America, more than 44 million Americans experience food insecurity. In my district in Michigan, the food insecurity rate is higher than the national average; you can [click here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVS0KF_xNoReQzISarsIdQk8TZ6-Hd41LxPCNAchGXrEBXyLgJX4uBD9mIFv4QsZqRlncm1IZLCF2ZNyVYsa7OBGujW8FwHK-CbyBvb0HiCTm_XWO-ASBr3ywnuvkMSMs-XwJkxLPsRPTjTw17jrxL5dy2tady4Y3w8FG-50mTOVB-RSWUGWn1RmwizohuJWP17FQx446aQ0EJDnUnv34yC-ljJwRhITPjrXRJJYljoYfTtYmoX9E_EdR_r_EhU9FVQyPqsvvLJI96boR1Fetr_49XVukFzKtUnQVL6GMtIFTXh9QOAaRPl919RnJZ5ucWGr_7YUNgYo6Vg9OaGOFT1MJlJwn3Muwdoa34zkvsyvK1VtoaeZl3NCmARAljG9drajkw9ge_4POutiJOIpCUDBesNVGAnxM9ZpG_DT_O4bQvPk2LbvK_bAWQdkgwxpumeuwOJaWlT3LmWZbkGBMgKlIbwJ1lqw2oCWd9kkSoPdu/4ca/BjreELhRRHmLCc3pSUvsJQ/h1/h001.6lPNaeqy380kpsquy82Q0nj3g1VCMnns6sE87Fma0Ro) to see what the food insecurity rate is in your community. **This year, the House version of the Farm Bill seeks to cut SNAP nutrition benefits by $30 billion.** But the Senate version, introduced by my state’s Senator Debbie Stabenow, makes critical improvements to SNAP to better cover the costs of a healthy diet, expands SNAP access for college students facing hunger, increases funding for local food banks, creates a long-overdue path for Puerto Rico to access SNAP benefits, removes the lifetime ban on nutrition assistance for individuals convicted of a drug-related felony, and more.1 We need improvements like these, not cruel cuts. [**Help ensure that no one goes hungry this holiday season. Add your name to tell Congress: Strengthen—don’t cut—SNAP nutrition benefits in the Farm Bill.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJem8SUXwqu9rdxVCAUYUAXYOm69Ks41D8ijN5MPzFx2Fta4bmiUJkTFCoOV-ZUfs4A3qIMFAjUkaYClhvFskttsNmAUR6DXgZIBxxWxsFWpq-GR4IP2v9OSUbktgVaot_wWdtZu5yE_b-4V1M7XirM7EO0ab3zSDWGcxUBS5_NFq47nqTIXeg7fST-n_CG_s4e4xmrNSxhp1hndCjhJOu33NzTOHpzA4Rs0AQq2aijslFKO78r7M4uZNeGure33BEl8q3VSQQcAWGi4wzUeDSZEkgeI2gzGTRPLlvSs4-F7bPv94bYPbxBcHksLUBUpzliznulifE0mMdZfE0hq6OBZeT6P1Rrv51gXHiVghXXGAcu4lHkGLaz3EMhxwqz589GADDgvxHW5GSfaw3q90zqhr4EnOcyzWXcEV4ATuTaImC9uG5m1p50RHzSv56bFd-qaZl06LZZxSyxUtYQjs4FOoTCSzjjjpbPjSufOV2PDSYKUXx_TQ2PsEPv94_KSk-50S8OpO2SxdilUJE4N5hbgVGicbmr6YiVKsbXyTP5hw/4ca/BjreELhRRHmLCc3pSUvsJQ/h2/h001.XFay97dMjSh_0Tj4PR8uG6lD5DWNCf-IhXSFFYkdqI0) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJem8SUXwqu9rdxVCAUYUAXYOm69Ks41D8ijN5MPzFx2Fta4bmiUJkTFCoOV-ZUfs4A3qIMFAjUkaYClhvFsktth62bLwFJnx_tUuVtTT9ifhM2aDoggBlScEwI1b_3Gc0XuCWM5KHR41TdQFQH0HGigK7STnydNhTPWMhh1Cxe-LL7eqEN6-pXRr2ozJLEUqSDnJQbzRaFlpxn9_J6HorO6ySpf8-8G0ex-567bjFZ6IVtD2WemDf2XOOKA7bOAu3iBBaXJgXrIBBpFI3Guv7aTl6W0UJ78vKmpVU3kxdBEHTOwfq4jcksBwsCf40UY-6-Rv3erIOvTV7avugEMcjuPgerZ4OnGnL_V9t6SsVOlwDbTHtxVj5v2yFqpovCQCyEuquy_lD0aWQ3B_jzaqemdtC9iiECTHN2pLWdjASCTle4R5HqdY9XZMikWu9r49JEUz--oheu1um_jWQ2vEtEgZCuZVI3AGx95iMV76KVNszDG_2Hxj-7LZkO9Yb69xC7cgCho7pFP0yBiRu6tN2YIWzXAIBdMqlghKr8lBqPCY/4ca/BjreELhRRHmLCc3pSUvsJQ/h3/h001.yQmjsRjGMRhXqlVj54j8H_Jph-nBWtGbG1gl1APguFM)
---
Last year, 22% of Black people in the U.S. experienced food insecurity—more than twice the rate of white people.2 Meanwhile, Native communities face food insecurity at three times the rate of white U.S. residents and roughly 25% of Native people rely on federal nutrition assistance.3
The Farm Bill can also remove barriers for Native communities accessing critical nutrition assistance. Right now, Native people who qualify for SNAP and the Food Distribution Program on Indian Reservations are prohibited from accessing both nutrition programs in the same month.4 Advocates with the Native Farm Bill Coalition are calling to address this issue in the Farm Bill, reminding us that the federal government has a responsibility to Tribes, including ensuring adequate resources such as food.
Through this Farm Bill, we have an opportunity to address long-standing inequities in marginalized communities, including disproportionate rates of hunger. As with many community needs, our country can easily pay to expand resources like SNAP by reducing the military budget, which two-thirds of the House voted to pass last week.
[**Add your name now to urge Congress to pass a Farm Bill this month that strengthens SNAP and addresses the crisis of hunger in our communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJem8SUXwqu9rdxVCAUYUAXYOm69Ks41D8ijN5MPzFx2Fta4bmiUJkTFCoOV-ZUfs4A3qIMFAjUkaYClhvFsktttIMr8HTfrANFHcQQ6JjkO27YjE2ig1xwlvngkOyKiqnXyif2_6Tc3GVVNmp0U76lQYM7Ai4tjvLRDlXdp6bb8M48YNijYAJHUzWaf5v6UEZlAim8wsMl-QorErMpy1SbJV-Us8Ul_XxFU7k8v5syj1uR2Qe59A7bEZCht5JAlnYxEtB_f4M7qfm2hTEePIBTh5iSpVW1msPc4KlTRR148RGGeb4YPwymDsfdneANh7nJtb3t0x3p8R9miASdY4863as3gk9GlUVpj4Rc9MmtMwSZcIsuVzowzU9eea9cvY6Ur376lwiHsZL0q6tt8CP0e6DhVQ1lM3aTf_B2lwm3pBHH9OpLL352PrNTrMOhYld2srcoILzA7I_xC9TqwqaKVd-DSGUkUxrvXGTqczBMbvUUwsgSvXtdwsSxlPtBeUo1Z5drqeKAzlZ5CfPxJ2BHiLok4zYn8xU1ofCenJ3hyY/4ca/BjreELhRRHmLCc3pSUvsJQ/h4/h001.gE6DL2lmxCmjJ8MAVYXtfY-lxuaximHQZpiUd23FQLo)
In love and service,
Rashida

clean_body: We have an opportunity to address long-standing hunger and inequities through the Farm Bill. | | | Friend, Congress is rushing to finalize critical legislation before it adjourns for the year and one bill that needs passage this month is the Farm Bill. Included in the Farm Bill are critical nutrition assistance programs including SNAP (food stamps), which millions of Americans need in order to feed their families. Most Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, and according to Feeding America, more than 44 million Americans experience food insecurity. In my district in Michigan, the food insecurity rate is higher than the national average; you can to see what the food insecurity rate is in your community. This year, the House version of the Farm Bill seeks to cut SNAP nutrition benefits by $30 billion. But the Senate version, introduced by my state’s Senator Debbie Stabenow, makes critical improvements to SNAP to better cover the costs of a healthy diet, expands SNAP access for college students facing hunger, increases funding for local food banks, creates a long-overdue path for Puerto Rico to access SNAP benefits, removes the lifetime ban on nutrition assistance for individuals convicted of a drug-related felony, and more.1 We need improvements like these, not cruel cuts. | Last year, 22% of Black people in the U.S. experienced food insecurity—more than twice the rate of white people.2 Meanwhile, Native communities face food insecurity at three times the rate of white U.S. residents and roughly 25% of Native people rely on federal nutrition assistance.3 The Farm Bill can also remove barriers for Native communities accessing critical nutrition assistance. Right now, Native people who qualify for SNAP and the Food Distribution Program on Indian Reservations are prohibited from accessing both nutrition programs in the same month.4 Advocates with the Native Farm Bill Coalition are calling to address this issue in the Farm Bill, reminding us that the federal government has a responsibility to Tribes, including ensuring adequate resources such as food. Through this Farm Bill, we have an opportunity to address long-standing inequities in marginalized communities, including disproportionate rates of hunger. As with many community needs, our country can easily pay to expand resources like SNAP by reducing the military budget, which two-thirds of the House voted to pass last week. In love and service, Rashida 1 2 3 4 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: David Hogg
subject: Time to get back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Friend, **It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next.** After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — **nothing would have changed.** Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times. This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either. Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge: We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads. Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom. We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature. We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House. Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them. Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with Serve America, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. [**Will you split a $20 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help us recruit, train, and elect the next generation of progressive champions?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98699362/517522610/-150563143?refcode=241214&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGU1MWJlYy0zY2JhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZCD21dULS2o2Gpki0AuCO15wz_Qfs9xxK7bsyc11WGU=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98699363/517522613/-442632316?refcode=241214&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGU1MWJlYy0zY2JhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZCD21dULS2o2Gpki0AuCO15wz_Qfs9xxK7bsyc11WGU=) Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either. Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with Serve America, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. clean_body: | Friend, It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next. After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — nothing would have changed. Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times. This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either. Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge: We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads. Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom. We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature. We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House. Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them. Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with Serve America, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. = = Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either. Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with Serve America, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. = = In service, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve = [content goes here] Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Serve America PAC

Take a sneak peek into the end of the year.
|

Hi Peter!
In my role as All On The Line’s senior mobilization strategist, I get to focus on our grassroots supporters. I spend my time thinking about how to bring new folks into our community, how to mobilize our network in key moments, and yes, how to increase the number of grassroots donations to the All On The Line campaign.
**I wanted to give you a peek behind the curtain into how we’re building our End-Of-Year fundraising campaign (and spoiler: then I’m going to ask you to contribute to it).**
[**First the big news: We have a “match” opportunity — up to $50,000 in total donations — and we need supporters like you to come through.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98700211/517524291/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_EOYMatch_email_20241214-AOTL-RedLite-EOYMatch_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241214-AOTL-RedLite-EOYMatch_&utm_campaign=EOYMatch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiZTUxYmVjLTNjYmEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-JbUEYBl88rFG5IfOXYO7IZKgw1iHRntaAbArcib9lE=)
This happens when a generous supporter of the fair maps movement steps forward with a commitment to donate a dollar for every dollar we raise in a specific time period. They “match” what we raise from the grassroots donations, making each donation twice as impactful.
So if you make a $10 donation, the donor will match it with $10. If you make a $75 donation, the donor will match it with $75. If you make a $500 donation, the donor will match it with $500.
[**Will you please help the All On The Line campaign take full advantage of our $50,000 end-of-year match opportunity by making a gift of any size right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98700212/517524292/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_EOYMatch_email_20241214-AOTL-RedLite-EOYMatch_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241214-AOTL-RedLite-EOYMatch_&utm_campaign=EOYMatch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiZTUxYmVjLTNjYmEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-JbUEYBl88rFG5IfOXYO7IZKgw1iHRntaAbArcib9lE=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The positive impact y’all will have on our democracy gives me hope for the future. It’s been a tough year — especially this last month or so — but playing even a small role in this growing movement is what motivates me to keep going. Fair maps impact our daily lives today — and will have massive impacts on our future.
**Next year alone, there are off-year and special elections across the country that will decide the control of multiple state legislatures, a governorship, and at least four state supreme court seats — one of which could determine control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court. **That means there's critical organizing to do to counter threats to fair elections and help ensure a more representative democracy.
We also need to be ready for concrete threats ahead like Donald Trump and his allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and ongoing attempts to gerrymander at the state level.
We can do this. We can make our maps more fair and protect our democracy. And now, with this match opportunity, we have a chance to come together and make sure we have the resources we need to do so. [**If you want to make a lasting impact, please consider chipping into our end-of-year match fund.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98700230/517524299/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_EOYMatch_email_20241214-AOTL-RedLite-EOYMatch_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241214-AOTL-RedLite-EOYMatch_&utm_campaign=EOYMatch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiZTUxYmVjLTNjYmEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-JbUEYBl88rFG5IfOXYO7IZKgw1iHRntaAbArcib9lE=)
Appreciate you,
Vic
Vic Barreras Torres
Senior Mobilization Strategist, All On The Line

name: Mary, Team Trump
subject: President Trump has been trying to get in touch with you

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: A quick ask
body:
Hi friend,
I know life gets hectic this time of year, so I'll keep this message quick!
As 2024 draws to a close, many of us are looking forward with uncertainty. We don't know exactly what the new year — or the new administration — will bring.
Here's what I do know: I will never stop going to work every day to fight for the hardworking people of Northwest Ohio.
I'm going to double down on my efforts to lower costs for families, protect workers' rights, deliver transformative infrastructure investments, and protect our Great Lakes environment. And I could really use your support in that fight.
**[Team, will you chip in before our end-of-the-year fundraising deadline to support that work? It would mean the world to all of us on our team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98701018/517527424/1037629634?refcode=241214_mk_middec2_l1&ms=241214_mk_middec2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODgxZGNlMS0zZWJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ib5HJlAzXnaz8AT9MlRDuPXjqnJKSuF7hg-QPb4ReMw=)**
Thank you so much,
— Marcy
