Looking at it used to make me so happy. It brought back all the wonderful memories we've made as a family during the Christmas season. But now it makes me cry realizing that this might be the last Christmas our little boys get to spend with their father.My husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department.I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster......but from a Soros-funded, anti-police prosecutor. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=cab4ce5ce43b4ee59c636a24f2e09a5f&_e=dHxtlZzdxjywcwVhOaQs499D6xNhyD2jJ1pFhBC6k8pDDJUV0v9Fqwbgl5oDOUoWQJ5DxP9TjgGjHY_NnESI-Is-8WvhClR02rQPilwblmhdbed1Qh1ULoWtxEpIntcYsH31jd0R2qKgWABHPjKh6zyEK7Am2hqBzvu_IksT4__hUGEL2EAaS7ZM3volB-gJIlqQF57WIOHknKWSPkAr-i5ocFUTFBzxKcnlIa7HrPz3cbBoe-HxU5_2dxk-VS8Wazq148_6aLdK-HLB0x4mkZCfLTCBoe0N2Q56Q7SYqomuuCwUAmWkQ086Jk-VLsxZjoll0eaTBFtQNnZa2VTXflWwgY74O64Q_VFr7nlJdcbeV_HplgL7NfJwHW8TpKvnrKeAfqyjks0MSwO4OhPjuKLLE0H6qHrJv3rbVeZuy9o%3D)** Instead of enjoying this Christmas season, my family will be thinking about and dreading the coming of February when **this Soros-funded prosecutor will try to rip** **my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for 11 years -- for saving a fellow officer's life.** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, moved to detain the suspect who was carrying a knife, the suspect got violent.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him.In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us.I couldn't have been more wrong.Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who hates the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black......this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious.My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer.But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys.And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks......Brad will miss 11 years of Christmases, birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games.As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family.Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson.Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available.So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=cab4ce5ce43b4ee59c636a24f2e09a5f&_e=dHxtlZzdxjywcwVhOaQs499D6xNhyD2jJ1pFhBC6k8pDDJUV0v9Fqwbgl5oDOUoWQJ5DxP9TjgGjHY_NnESI-Is-8WvhClR02rQPilwblmhdbed1Qh1ULoWtxEpIntcYsH31jd0R2qKgWABHPjKh6zyEK7Am2hqBzvu_IksT4__hUGEL2EAaS7ZM3volB-gJIlqQF57WIOHknKWSPkAr-i5ocFUTFBzxKcnlIa7HrPz3cbBoe-HxU5_2dxk-VS8W9vXsq1mxXMgeb9rvhrRnG5ZsW8gdvygQ8-iCIiejgw71TfiV4HDJz8vwFErIzStIVVxUhj4JkEiaVekMUeCJkusRbVX6uYdkeRellHCb2XH30qqdkmenrcYqQl1m37RRA8PVBGZhYrjZ_wsNQyM0PFhCcfhnOKGHVL2r6uT0P5Q%3D)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. [**So I pray this Christmas season you'll find it in your heart to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.****this Christmas season****you'll find it in your heart to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=cab4ce5ce43b4ee59c636a24f2e09a5f&_e=dHxtlZzdxjywcwVhOaQs499D6xNhyD2jJ1pFhBC6k8pDDJUV0v9Fqwbgl5oDOUoWQJ5DxP9TjgGjHY_NnESI-Is-8WvhClR02rQPilwblmhdbed1Qh1ULoWtxEpIntcYsH31jd0R2qKgWABHPjKh6zyEK7Am2hqBzvu_IksT4__hUGEL2EAaS7ZM3volB-gJIlqQF57WIOHknKWSPkAr-i5ocFUTFBzxKcnlIa7HrPz3cbBoe-HxU5_2dxk-VS8WbK31N6tig3CuFeFkYIO0oKwxocXZxabhDoh7sqiTwkrwRgfFy7ef_VZrJ-v-OKr--mob9S6mksWCz-qsMPrTJE-q0a6ovnbPx-YWa4vPsWJoue9KKs2SgWyXfhDXa3UWkXSE0uas8E5aP4-_pQ_R8J6uy0UWRd0jcNflVWEo_3k%3D)**** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs.No matter what you’re able to give today, please pray for us. subject: Things have really taken a turn
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Well, Peter, I’ll admit it… Things have really taken a turn since Election Day. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn’t be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED, and now I’m starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our final goal of the year. I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our final goal of 2024. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before the New Year. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=eefe5590446592b7a8d97ca5119ecad1f76e9aec51e15ea8315bb8b16bac6962f8faea55f3e55946367ab89a2a478c3268ae4de0ab7b75e72463d12f412d513d I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my end of year goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. It’s the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this… But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it’s a no-brainer in my book. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=eefe5590446592b7a8d97ca5119ecad1f76e9aec51e15ea8315bb8b16bac6962f8faea55f3e55946367ab89a2a478c3268ae4de0ab7b75e72463d12f412d513d I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn’t be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED, and now I’m starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our final goal of the year. I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our final goal of 2024. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before the New Year. I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my end of year goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. It’s the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this… But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it’s a no-brainer in my book. I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A verse-by-verse explanation of Revelation
body:
What do all these signs and symbols mean for you?
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a7d047743a1c4808adbd37991f4b3b6e&_e=j70jwHDklGP8xAstyeytxOHhZFIv1gtkks-8yJxjcs2LyoPq--cJ0dkoi8NLVzugq-0m-pgv7MQ7RxMdkA-afcMou3xIQWmsBDNMELOVZS03nrBb-UI82vVvjQNVgYctoOY4Be0sCLDyRldgw6vnv6GMA56djV0XxnlWm4M7fvN6fOi3UhNDyf-g3jVjt92leEiW0gutAkKB-OaFtjqNFmF2HCyc-Ra_koc30pXgOwv6R1qhshhQ4HwEaU27fSX8PM-bEjWWGyKOurljHoq2zn-nzAh-4jqKYFsMlReLRGpEmo8ZFaXGjB_Gih7QFJVme5ZZZPxLnSPmFvY_fhLAUd8uf7GCeZ_n_esvQZ4ntXXnRvY04C_CWpmrkvuBERTBNZuASlvHG5gqERdbV-3n-w%3D%3D)
---
Hello Friend, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a7d047743a1c4808adbd37991f4b3b6e&_e=j70jwHDklGP8xAstyeytxOHhZFIv1gtkks-8yJxjcs2LyoPq--cJ0dkoi8NLVzugq-0m-pgv7MQ7RxMdkA-afcMou3xIQWmsBDNMELOVZS03nrBb-UI82vVvjQNVgYctoOY4Be0sCLDyRldgw6vnv6GMA56djV0XxnlWm4M7fvN6fOi3UhNDyf-g3jVjt92leEiW0gutAkKB-OaFtjqNFmF2HCyc-Ra_koc30pXgOwtli7C0cA8u5HJEvlbtGV5x60Vl2Nfi2SpgpyD02scl2ndqqzVI6jM2Fokc3N53n5zZ4n3D2a_4UtZ3plZy102CTHEJsGgE825BqEIRF4ch5ZoGEYi1eZhb66t7eS2zw9pniwD3BZy922XXCm0W3lkyWsxoFgjhHvxWulBIZx-ynw%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a7d047743a1c4808adbd37991f4b3b6e&_e=j70jwHDklGP8xAstyeytxOHhZFIv1gtkks-8yJxjcs2LyoPq--cJ0dkoi8NLVzugq-0m-pgv7MQ7RxMdkA-afcMou3xIQWmsBDNMELOVZS03nrBb-UI82vVvjQNVgYctoOY4Be0sCLDyRldgw6vnv6GMA56djV0XxnlWm4M7fvN6fOi3UhNDyf-g3jVjt92leEiW0gutAkKB-OaFtjqNFmF2HCyc-Ra_koc30pXgOwtr98eORD9yELcGz-FOEggUnsodVSHkk83ja-vSNs3f-iL_970_Q0EPsNLWJUM18xJMZJ0F6T7rm9WFBBoYUgfxpUu5hGA8oCd9ZViYcZF_3Swy0YpSxMisBfg37e_6y01MZ3Zn2jG7eq2JMH7nexlS-h3bbetEFGWtGx40wAnH2A%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

body:
I know you usually hear from my husband Raja. But today, I told him I'd reach out instead.
Peter, I know you usually hear from my husband Raja. But today, I told him I'd reach out instead. [_**Peter, I wanted to personally tell you why I’m so proud of my husband, why he deserves your support, and give you a peek into my family. I hope you will read until the very end. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98703170/517534161/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241214_em_fr_b1_raja_sur_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI2NTI3Ni00NGJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJcp9i31-1emuyowZXCOo25eZVr7KRtpu-RV06sPZkc=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98703171/517534162/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241214_em_fr_b1_raja_sur_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI2NTI3Ni00NGJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJcp9i31-1emuyowZXCOo25eZVr7KRtpu-RV06sPZkc=) [_Our family!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98703172/517534163/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241214_em_fr_b1_raja_sur_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI2NTI3Ni00NGJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJcp9i31-1emuyowZXCOo25eZVr7KRtpu-RV06sPZkc=)
---
Raja is the hardest working person I know.
He fought tirelessly for protections for frontline healthcare workers like me.
He went after companies for targeting e-cigarette campaigns at young kids like ours.
And at the end of every day, he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father.
[_**I’ve never been prouder of my husband. He’s fighting hard for families like yours and mine every day. And I know he doesn’t like asking for money. So I hope today, you’ll listen to my request instead. I know we need strong people like my husband in Congress, and I’m asking you to support Raja however you can. Anything you could chip in, whether it’s $5 or $25, would be greatly appreciated by both of us. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98703173/517534164/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241214_em_fr_b1_raja_sur_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI2NTI3Ni00NGJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJcp9i31-1emuyowZXCOo25eZVr7KRtpu-RV06sPZkc=)
One of the things I love most about Raja is that this isn’t about politics for him.
It’s deeply personal.
It’s rooted in his experience as a child of immigrant parents.
It’s rooted in his role as a father who wants the best for every child.
It’s rooted in the same values I’ve watched him champion for decades.
I couldn’t be prouder of him -- as a congressman, husband, and father.
That’s why I wanted to email you today. I hope you see in Raja what I do -- and I hope you don’t mind me asking you to support him however you can. Will you join us?

clean_body: I know you usually hear from my husband Raja. But today, I told him I'd reach out instead. Peter, I know you usually hear from my husband Raja. But today, I told him I'd reach out instead. = | = = Raja is the hardest working person I know. He fought tirelessly for protections for frontline healthcare workers like me. He went after companies for targeting e-cigarette campaigns at young kids like ours. And at the end of every day, he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father. = One of the things I love most about Raja is that this isn’t about politics for him. It’s deeply personal. It’s rooted in his experience as a child of immigrant parents. It’s rooted in his role as a father who wants the best for every child. It’s rooted in the same values I’ve watched him champion for decades. I couldn’t be prouder of him -- as a congressman, husband, and father. That’s why I wanted to email you today. I hope you see in Raja what I do -- and I hope you don’t mind me asking you to support him however you can. Will you join us? **= = = = = =** Thank you for reading, Priya | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. name: Blaming Bernie again? (via Our Revolution)
subject: The Democratic establishment's urge to blame Bernie voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1011?refcode=email-20241214_v&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, is the
Democratic Party really trying to blame Bernie voters again?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20707?t=1061&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ][IMG]

We’ve heard it since 2016. But if corporate Democrats and Party elites
were willing to take a good long honest look at themselves in the mirror,
they’d realize Bernie is the answer, not the problem.

Bernie knows how to win the votes Democrats need. He knows how to appeal
to working class voters. He knows how to channel our collective rage
against the ruling class, Wall Street, and billionaire profiteers. We’re
gearing up for a major fight behind Bernie to change the Party and change
politics in America so Democrats prioritize real progressive economic
policies — and stop losing to far right demagogues.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241214nd&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]Chip in now to help Bernie and Our Revolution do the work behind the
scenes AND mobilize our movement to demand changes at the next DNC
meeting. We must build a party that serves poor and working people — and
actually takes on the billionaire class!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241214nd&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241214nd&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241214nd&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241214nd&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241214nd&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241214nd&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Even after establishment Democrats try to create excuses and scapegoats
for poor election results instead of changing their ways, we’re still in
the fight to radically transform the Party.

During the election, Bernie talked about class at a town hall, even when
the Party was tip-toeing around economic policies that would materially
help everyday people. If the Democratic Party continues embracing the
ultra-rich, corporate super PACs, and the self-serving consultant class,
Democrats will continue losing elections to fake economic populists like
Donald Trump.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20707?t=1060&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ][IMG]

So why isn’t class a focus? Bernie nails it: “Because when you talk about
class, you risk working people coming together and taking back power from
the top 1%.”

If the Party listens to Bernie, Democrats have a real, fighting chance. We
are organizing actions right now to press our demands at the DNC’s
upcoming meetings where the decisions will be made that determine the
leadership and direction of the Party.

Trump is about to unleash his cronies to upend the government to serve the
oligarchs even more. We need a true opposition party to fight back — or
else risk losing the next election, and the one after that, to Trump and
his handpicked MAGA successors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20701?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241214nd&akid=7396%2E5885482%2EL5LCIj ]Can you chip in to stand with Bernie and fund this urgent work to
transform the Democratic Party? We need to mobilize thousands to speak out
and show up at the DNC to get big money out of politics, root out the
corrupt consultants, and take on the ruling class!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Peter,

The **good news** is that we won this seat and can get to work on fighting for common sense, common ground solutions in Congress.

The **bad news** is that this race was close, and if the Presidential outcome is any indication, we’ll need help to come back even stronger to defend this seat in 2026.

It’s why we’re already fundraising for the next cycle and why I’m asking for your support before the year ends. Next year, my focus will largely be on getting legislation passed in Congress, so I want to do as much as possible now to garner support. clean_body: Next year, my focus will largely be on getting legislation passed in Congress, so I want to do as much as possible now to garner support. | = | Peter, The good news is that we won this seat and can get to work on fighting for common sense, common ground solutions in Congress. The bad news is that this race was close, and if the Presidential outcome is any indication, we’ll need help to come back even stronger to defend this seat in 2026. It’s why we’re already fundraising for the next cycle and why I’m asking for your support before the year ends. name: Tobias Read
subject: Extremists are at it again
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241214em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241214em]
I’m so excited to get to work as your next Secretary of State and grateful for the trust that Oregon voters have placed in me.
I ran on a platform of restoring trust in our elections, defending the pillars of our democracy, and ensuring everyone in our beautiful state can cast their ballot freely and fairly.
And even though Oregon voters decided that our vision for the future was the one they preferred, that hasn’t stopped some MAGA Republicans from continuing their crusade against our democracy.
In fact, they just announced an initiative petition to prohibit vote-by-mail.
I refuse to sit idly by and let them get away with this plot to undermine faith in our elections and restrict voting rights in our state — but I need your support. So please, can I count on you to join me in this fight by chipping in $5, $10, or more right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241214em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241214em]
This scheme to undermine vote-by-mail goes against the will of the people.
Survey results [https://static1.squarespace.com/static/5f302b311b5ab20990978415/t/6362fbeb4122bd0adb334cba/1667431421268/Elections+%2B+Voting+Rights+in+the+PNW_Nov.+2022.pdf] from 2022 showed that nearly 70% of Oregonians are confident in the safety, integrity, and accuracy of vote-by-mail.
Despite the lies and conspiracies about election fraud being spread by these MAGA extremists, it’s clear that our state wants to preserve access to the ballot through vote-by-mail.
I’ll work day and night to use my platform to ensure their cynical plans don’t come to fruition. Please chip in if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241214em]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241214em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241214em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Team Harder
subject: Josh represents a Trump district
body:

name: Tina Kotek
subject: What Oregon kids need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, I believe in the promise of every child. That’s why I’m recommending over $835 million more over the next two years to support Oregon’s children and youth in my proposed budget for 2025-2027. **Here’s where that money’s going:**
* $600 million increase to strengthen the State School Fund, for a total of $11.36 billion, to support K-12 public education;
* $127 million for early literacy so more kids are reading at grade level in elementary school;
* $78.5 million to expand summer learning programs; and
* $25 million for youth mental health investments.

These investments will improve early literacy, reliably fund our public schools, and address learning loss through summer learning programs. Investing in our young people means ensuring a strong future for our state. This is one of my top priorities as Governor, and [_**I hope you’ll support my plan for education by adding your name today:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98705637/517541378/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241214_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGEzYWMxNC00OGJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4R3Fx0FGo8NIz5oxG34nJOdjWrnC1MNb0X9t22aU3tQ=&emci=e50805e2-d2b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=5da3ac14-48ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98705638/517541379/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241214_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGEzYWMxNC00OGJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4R3Fx0FGo8NIz5oxG34nJOdjWrnC1MNb0X9t22aU3tQ=&emci=e50805e2-d2b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=5da3ac14-48ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15353729)

Tina

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Official J6 Pardon Petition
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB7/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB7/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB7/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_ This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB7/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB7/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
__Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!

_Yours Sincerely,_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB7/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene
_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EB7/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |
---

name: SkyTree Book Fairs
subject: Warning… these children’s books will anger you
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f64e8d7fd58d42e7b5bb8f90b87983f1&_e=TsMtjH6dH-NG89nInsEfO2ZwpPXL8FjFTGAv4JQK3086aorn825Se3T-iNUBmr7c-QqCYSFKFVdeP13Mihmi-j546IWBzJD-stIAu0KGTbjrt0HH4jSk78hdOH17vysqDl-ADJpI_034wsPMdEXsZl4uJLjfaRep7ZKyUpexh7fRBTa3MVd8ekPTlVdUOzSiPq_ZwViUJZ_EuCtGv0zMnPSsd9VU1AA0In9BLfDfQOQ1TyQLVgpRpDnfH3Up6mCKSow4KJWN9Lxs__Zsme7_U6dLTN7oRAsNXP-6U0n6-rFgtpLe6FehpDyhbKKHSFi1ZzV_JfmzLL-I7mpYGRttGWovKfe4-7rJkrFB1pGD1qzZrl9veFr5YqIR-lsCJ1X5yu0oVMgduw77QXP4gltBzQ%3D%3D "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Peter,

You would not believe the inappropriate books Scholastic pushes on kids at innocent book fairs, from highly sexualized content to confusing stories about gender transitioning to books promoting self-harm.

**I 've documented some of the books for you below so you can find them yourself if you don't believe me.**

Each of these contains storylines aimed at making children question their identity, consider dealing with their feelings through self-harm, or accept gender confusion as a normal part of growing up.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f64e8d7fd58d42e7b5bb8f90b87983f1&_e=TsMtjH6dH-NG89nInsEfO2ZwpPXL8FjFTGAv4JQK3086aorn825Se3T-iNUBmr7c-QqCYSFKFVdeP13Mihmi-j546IWBzJD-stIAu0KGTbjrt0HH4jSk78hdOH17vysqDl-ADJpI_034wsPMdEXsZl4uJLjfaRep7ZKyUpexh7fRBTa3MVd8ekPTlVdUOzSiPq_ZwViUJZ_EuCtGv0zMnPSsd9VU1AA0In9BLfDfQOQ0YNcJPS7wFVjhK5dJKcfQt5KZiN1PSmcJZvwkvLLSbpr0ylHaPgLAQdfQC3SrjMaiqTNWoGsCOKZXDva8IDm3ZZOq1N7dB_dywix4ADA4CuW3ezquotiLacJEsjpMdfOztvhU-aZgQzDbHZfigBWfsf6HzOzg3cMfVcie5cCHgw%3D%3D)
_Red: A Crayon 's Story_ (for Ages 3-7)
About a crayon mistakenly labeled as "red" who finds the courage to be his true-blue self.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f64e8d7fd58d42e7b5bb8f90b87983f1&_e=TsMtjH6dH-NG89nInsEfO2ZwpPXL8FjFTGAv4JQK3086aorn825Se3T-iNUBmr7c-QqCYSFKFVdeP13Mihmi-j546IWBzJD-stIAu0KGTbjrt0HH4jSk78hdOH17vysqDl-ADJpI_034wsPMdEXsZl4uJLjfaRep7ZKyUpexh7fRBTa3MVd8ekPTlVdUOzSiPq_ZwViUJZ_EuCtGv0zMnPSsd9VU1AA0In9BLfDfQOSOA8A1gTZUszyrMh6LzRTpyvoJ7Y8sZDIPPZ_1Vfka_D4Ba8TNXTVCt0gdtVCCuOs2wUE5POJKi_E9O7OLW0gkWauEEKFwWV0bRJi0Fb7E0jQ_aQJ2F4FIcMy_-DEQNhxOadXTFkXtVH-rmX3LXHtTftcbYurSYxWNp85qXcQfTA%3D%3D)
_Asking for a Friend_ (for Ages 8-12)
A story about queer joy and all the ups and downs of true friendship.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f64e8d7fd58d42e7b5bb8f90b87983f1&_e=TsMtjH6dH-NG89nInsEfO2ZwpPXL8FjFTGAv4JQK3086aorn825Se3T-iNUBmr7c-QqCYSFKFVdeP13Mihmi-j546IWBzJD-stIAu0KGTbjrt0HH4jSk78hdOH17vysqDl-ADJpI_034wsPMdEXsZl4uJLjfaRep7ZKyUpexh7fRBTa3MVd8ekPTlVdUOzSiPq_ZwViUJZ_EuCtGv0zMnPSsd9VU1AA0In9BLfDfQOR4Woe7D05FupnQm6hA9Tuqzj5asgAcEfIH3bz9IQr9AlUQypkARY6l6cLocGdvXkh_185FwVOyNKp1FPB7ojQdJdedlB9Qb7qvqKeA9bgnmVVFSqwO9ZBeNpBsT1htNX4uaVLrvXlgvJs3gMQPIW5MYyRf4oMjsgIAFOJlVcFhGg%3D%3D)
_Cut_ (for Ages 12 & up)
A novel about a young girl who cuts herself and her time in a psychiatric facility.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f64e8d7fd58d42e7b5bb8f90b87983f1&_e=TsMtjH6dH-NG89nInsEfO2ZwpPXL8FjFTGAv4JQK3086aorn825Se3T-iNUBmr7c-QqCYSFKFVdeP13Mihmi-j546IWBzJD-stIAu0KGTbjrt0HH4jSk78hdOH17vysqDl-ADJpI_034wsPMdEXsZl4uJLjfaRep7ZKyUpexh7fRBTa3MVd8ekPTlVdUOzSiPq_ZwViUJZ_EuCtGv0zMnPSsd9VU1AA0In9BLfDfQOS-YsxsyJhJCmUMTJY_9eAx12Byqou-BJ2Wfgc5CyoUU3RjUTs-Ni0BhNKFhjnr7jNRZIs0rTWf8FC0TSe_SIOcedwfbw0n0HmLmaQvf3dNLlPYtq0admYaNj9iHIkoUvAQ435juXZNUrPeME1b7FQ8wU1tThHVBiXR-AfxTTXbuw%3D%3D)
_Escape from St. Hell: My Trans Teen Life Levels Up_ (for Ages 14 & up)
The story of a teen coming into her own as a "trans man."

**Here is the single most impactful thing you can do to help disrupt Scholastic 's market dominance on school book fairs:**

Support SkyTree Book Fairs.

Our mission is to nurture childhood innocence through book fairs that allow children's imaginations to soar with stories that are rooted in truth. Our book fairs provide only wholesome, age-appropriate content to kids.

You can help us impact over 150,000 families through SkyTree Book Fairs.

[Our goal is to raise $83,000 this month to provide no-cost book fairs to schools. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $100, or more today and help us provide age-appropriate and inspiring book fairs to schools across the nation? I 've documented some of the books for you below so you can find them yourself if you don't believe me. Asking for a Friend (for Ages 8-12) A story about queer joy and all the ups and downs of true friendship. Cut (for Ages 12 & up) A novel about a young girl who cuts herself and her time in a psychiatric facility. Escape from St. Hell: My Trans Teen Life Levels Up (for Ages 14 & up) The story of a teen coming into her own as a "trans man." name: Dennis Speed
subject: End "Secret Government" Control of the Presidency!
body:
Join us live at 2pm ET for the Manhattan Project

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_filter_2&n=1)

| [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=gFB7Tylx1fPa2jOHrKCBPgxiYQCF3Z8E7LuYSZcINXGhbtgwOZOJzgpRRz6W9GawB231aJTG6ejaPpzJ6cKpGflj-7fpKELbv5I6gUmhSeI&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_filter_2&n=3 "Watch Here") [Watch Here](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=gFB7Tylx1fPa2jOHrKCBPgxiYQCF3Z8E7LuYSZcINXGhbtgwOZOJzgpRRz6W9GawB231aJTG6ejaPpzJ6cKpGflj-7fpKELbv5I6gUmhSeI&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_filter_2&n=3)
---
Send in your questions to _questions@laroucheorganization.com_**
**
**End "Secret Government" Control of the Presidency!
**
Friend —
What kind of an American Presidential transition process is the world seeing? What are we all actually witnessing? And are Americans willing, as Scottish poet Robert Burns said, “to see ourselves, as others see us?”

The world hears “Dr. Strangelove” lunatics, like Rear Admiral Thomas Buchanan, Director of the Plans and Policy Directorate of the U.S. Strategic Command, speak of making sure that the United States has enough spare thermonuclear weapons left over after World War Three, so that it can lead what’s left of the world afterwards! President-elect Trump, though, has said: “I disagree very vehemently with sending missiles hundreds of miles into Russia. Why are we doing that? We're just escalating this war and making it worse. That should not have been allowed to be done,” directly contradicting the action of the exiting “Collective Biden” Administration.

Perhaps the right question for the American people, is: What kind of Presidential transition will we, the people, make possible? Will we transition away from the “secret government” quasi-dictatorship that we have lived under since the “Reichstag fire” called “9/11,” or, instead, plunge further into the abyss of “inevitable thermonuclear war?” Eight-time Presidential candidate Lyndon LaRouche, even in the dark hours of 9/11, gave leadership, insisted upon calm, and proposed strategic alternatives based on physical economic development.

Today’s discussion features the work of LaRouche and his associates to propose that a new security and development architecture that can transition the world, including the American Presidency, from impending thermonuclear Hell to a world community of principle.
**Speakers: Harley Schlanger and Bill Jones
**
**2pm ET to discuss what YOU can do to mobilize.**
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=gFB7Tylx1fPa2jOHrKCBPgxiYQCF3Z8E7LuYSZcINXGhbtgwOZOJzgpRRz6W9GawB231aJTG6ejaPpzJ6cKpGflj-7fpKELbv5I6gUmhSeI&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_filter_2&n=4 "Watch Here") [Watch Here](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=gFB7Tylx1fPa2jOHrKCBPgxiYQCF3Z8E7LuYSZcINXGhbtgwOZOJzgpRRz6W9GawB231aJTG6ejaPpzJ6cKpGflj-7fpKELbv5I6gUmhSeI&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_filter_2&n=4)
---

**Talk soon,**
Dennis Speed
[LaRouche Organization](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_filter_2&n=5)

subject: Celebrate caregivers this holiday season 💌
body:
We’re thrilled to dive into the holiday season with our community.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98705934/517542182/664783965?ms=121424_thankyouholiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTNjZDE3Zi00OWJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHUGzzdQwopgFNERXHKUpvA8ESS-u3OUMDd6ftF-NQY=&emci=888198d5-d5b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=353cd17f-49ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
Hey Peter,
Hot cocoa, snowflakes, and shorter days are here! We’re thrilled to dive into the holiday season with our community.
This year, we’re thinking about — surprise — care! How have you given and received care this holiday season, or in seasons past?
We got so many messages of gratitude for caregivers last month, **so we decided to bring it back!**
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98705935/517542183/-652034714?ms=121424_thankyouholiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTNjZDE3Zi00OWJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHUGzzdQwopgFNERXHKUpvA8ESS-u3OUMDd6ftF-NQY=&emci=888198d5-d5b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=353cd17f-49ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)**
**[**_Share a thank-you message to caregivers ahead of the holidays:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98705936/517542184/-652034714?ms=121424_thankyouholiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTNjZDE3Zi00OWJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHUGzzdQwopgFNERXHKUpvA8ESS-u3OUMDd6ftF-NQY=&emci=888198d5-d5b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=353cd17f-49ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)**
**********__[Write your thank‐you note](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98705937/517542185/-652034714?ms=121424_thankyouholiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTNjZDE3Zi00OWJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHUGzzdQwopgFNERXHKUpvA8ESS-u3OUMDd6ftF-NQY=&emci=888198d5-d5b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=353cd17f-49ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)__**********
We hope to bring you some holiday cheer as we close out 2024 and look ahead to fighting for care in the new year.

clean_body: We’re thrilled to dive into the holiday season with our community. Hey Peter, Hot cocoa, snowflakes, and shorter days are here! We’re thrilled to dive into the holiday season with our community. This year, we’re thinking about — surprise — care! How have you given and received care this holiday season, or in seasons past? We got so many messages of gratitude for caregivers last month, so we decided to bring it back! **************** We hope to bring you some holiday cheer as we close out 2024 and look ahead to fighting for care in the new year. Thank you for sharing your messages with us! Care in Action

**Peter, in July, the Supreme Court ruled in _Trump vs. the United States_ that Presidents and Vice Presidents, from here on out, will have unlimited authority and immunity from prosecution.** _I don’t have to tell you how dangerous this could be, Peter!_

**In September, Senator Chuck Schumer introduced the _No Kings Act_ in response** to ensure that no President is above the law, because no one — much less the President of the United States — should be free from accountability or consequences.

**But in November, Trump won the presidency...** and with it, immunity and unchecked authority.

Now, we have limited time to act on the No Kings Act and stop Presidents from becoming above the law — but we need massive public support: [**That’s why I need to know, Peter: Do you support the No Kings Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98705961/517542294/-1940937628?refcode=RTFC_20241214_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNjZDE3Zi00OWJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ixr7-DV8dYAbBDkqvC3gnPdPt6T72hxuCwwUEHvPDTM=&emci=c0584e60-87b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=253cd17f-49ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=34594689) | [YES, I DO: NO ONE IS ABOVE THE LAW! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98705963/517542296/-1940937628?refcode=RTFC_20241214_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNjZDE3Zi00OWJhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ixr7-DV8dYAbBDkqvC3gnPdPt6T72hxuCwwUEHvPDTM=&emci=c0584e60-87b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=253cd17f-49ba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=34594689)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Top Democrat,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with Jack Smith after Trump said Smith should be thrown out of the country.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] signatures short of our goal!

[**Team, we can’t abandon Special Counsel Jack Smith. Fight for Reform

To: Top Democrat
❌ **DON’T SCROLL AWAY** ❌
❌ **DON’T DELETE THIS EMAIL** ❌
**DROP EVERYTHING AND READ THIS _AWFUL_ HEADLINE:**
**Trump is RELENTLESS in his attempts to intimidate Smith.**

**Smith must be under immense pressure. Now more than ever, he needs good Democrats like you to stand with him.**

Look, Jack Smith has done an amazing job as special counsel.

**But the GOP DOESN’T care.** They’re attacking Smith and his case from **_every angle_** in hopes of shielding Trump from justice!

We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith – if he doesn’t get enough support, his case against Trump could TOTALLY COLLAPSE.

name: Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
subject: RPVI News: Inauguration and Holiday Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | **RPVI News**
---
|
---
| **President Trump Inauguration** _Message from Chairman Yob_
---
| Dear Fellow Virgin Islands Republicans,I am excited to invite you to join us for the Inauguration of President Donald J. Trump and Vice President J.D. Vance on January 20, 2025, in Washington, D.C. This historic event celebrates the beginning of a brighter future for our nation under bold, conservative leadership. If you are interested in attending, please email us at [admin@rpvi.org](mailto:admin@rpvi.org).
---
| **Welcome Our New Executive Director**
---
| We are thrilled to announce Andrea Hedrington as the new Executive Director of the RPVI. With her unwavering dedication and vision for a stronger, more united party, Ms. Hedrington is poised to lead us into a new era of growth and success. Join us in congratulating Andrea on this vital role.
---
| **Tis’ The Season!**_Best Fellow Republicans – This Christmas, We Celebrate!_
---
| Let us hold the values that bind us close to our hearts: Faith, Family, and Country. From the vibrant Crucian Christmas Festival on St. Croix to the Miracle on Main Street on St. Thomas, the 23rd Annual All-Island Holiday Party at Mongoose Junction on St. John, and the Christmas Eve Party on Water Island, this season inspires hope, joy, and reflection.
We also celebrate the promise of a renewed America, guided by strong leadership and a vision for opportunity and prosperity for all Americans. Rooted in shared ideals of truth, justice, and common sense, we embrace the mission of building a brighter future for the Virgin Islands together.
On behalf of the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands, we wish you a Merry Christmas and a joyous Crucian Christmas Festival. May this season bring peace, love, and blessings to you and your loved ones.
---
| **Onward To 2025** _This Month’s Top Stories_
---
| **Wishing the First and Second Families a Merry Christmas**
---
| This holiday season, the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands extends our warmest wishes to President-Elect Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump and the whole First family; and Vice President-Elect J.D. Vance, Second Lady Mrs. Vance and their whole family. As we join Republicans nationwide in celebrating this joyous time, we send our heartfelt gratitude and prayers to the First and Second Families for a safe, peaceful, and happy holiday.
We look forward to their leadership as they guide our great nation toward a future of renewed strength and prosperity. Their dedication to making America great again encourages us all. We remain committed to upholding the values that make America exceptional around the world.
From the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands, we wish the First and Second Families a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.
**Eyes toward Inauguration Day January 20th!**
---
| **Reflections - Republican Party in the Virgin Islands**
---
| On February 8, 2024, the RPVI held its presidential caucus. The now President-Elect Donald J. Trump won decisively.
May 2024, John Yob succeeded Gordon Ackley as Chairman of the RPVI, marking a new chapter in leadership.
July 2024, The State Committee of the RPVI approved candidates for the ballot. We applaud their courage.
Delegates from the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands attended the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, WI this past August. Delegates represented exceptionally.
On November 5, 2024, Donald J. Trump along with our new VP JD Vance, was re-elected in the greatest political win in American history. America won! In a clean sweep, Republicans hold the House of Representatives, the Senate and the White House. We eagerly anticipate the four years to come.
---
| **Across the Nation**
---
| President-Elect Donald J. Trump swept 2,552 counties across the nation, compared to 382 counties to the opposing campaign. 54 counties flipped from Democrat to Republican in the 2024 elections. The Democrats were decimated.
---
| **Lara Trump - RNC Co-Chair Steps Down** _The Wall Street Journal_
---
| Lara Trump has stepped down from her role as RNC co-chair. This move aligns with discussions about her potential appointment to the U.S. Senate seat from Florida, pending Senator Marco Rubio's anticipated confirmation as Secretary of State.
---
| **President-Elect Trump Endorses KC Crosbie** _The NY Post_
---
| Following Lara Trump's resignation, President-elect Trump has endorsed KC Crosbie, the current RNC treasurer and Kentucky representative, to assume the position of co-chair. Crosbie is recognized for her exceptional fundraising capabilities and efforts to strengthen the party's financial foundation.
---
| **Here, At Home**
---
| Reported in V.I. Consortium on January 11, 2024, Chief Judge of the V.I. District Court Robert Molloy ruled in favor of the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands and struck down several of the territory's election laws as unconstitutional, in the lawsuit against the V.I. Board of Elections and Elections Supervisor Caroline Fawkes. The court affirmed, government entities do not have the authority to interfere with a political party's internal processes for selecting officers and candidates. The integrity of the ballot is still in question and may have impacted Republican candidates for office in the territory. The fight to protect the vote continues.
---
| **Coming Next from the RPVI**
---
| The RPVI’s comprehensive plan to strengthen the party’s local presence, collaborate with the RNC goals and objectives, and align with President Trump’s 20 CORE PROMISES TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN is near completion.
Together, we will create strategies to increase voter registration, outreach, and engagement. We will develop common core messages to unite us. By the next election in 2026, the RPVI intends to surpass fundraising records, ensure election integrity, and improve voter turnout. Full Action Plan forthcoming.
---
| **Change Makers of the RPVI!**
---
| _We congratulate the following Republicans who won their campaign._ Board of Elections St. Croix District – Liliana Belardo-OnealBoard of Elections St. Croix District – Michael JosephBoard of Elections St. Croix District – Cleopatra PeterBoard of Elections St. Thomas/St. John District – Barbara LaRondeBoard of Elections St. John, St. Thomas/St. John District – Nathan Fletcher
_We also congratulate the following Republican aspirants on their hard-run campaigns._ Delegate to Congress – Ronald PickardLegislature St. Croix District – Krystal HardyBoard of Elections St. Croix District – Franz A. Christian, Jr.Sixth Constitutional Convention St. Croix District – Johann A. ClendeninLegislature St. Thomas District – Derrick CallwoodLegislature St. Thomas District – Collister FahieBoard of Education St. Croix District – Sophia del Rosario
---
| **Information About Election Day in the Virgin Islands**
---
| **A Look Back at History** _Republicans, the Party of Freedom_
---
| The Republican Party initially united in 1854 by the promise to abolish slavery. The Party of Abraham Lincoln has always stood for freedom, prosperity, and opportunity. We recognize God-given liberties while promoting opportunity for every American. Republicans believe in liberty, economic prosperity, preserving American values and traditions, and restoring the American dream for every citizen of this great nation. As a party, we support policies that seek to achieve those goals.
---
| **RPVI Bingo: Join the Fun!**
---
| We’re excited to announce the first round of RPVI Bingo! This interactive game is limited to 30 players, so don’t miss your chance to participate.
How to Join: Click the button below to receive your Bingo card and get ready to play.Winning Announcement: Winners will be announced in the next RPVI Newsletter, so stay tuned to see if you’re one of the lucky ones!
Good luck, and may the best Bingo player win!
---
[Join Bingo!](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aec4429d4907d8f643606ded&id=a20d0273ce&e=4f81ceec6f)
| **RPVI Dictionary**
---
| **Sublimate:** to express, such as an impulse, desire, or feeling—in a changed form that is socially acceptable.
"You might think that because I am arguing that the happiest path is one in which we sublimate our true feelings and desires through greater self-control, I am not..." _— Arthur C. Brookes, The Atlantic, 2 May 2024_
---
| **RPVI Polling**
---
| Take the survey for a chance to win RPVI merchandise and prizes!
---
[Start Survey](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aec4429d4907d8f643606ded&id=3a1c679cc1&e=4f81ceec6f)
| **News From The RPVI WhatsApp Chat** _Republicans, the Party of Freedom_
---
| Newly registered Republican Bhagwandeen Persad took the initiative to create a WhatsApp Chat for Republicans across the territory. This platform is a fantastic step toward improving communication, sharing ideas to better the Virgin Islands, and announcing upcoming events.
Be part of the conversation! Text 340-513-0265 to join the chat and stay connected. Keynotes and updates from the chat will be shared in the newsletter. Registered Republicans only.
---
| **Introducing the RPVI Community Notes Section**
---
| We’re thrilled to announce the new RPVI Community Notes section of our newsletter! This space is reserved just for you—our valued Republican family—to share your thoughts, ideas, announcements, or anything else you’d like.
Whether it’s a local event, a shout out to a fellow Republican, or a message of encouragement, this is your platform to connect and contribute to the conversation.Have something to share? Send us your note, and it could be featured in the next edition of the RPVI Newsletter!
Let’s build stronger connections, one note at a time. Send your note to [admin@rpvi.org](mailto:admin@rpvi.org) or call/text to 340-513-0265. Hoodeehoo!
---
| **Get Involved**
---
| Become an active member of the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands [www.rpvi.org](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aec4429d4907d8f643606ded&id=a0591900a4&e=4f81ceec6f) or contact us directly to sign up.
Be a part of our outreach programs and community events. Your time and effort make a difference.
Follow us on social media for updates, events, and news.
---
|

Trump and Vice President J.D. Vance on January 20, 2025, in Washington, D.C. This historic event celebrates the beginning of a brighter future for our nation under bold, conservative leadership. If you are interested in attending, please email us at mailto:admin@rpvi.org. | Welcome Our New Executive Director | We are thrilled to announce Andrea Hedrington as the new Executive Director of the RPVI. We also celebrate the promise of a renewed America, guided by strong leadership and a vision for opportunity and prosperity for all Americans. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You are absolutely right
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0f2b1544d1f44ea49fa9cceab6045b2c&_e=9ryomcZPP_d40eIR54mFPfgFpt-PsI7safC9WogWbdPMeZ20isd-KwpS9xjhRn_YZv-OEULejlKk1HzNxtIPITMk9WzqVbjU6cyziZEb_1TVIsTtrfLOS3Atp63OksLHJuaiknjglM1QtlnQUZTqGGarBmLrVnfaKJXpHxpWaCKE5eNKmnHOzKQjzdkaZrssUgcmU49M_3UZs_1oxiwqFxcRdgzyWOkn_jkrwWbp7e6hcUiplpsiTRHHxjdJVT9AC0KQnat74yja7l93zoXXfCjCoZ3M7DltWkL4RdV0Km1MzFwCLW0BGz8XFCiRQf4y-A78hfg6yHxC7p0fA9OUPA7PULQb_BcAN7F5PICNxBxKc7y4RrKDecrgIEebsvROlQMjp6y-epMdoboBKnUeOw%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0f2b1544d1f44ea49fa9cceab6045b2c&_e=9ryomcZPP_d40eIR54mFPfgFpt-PsI7safC9WogWbdPMeZ20isd-KwpS9xjhRn_YZv-OEULejlKk1HzNxtIPITMk9WzqVbjU6cyziZEb_1TVIsTtrfLOS3Atp63OksLHJuaiknjglM1QtlnQUZTqGGarBmLrVnfaKJXpHxpWaCKE5eNKmnHOzKQjzdkaZrssUgcmU49M_3UZs_1oxiwqFxcRdgzyWOkn_jkrwWbp7e6hcUiplpsiTRHHxjdJVT9A8TzscrB4as_B7-MprrDmvuspXsVRvFRL4RF17tBBirah9Us7pyOEFZY_FJmRXReWNgSP_KX4RX3Oi-8FYAfDiq2kL6uJlhAUoLGhDk1V54JFhAxMcWqvaLRCCG7LjoHRiqptKxfISf5lEUkcGSg5Fg%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0f2b1544d1f44ea49fa9cceab6045b2c&_e=9ryomcZPP_d40eIR54mFPfgFpt-PsI7safC9WogWbdPMeZ20isd-KwpS9xjhRn_YZv-OEULejlKk1HzNxtIPITMk9WzqVbjU6cyziZEb_1TVIsTtrfLOS3Atp63OksLHJuaiknjglM1QtlnQUZTqGGarBmLrVnfaKJXpHxpWaCKE5eNKmnHOzKQjzdkaZrssUgcmU49M_3UZs_1oxiwqFxcRdgzyWOkn_jkrwWbp7e6hcUiplpsiTRHHxjdJVT9AL5WpGxhUVDtr81xtyI8tzYsFta0rkA5K5vdbIGQ8N4iq1KXEtZNlYhek6X_THF3PaUo1dZjtIbDjY7k1UIYblxZWiUxQaESx1c6dNRRoFi5JVcM8SgBDSvMFrDo7-14fABAKwZ4Gw3ek05e7UKIRVw%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0f2b1544d1f44ea49fa9cceab6045b2c&_e=9ryomcZPP_d40eIR54mFPfgFpt-PsI7safC9WogWbdPMeZ20isd-KwpS9xjhRn_YZv-OEULejlKk1HzNxtIPITMk9WzqVbjU6cyziZEb_1TVIsTtrfLOS3Atp63OksLHJuaiknjglM1QtlnQUZTqGGarBmLrVnfaKJXpHxpWaCKE5eNKmnHOzKQjzdkaZrssUgcmU49M_3UZs_1oxiwqFxcRdgzyWOkn_jkrwWbp7e6hcUiplpsiTRHHxjdJVT9AG-_0Ldinfm3RW3oWIGHnlSacw_i6ObyZY5nkxzFEi6gh02X3kuirvNy2-N4ZzcXbkYcg9F0N9KdhH3HSg4KVrntgreHCBTW2XjJPlktGqZuUubqPI7m4KjRwd81E-FsXyDpYvc0v24ZiDdd0nMf7Bw%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0f2b1544d1f44ea49fa9cceab6045b2c&_e=9ryomcZPP_d40eIR54mFPfgFpt-PsI7safC9WogWbdPMeZ20isd-KwpS9xjhRn_YZv-OEULejlKk1HzNxtIPITMk9WzqVbjU6cyziZEb_1TVIsTtrfLOS3Atp63OksLHJuaiknjglM1QtlnQUZTqGGarBmLrVnfaKJXpHxpWaCKE5eNKmnHOzKQjzdkaZrssUgcmU49M_3UZs_1oxiwqFxcRdgzyWOkn_jkrwWbp7e6hcUiplpsiTRHHxjdJVT9AcPwOoMiNk8e0ny0y9QJxt8ymqsZIS1FEvHiQVScSw_u4Zp116x_66kR_urvOXOCyRreqT2qR4NzrtyA1mEAbTCM3IOMFshKQRYHgNqL9VoB0UHt9scutb-7DYWisiLOQVLgBt1iA5zOtDc2Jf8GKZA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0f2b1544d1f44ea49fa9cceab6045b2c&_e=9ryomcZPP_d40eIR54mFPfgFpt-PsI7safC9WogWbdPMeZ20isd-KwpS9xjhRn_YZv-OEULejlKk1HzNxtIPITMk9WzqVbjU6cyziZEb_1TVIsTtrfLOS3Atp63OksLHJuaiknjglM1QtlnQUZTqGGarBmLrVnfaKJXpHxpWaCKE5eNKmnHOzKQjzdkaZrssUgcmU49M_3UZs_1oxiwqFxcRdgzyWOkn_jkrwWbp7e6hcUiplpsiTRHHxjdJVT9A85yB7H2BUEDmLbmTldr6g96Z1T3TTxIeeWuQoDElQtWLqa7wpuMfiFXgkQw8FH1SRr4hBpfn5XAUJ3M8e1QXUNAxdQ_aZjWgIOSvRXUrCYMrIQP-RA6PZHQNkeiVGv52tahLJZyNjJuroXaSeLmSPQ%3D%3D)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---

---

Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

---
Dear Peter,
---
I pray to God that President Trump can drain the swamp, because our Republic is in a very dark place right now.
---
The freedoms you and I always took for granted as U.S. citizens are _GONE_.
---
My rights and fate are now at the mercy of an Obama-appointed federal judge who has intervened in my $148 MILLION legal battle.
---
**“Rudy Giuliani’s legal woes continue to worsen as a federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened the embattled former New York City mayor with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’”**
---
[Source: _Law & Crime News_]
---
Stalin never could’ve _dreamed_ of having a weaponized legal system like the one wreaking havoc on America right now!
---
_How in the world am I supposed to pay $148 million?_
---
They’ve already taken my home, my car, my money, my credit card.
---
**_They even want to freeze my Social Security!_**
---
What happened to the Eighth Amendment of the Constitution:_"Excessive bail shall not be required, nor excessive fines imposed, nor cruel and unusual punishments inflicted."_
---
That’s why I will say for the hundredth time that this battle goes beyond _me_ as an individual. It’s about whether we are still a free Republic or if vengeance and lawfare now rule our nation.
---
**As I face threats of “imprisonment” and “severe sanctions,” I’m turning to my fellow citizens like you in one final hope to fight for my FREEDOM.**

subject: Don’t let Trump destroy the NOAA.

body:
When profits come before safety, we all lose.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98706736/517543796/1328794144?refcode=ea.47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YWM0NjI3LTRjYmEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iE_7sz-n8jUvzSunrxlMCsx96oj8cydNNM3bRNM1VvE=&emci=39ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
In just a few weeks, Donald Trump will be sworn into office, and his administration will begin to dismantle _decades_ worth of climate progress. One of their most immediate targets? **The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA).** The NOAA might not be a household name, but it does vital, behind-the-scenes work that touches every corner of our lives. **_It’s NOAA satellites that monitor hurricanes, NOAA scientists who issue tornado warnings, and even NOAA data that helps communities assess risks and prepare for damage from extreme weather events._** Trump’s allies accuse the NOAA of being part of the so-called _“climate change alarm industry”_ and are determined to dismantle it. They want to gut its functions, privatize its operations, and leave us without independent, reliable weather forecasts. Instead, we’d be forced to rely on profit-driven companies that prioritize earnings over public safety. We can’t let Congress sit by and watch Trump’s plan unfold. **[Sign on to our petition to demand the NOAA stays independent and free from profit-driven agendas — because protecting lives and our planet must come before partisan interests.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98706737/517543797/-467164167?refcode=ea.47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YWM0NjI3LTRjYmEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iE_7sz-n8jUvzSunrxlMCsx96oj8cydNNM3bRNM1VvE=&emci=39ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** | [**TAKE ACTION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98706738/517543798/-467164167?refcode=ea.47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YWM0NjI3LTRjYmEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iE_7sz-n8jUvzSunrxlMCsx96oj8cydNNM3bRNM1VvE=&emci=39ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
This isn’t just about dismantling the NOAA — it’s about replacing truth with _alternative facts._ For Trump, the NOAA represents everything he despises: science, accountability, and evidence. His administration wants to silence the NOAA to hide the realities of the climate crisis, weaken our ability to prepare for disasters, and serve the interests of his Big Oil allies.
We’re running out of time. If we don’t speak out now, we could lose one of the most essential resources for accurate weather forecasting, disaster preparedness, and climate science.
**[Add your name to the petition and demand that Congress step in to protect the NOAA before it’s too late!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98706743/517543801/-467164167?refcode=ea.47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YWM0NjI3LTRjYmEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iE_7sz-n8jUvzSunrxlMCsx96oj8cydNNM3bRNM1VvE=&emci=39ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=47ac4627-4cba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)**

name: Keith
subject: I'm suing Glock
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

For decades, Glock has known that their handguns can quickly and easily be converted into illegal machine guns. The company refuses to fix this problem by changing their designs.

Converted handguns are dangerous to kids, communities, and law enforcement. But Glock has turned a blind eye to the surge of injuries and deaths caused by these weapons, and they continue to promote and glamorize fully automatic firearms that are illegal in the United States.

Glock has gotten away with making, marketing, and selling products that put people’s lives in danger for far too long. That’s why I announced this week that I am suing to hold Glock accountable.

If you agree that corporations shouldn’t put greed ahead of people’s safety, please add your name to show support for our lawsuit.

ADD YOUR NAME: https://secure.ngpvan.com/uD4d8mG-TU-Ufs9ZMmAQFg2

As America’s largest handgun manufacturer, Glock has profited from ignoring public safety issues fueled by their products.

Our suit asks the court to compel Glock to make design changes and relinquish profits they gained through illegal activity.

Peter, will you stand with me as I seek to put a stop to Glock’s negligence and reduce gun violence?

ADD YOUR NAME: https://secure.ngpvan.com/uD4d8mG-TU-Ufs9ZMmAQFg2

Thank you,

Keith

Attorney General Keith Ellison is the People’s Lawyer, fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241214ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417

Minneapolis, MN 55417

clean_body: | | | URGENT: Friend, the MAGA takeover is upon us, and we must act NOW! MAGA Senator Marsha Blackburn has unveiled the catastrophic "DOGE Acts," a legislative assault crafted to serve unelected billionaires Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy. Their sinister plan? To obliterate vital government programs under the deceitful guise of cost-cutting! Blackburn's bill threatens to dismantle our federal infrastructure by relocating agencies, freezing hiring and pay, and enshrining Trump's draconian Schedule F that would grant him unchecked power to fire federal workers at will, jeopardizing the very fabric of our democracy! The MAGA party has repeatedly shown its willingness to sacrifice the well-being of everyday Americans to line the pockets of the ultra-rich. The time to reclaim Congress from their greedy clutches is NOW, and the need has never been more urgent! | ** The stakes are SKY-HIGH! Without urgent action, essential lifelines like Social Security, Medicare, SNAP, and Medicaid could be obliterated, leaving millions of Americans defenseless! SEND A RESOUNDING MESSAGE: We refuse to let the rich get richer while the rest of us suffer. Stand with us in this fight for justice and equality. Together, we can make a difference. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . | | Dear Peter, You’re receiving this email today because you’re a part of Oregon League of Conservation Voters’ dedicated and passionate member base. You believe in OLCV’s work, their ability to deliver results, and most importantly, you believe in fighting to protect Oregon’s climate and environment. I’m OLCV’s Board Chair for the same reasons. I know how vital and lifesaving OLCV’s work is. There’s no denying the state of our climate, and now that we’re on the verge of yet another Trump presidency, I cannot express how critical standing up for our climate is. [**We’ve got a lot of work to do in 2025 and I want to make sure that we’ve got the resources we need to fight everyday to protect Oregon’s clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98707057/517544638/118968535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczYzliYmIwLTRkYmEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=opNLByzeh0DQjEiGvWRxowb-YNY5Ui0djy-mYp72lEU=&emci=fd0b6072-3fb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=73c9bbb0-4dba-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) That’s why just for today I am **personally matching gifts to OLCV up to $1500.** What can $1500 do?
* Sponsor an OLCV campaign fellow and help train the next generation of climate leaders
* Recruit 30 new volunteers
* Help us put on our annual Volunteer Leadership Retreat to equip our volunteer leaders with the tools they need to be effective advocates for Oregon’s environment

Thank you for considering donating to OLCV, your gift - _of any amount_ \- funds the fight to protect our environment for our friends, family, and future generations, one that we’ve all joined hands in. Together in this fight,Paige SpenceOLCV Board Chair
---

Despite plenty of major stories to cover—Donald Trump’s cabinet announcements, the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, and chaos in Syria—the network’s primetime lineup tanked, averaging just 367,000 total viewers last week. For context, that’s fewer viewers than the Food Network [...]

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Tomorrow night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We were taking a look at our 2024 fundraising records, and here’s what we have on file for you:
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241214-4589-footer&t=1&akid=4589%2E420207%2EPqp3Pp)
Peter, tomorrow night is our December mid-month deadline, and we still need help to reach our $7,000 fundraising goal. We were taking a look at our 2024 fundraising records, and here’s what we have on file for you:
**2024 Supporter Record for You** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2024 Donor?:** No — not yet! **Suggested donation:[$3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241214?refcode=em20241214-4589&amount=3&refcode2=4589_420207_Pqp3Pp&akid=4589%2E420207%2EPqp3Pp)**
---
_(FYI: If you donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!)_
[**Unfortunately, fundraising has slowed down since the election. As of right now, we’re about $4,900 away from reaching our mid-month goal. Can you pitch in $3 today to help us get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241214?refcode=em20241214-4589&amount=3&refcode2=4589_420207_Pqp3Pp&akid=4589%2E420207%2EPqp3Pp)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241214?amount=3&refcode=em20241214-4589&refcode2=4589_420207_Pqp3Pp&akid=4589%2E420207%2EPqp3Pp)**
We have a lot of work to do in the months ahead. Not only will Pramila be working to hold Trump accountable in Congress, she’ll also be fighting to end the influence of corporate PACs in Democratic primaries and rebuild our party around a bold, populist, working class agenda.
That’s the only way we’re ever going to make progress on the kind of transformative agenda working families need: Medicare for All, raising the minimum wage, implementing paid family and medical leave, free college and job training for everyone, and more.
**It’s not going to be easy, but with this people-powered movement behind us, we know we can get it done. In 2018 Pramila was one of the first candidates for Congress to win while rejecting corporate PAC money, and the support of this grassroots team was crucial.**
[**So Peter, if you can, please pitch in $3 or more today to help us reach our mid-month goal. We’re going to need your support as we fight to rebuild our party for the working class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241214?refcode=em20241214-4589&amount=3&refcode2=4589_420207_Pqp3Pp&akid=4589%2E420207%2EPqp3Pp)
In solidarity,
PramilaForCongress.com
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241214-4589-footer&t=2&refcode2=4589_420207_Pqp3Pp&akid=4589%2E420207%2EPqp3Pp)**
---
