Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Friend, Twelve years ago today, a devastating tragedy took place at Sandy Hook Elementary School that claimed the lives of 20 children and 6 educators. The events that unfolded on that day left a nation in mourning. I can never fully comprehend the depth of loss endured by the communities affected. My heart is with them today and every day as they navigate a grief that no one should have to endure. On this somber anniversary, we honor the lives of those who were taken too soon. Additionally, we recognize the strength of the survivors and the unwavering resilience of the Sandy Hook community. Today serves as a solemn reminder of the work that needs to be done to address the epidemic of gun violence across the country. Let us take a moment to reflect on what needs to be done, and strive for a world where every child and teacher feels safe in the classroom. May we hold the memory of those lost in our hearts and honor them through our actions. — Eric Swalwell

_\---Forwarded Message from Team Ruiz---_
Hi there, it’s Team Ruiz, writing out of California’s 25th.
We’ll be frank: Though the past few weeks have been nothing short of a whirlwind, it pales in comparison to what we’re going to face over the course of the next month.
Since the election, Donald Trump has been preparing to enact his Project 2025 agenda by packing his cabinet full of staunch MAGA loyalists.
From Wall Street executives out of touch with the needs of everyday Americans to Fox News hosts with a history of backing his every move, Trump will have all the tools he needs to make good on his campaign promises.
The same promises that fundamentally threaten our freedoms, our democracy, and our future. **We have to be prepared.**
That’s why we need all the help we can get to reach our final mid-month fundraising goal before the end of the year. Hitting our $15,000 benchmark before Sunday at midnight is what will put us on track to finish 2024 strong, and enter the new year with the support we need to be a firewall against his dangerous agenda.

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

clean_body: Did you get our message from yesterday? While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Team, did you get our message from yesterday? We bumped it for you below, in case you missed it. ⬇️ Here’s the gist: As we close out 2024, it’s more important than ever that we’re strengthening our Democratic firewall against Donald Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. We’re sending Dr. Ruiz back to Congress to do just that, but ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow, we need to show our strength in numbers and hit our $15,000 benchmark. = | | = \---Forwarded Message from Team Ruiz--- Hi there, it’s Team Ruiz, writing out of California’s 25th. We’ll be frank: Though the past few weeks have been nothing short of a whirlwind, it pales in comparison to what we’re going to face over the course of the next month. Since the election, Donald Trump has been preparing to enact his Project 2025 agenda by packing his cabinet full of staunch MAGA loyalists. From Wall Street executives out of touch with the needs of everyday Americans to Fox News hosts with a history of backing his every move, Trump will have all the tools he needs to make good on his campaign promises. The same promises that fundamentally threaten our freedoms, our democracy, and our future. We have to be prepared. That’s why we need all the help we can get to reach our final mid-month fundraising goal before the end of the year. Hitting our $15,000 benchmark before Sunday at midnight is what will put us on track to finish 2024 strong, and enter the new year with the support we need to be a firewall against his dangerous agenda. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Thank you Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
Peter,

Today, I addressed the State Central Committee of our party and let them know I have decided not to run for another term as our party’s Chairman.

I have made it my mission to rebuild our party and to go everywhere in our state. Over the past four years we have held over 150 events in every corner of our state, and made organizational and electoral progress our priorities.

We have tripled our overall number of donors (thank you!), made critical investments in our technology, data, and tools, and modernized our party. I have used my voice on the DNC to advocate for more national support for all state parties.

Last year, we flipped six of Indiana’s largest 50 cities, and elected new mayors and councilors to local communities throughout our state. That will be one of my proudest accomplishments — seeing newly elected Democratic leaders who bring passion and enthusiasm to serving our state.

Even this year in the face of a national wave, we held the line and re-elected every member of our Statehouse teams and both of our members of Congress. But there is still so much work to do.

I’m excited to see new leaders, new ideas, and new strategies emerge to get more Hoosiers to vote, and to vote for Democrats, in the future.

I’m thankful for all of you for allowing me this opportunity, and I’m hopeful we have moved Indiana in the right direction toward more balance and common sense.

Thank you,
Mike Schmuhl

name: THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS [From House GOP]
subject: Of all the emails you’ve received today, this is BY FAR the most important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant.
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

name: Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: INVITATION: Prince William Delegation Virtual Town Hall - 12/19, 7pm
body:
| |
---
# You're Invited!
Prince William County State Delegation
Pre-Session Town Hall - Dec 19th, 7pm
---
| [ ](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/xFUTPwaSS7nekAh5r-PxNQ~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpQGcIP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvcHdjdG93bmhhbGwyMDI1VwNzcGNCCmdVCuJdZ3UyKEJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAru)
---
## We want to hear from you!
---
You are cordially invited to share your feedback and priorities with Prince William County Legislators on December 19th at 7:00-8:30pm via Zoom. The PWC Delegation will update you on their legislative priorities and listen to your priorities in a respectful, non-partisan public event. All are welcome! We kindly ask that you please register in advance for the link.
---
[ Register Here ](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/xFUTPwaSS7nekAh5r-PxNQ~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpQGcIP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvcHdjdG93bmhhbGwyMDI1VwNzcGNCCmdVCuJdZ3UyKEJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAru)
---
|
---
_The Honorable Briana D. Sewell \-- 25th House District_ _DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov_
---
[**Unsubscribe**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/0jiMv2y6y89C6sIJDRlbYA~~/AAS2ygA~) from future updates
---

Your gift today of $50 will help sponsor ONE MORE student to attend ... your gift of $100 will help sponsor TWO MORE students to attend ... and so on.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ff84c38a964f408080b14d58e601f6a2&_e=Q9-bbbCS2FmNiCkjKC-n3E8kq3OfV6i1agGfH6YiUsn7tZ2RMJzJ-kvAQuv7m9-_zzzh3KAg6TKVYrFbJo3Pn22Kpen17PIsCCJpZSDi-9xCHHtkkA2WtR9TMoJg2ne7WIU5yxeILAuK1uD09yll9lYRnJGv_ePr-7lwFgBtCYOYhr0sbWLxDXhR4UqN2jXJrX8N8zBOMhcPklXaAZBRDPSaxhDdYkdvUNID191_TvFwm9aaxPAL91iKjBa5NQx7riedU6mcKjOjafE-CsSa4VnHTQlk7T8n2M10Xib4OSol9u2Ucf49lptsAqkvx0Un)** But any amount is a true blessing ... and it will help me bring another patriotic young person to this year's AMERICAFEST.

[ **Support the AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ff84c38a964f408080b14d58e601f6a2&_e=Q9-bbbCS2FmNiCkjKC-n3E8kq3OfV6i1agGfH6YiUsn7tZ2RMJzJ-kvAQuv7m9-_zzzh3KAg6TKVYrFbJo3Pn22Kpen17PIsCCJpZSDi-9xCHHtkkA2WtR9TMoJg2ne7WIU5yxeILAuK1uD09yll9ibAOZkNbpXtU9MNt3B72yDB0luelkaLvlH8idoyJ3cQPKQYahhrUDneydWzTbMQuX0SW_gpEGKwHtZ_fdZ-H-Qlj4XznwOlCLCP_SGtHQdQnVEL21FYDqSvHY_WeIGSxL5XraZOj5yQ7tk0v3xHuY3UJP6Jb2tJuvZMYImpNAol)

Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, this year's event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the American Culture War. Over four action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will:
* **Hear from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative movement** , including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY GAINES, and MANY MORE,

* **Get critical activism and leadership TRAINING** so these hard-working kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS MORE in their generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and

* **Build a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS** -- with 15,000+ attendees from ALL 50 states! -- so that our pro-America Movement is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading into 2025!

_Your gift today to Turning Point USA 's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund could be the reason that a young conservative from <<%STATE% / default: your state >>, or elsewhere in America, can join this one-of-a-kind event._ **[Peter, would you consider a gift of $50 to help sponsor ONE MORE student ... a gift of $100 to help sponsor TWO MORE students ... and so on? clean_body: I’ve been hearing from THOUSANDS of students| | | Peter, The Turning Point USA team has heard from THOUSANDS of America-loving young people about AMERICAFEST 2024 -- and I don't want to turn away ANY student! With MILLIONS MORE young people turning away from Leftism and deciding to LOVE AMERICA again, Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is on track to be our BIGGEST EVENT EVER. But any amount is a true blessing ... and it will help me bring another patriotic young person to this year's AMERICAFEST. Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, this year's event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the American Culture War. Over four action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will: Hear from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative movement , including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY GAINES, and MANY MORE, Get critical activism and leadership TRAINING so these hard-working kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS MORE in their generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and Build a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS -- with 15,000+ attendees from ALL 50 states! -- so that our pro-America Movement is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading into 2025! Your gift today to Turning Point USA 's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund could be the reason that a young conservative from <<%STATE% / default: your state >>, or elsewhere in America, can join this one-of-a-kind event. ** Earlier this year, I told Turning Point USA supporters that -- when we worked together -- we could inspire GEN Z to become the MOST CONSERVATIVE and MOST PATRIOTIC youth generation EVER. Now we have seen the BIGGEST CONSERVATIVE SHIFT among young people in generations! While we must celebrate this MASSIVE VICTORY, we must also continue to press our advantage and keep up the pressure on the "Woke" Left ... so we can make this PERMANENT GENERATIONAL CHANGE. | Peter,

Last week, I asked you to let me know what issues you care most about going into 2025. We received an overwhelming number of responses, and it’s been a great way for me to learn more about what issues matter most to my top supporters — like you.

**These were the top three issues that received the most responses:** **Protecting reproductive rights
Preventing gun violence
Combatting climate change** Thank you for taking the time to share your priorities. These issues are also incredibly important to me and will continue to be priorities in my 2025 campaign to serve as the next Governor of Virginia.

I know the importance of safeguarding our rights, defending our democracy, protecting our environment, and making sure that every Virginian — no matter where they live — is safe. name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: This might be our last Christmas together
body:
Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. | | | I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46f49c500c5f411e8e401e553c0d9886&_e=yvQs5ToTOouPQ8_zVU4XeAcSZAAUfdTy5jLMRqVgLbTybAaRUfbRydJGizWzAhBHni0-boJhCrNSRKbq0i4uKyFGaJzPsHhy2f6uhu40yEJZ7yO7iOu2bLCuwOCzupzpwR2PiiszlhDvzlGfRkHTRxKdKBoh1_KViVJsib_90MOMbfo_fBllI1mPg5dXarQDCtxgfONlHyll9A2Gy_JoAOP45gORMXxsCOMwyCOfQ8ce7xZSFxRn9iOehjrCno3X7CHmu-3vqclNwkYSc2kKdS63_Vjz6PvOaOSd_ksNZe1l-yJJXG1wXqdcD1KKIqedvLIEnUvjKk5aLe46DwR_1A-AdDdcE2QYX9bYk2lUxpb6--mpZV7T7SnxTAG-dbpIZUzIuWR8TZ66Y1KeEwsA_w%3D%3D)
---
Looking at it used to make me so happy. It brought back all the wonderful memories we've made as a family during the Christmas season. But now it makes me cry realizing that this might be the last Christmas our little boys get to spend with their father.My husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department.I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster......but from a Soros-funded, anti-police prosecutor. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46f49c500c5f411e8e401e553c0d9886&_e=yvQs5ToTOouPQ8_zVU4XeAcSZAAUfdTy5jLMRqVgLbTybAaRUfbRydJGizWzAhBHni0-boJhCrNSRKbq0i4uKyFGaJzPsHhy2f6uhu40yEJZ7yO7iOu2bLCuwOCzupzpwR2PiiszlhDvzlGfRkHTRxKdKBoh1_KViVJsib_90MOMbfo_fBllI1mPg5dXarQDCtxgfONlHyll9A2Gy_JoAOP45gORMXxsCOMwyCOfQ8ce7xZSFxRn9iOehjrCno3XQo_ZS-ftCo9LAqZXaCi-cHI_nTkCtGjC2MMBvzNWaLTX0UpPraxUdid_frAH-LGUhFWwNrxy9S1iyuYgR0XHlWFQZcsqimGDFcY4Ko3UzbZNMkH4IGFXh1iQvga-_-wPRqesNeiQaet9g3GVw4PxFg%3D%3D)** Instead of enjoying this Christmas season, my family will be thinking about and dreading the coming of February when **this Soros-funded prosecutor will try to rip** **my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for 11 years -- for saving a fellow officer's life.** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, moved to detain the suspect who was carrying a knife, the suspect got violent.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him.In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us.I couldn't have been more wrong.Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who hates the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black......this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious.My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer.But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys.And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks......Brad will miss 11 years of Christmases, birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games.As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family.Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson.Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available.So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46f49c500c5f411e8e401e553c0d9886&_e=yvQs5ToTOouPQ8_zVU4XeAcSZAAUfdTy5jLMRqVgLbTybAaRUfbRydJGizWzAhBHni0-boJhCrNSRKbq0i4uKyFGaJzPsHhy2f6uhu40yEJZ7yO7iOu2bLCuwOCzupzpwR2PiiszlhDvzlGfRkHTRxKdKBoh1_KViVJsib_90MOMbfo_fBllI1mPg5dXarQDCtxgfONlHyll9A2Gy_JoAOP45gORMXxsCOMwyCOfQ8ce7xZSFxRn9iOehjrCno3X2qCHy70l0vbBtBI5dmzRsEs3nVvaSmCT1jRSoEeMNHKiw3A8BvN1GM_Y8bczuAlj3tL54sZAOdulTZDfDbfr8sFstXKrR4eDaed5l24THX0qqsvTtDcbhcNsK4AYsZSBku5ueR0pFjPr6rSTEVqTNw%3D%3D)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. [**So I pray this Christmas season you'll find it in your heart to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.****this Christmas season****you'll find it in your heart to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46f49c500c5f411e8e401e553c0d9886&_e=yvQs5ToTOouPQ8_zVU4XeAcSZAAUfdTy5jLMRqVgLbTybAaRUfbRydJGizWzAhBHni0-boJhCrNSRKbq0i4uKyFGaJzPsHhy2f6uhu40yEJZ7yO7iOu2bLCuwOCzupzpwR2PiiszlhDvzlGfRkHTRxKdKBoh1_KViVJsib_90MOMbfo_fBllI1mPg5dXarQDCtxgfONlHyll9A2Gy_JoAOP45gORMXxsCOMwyCOfQ8ce7xZSFxRn9iOehjrCno3Xjbc_IBhamQXq8crYjgef4pCQt1HK_pT0iudvy73HJu41Q6dpiXsbblgoW-VJX9eEIwTy_7IRu9WIzn-qAbM5XYp92dQbq7l6wskTm_WaPubVCtCJA2reASP6yo8EFycW4j8SFjzftoceG6qeuAhb6Q%3D%3D)**** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs.No matter what you’re able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. This Christmas season my boys, and I are terrified that this might be our last one as a family. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- **[**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46f49c500c5f411e8e401e553c0d9886&_e=yvQs5ToTOouPQ8_zVU4XeAcSZAAUfdTy5jLMRqVgLbTybAaRUfbRydJGizWzAhBHni0-boJhCrNSRKbq0i4uKyFGaJzPsHhy2f6uhu40yEJZ7yO7iOu2bLCuwOCzupzpwR2PiiszlhDvzlGfRkHTRxKdKBoh1_KViVJsib_90MOMbfo_fBllI1mPg5dXarQDCtxgfONlHyll9A2Gy_JoAOP45gORMXxsCOMwyCOfQ8ce7xZSFxRn9iOehjrCno3X6rWE8UA354Ee7N7W7-zTz36GCpLM8bwDA-ro6D7Ysju7uK2EJXtIGXwXe77ImwkNfb_kApIEyn5aKf74o-FzaLqYqkTm7uS2sx4iXeahl6FXRXv4UrV49HHw--d0aSgsgeHsWCEcJEpEBtiKFOilcA%3D%3D)** P.P.S. Brad's trial starts in February, so we're quickly running out of time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46f49c500c5f411e8e401e553c0d9886&_e=yvQs5ToTOouPQ8_zVU4XeIaf4dxUr5uK8aNe7UWZaoqkCrl1OXPDhTmhHKLBX-pCalOinPcHKpKKp2MQyQiKHf_JWM36V6HHMD85PpdfJ68dod8aHqgUsNafpy4BYOtYJsjNKFk7LjcCAomSe7Vzk6w25U_pImHTjby_E7myH1ChELUO6v80uYgGsiMbv5ungsuYBiK6pLqMzT8X84qz556INqH_BD3m8hF8DQfnV4k0tKUX_NO4nqqIu-vIy4RNonafmD2sHio1WB1uhv19fsL3QXqBVOhob3li1MkJJ70XPV6kVz35wc3TmSSwIPACJZZ6k3tLCV_vU8E5kfXJs030N5gzFrT2mrna406gxJxbNX-eZmu8vXewcVqtzokODt_xfVO_v3FZJdg29ZDTEkTUnvPgCc0Q2kIhsQyoEX3eq8kiBQd4FBl2fHsAcZwI4SGSCrC1eBDXXnH-LeAsEweZsOGkU32RboAxAooYdN9ej1yAA6UnRa7rFxff-LZ1MYL525jSVTx6JQoJIv9iuY-hNagOU-vp9BBHOa1pxDiThv71GfPcmSo59QBLHAM8fRKLXbikRL4xP9b0p1HOuLSoy0LWzgmXXp1CvhrEGAF-xo-WgKu-IyOXv6rr7oeNZ0hbsRdVubBngZgQnGb-yLc9Gx7Eu0Hfubvdo3qPJUAmZ_-34lhInOyZWjkmmEbgIBHGpjfi18WtdaWwZu-pNefouRp9pA6ezGMw2Fn3_J8m656byomxzE96dNs41HEJ5lYjg90YgkQbauy5TtkDA-VdnfyEGVI1NCvDUfw9NMpgkl6etFJwntXILAsBr0Hfa2KRfw2P5SkYXS82-x-RZEP8HtwHMlRJFsfOGgasrEF9IABbH_OEo4bI4YKLeHl6P2tHm_WFRF5cxpIxZzY5umMuxTXumXmHAurSPFyjwlbJlSo6KyBAhQnMgNAxnH-DN8WZ78HnWC9msC2aIwHhNB20Kasb-rBz8QOe5FJrsWhsUc7KhewXE5Uw3BsglhllPnVTajowDoYtVi_mPaEuGg%3D%3D)

body:
Did you see this message from George?

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=5v8stwRfrKbfhYXh13k6I36PkhD3ejOP1s16%2FDFfPdZduo6k%2FOV2gXKUj%2BeT1d1Oz5XDFRCgANzA8xp633325Zokw42T60ua%2FXF%2B2TU2Y7ANjZQKjDPlisxp1jfVj0KqiKTU2TQOcpNUe06Yta01LPV0FMdb2s6R0Ukax6e1F%2F3bvQeTQf25vlOMLMe5Q5J8E0G2Gm3%2F%2BIQVoAgU6r41TefwzR2z6DGQu2OVjL8MhvXgVUoSQWokvX6rM7NGoIOrcYD4vylod8lRpFOGVnWj06I55peh0e0qgynsluBkdBBSaYV99kdTpdjUZJ%2BccGDcIAj4A9%2BbARFLEf3wiR%2Bm%2FIx4KZg345NlxRz59LSkvMS0sMPQY54jjz9JdutrSYRCFUm6IIb85S4hhm2IpLvxUOcCnMr%2FBMmx9YSbJ1KGu%2FO%2Bv2lLRgPoZ3RAa%2BAp8uOT)

While we can’t say for sure what lies ahead under a Republican trifecta, one thing is certain: NM-02 will be the frontline as we work to rebuild our Democratic coalition in the years to come.
For the first time in over 40 years, we held this district blue for two consecutive terms. We know what it takes to build a grassroots movement and defeat MAGA extremism here in NM-02.
I’m ready to take that fight back to Congress for another two years, but I need every single member of Team Vasquez standing with me — more than ever before.

_Begin Forwarded Message from Valerie Foushee:_ Peter, One of the core tenets of our American democracy is the peaceful transfer of power after an election, even if the outcome is not what we wanted. What Republicans are doing in North Carolina this week is in direct opposition to that. Democracy is not ripping away power from incoming elected officials so that you can push through your own agenda. It isn’t trying to rig the system in your favor. **And it certainly isn’t sneaking those things into legislation that was designed to help people who are still suffering in the aftermath of a natural disaster.** North Carolinians deserve better, Peter. I’m honored to continue working in Congress for the future of our state, but I need your help in this fight for progress. Since day one, my work in Congress has been guided by the principles I grew up on. I’ll never lose sight of what it means to look out for your neighbors and ensure everyone has a seat at the table. In a district as diverse as NC-04, it takes a whole lot of perseverance to usher in progress that accounts for everyone.
But that’s exactly what keeps me going in this work. I’m fueled by my commitment to building a better future for our children, and a better life for our communities. **I’m here to fight for you — not to rig the system to keep myself in power.**

clean_body: Did you see this message from Valerie? If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, it’s the Team at Foushee HQ checking in. Here’s the deal: our mid-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and we’ve set a goal of $5,000 that we can’t reach without your help. We’re forwarding yesterday’s email from Valerie about what keeps her in this fight, and why having you by her side is crucial in a time like this. = Begin Forwarded Message from Valerie Foushee: Peter, One of the core tenets of our American democracy is the peaceful transfer of power after an election, even if the outcome is not what we wanted. What Republicans are doing in North Carolina this week is in direct opposition to that. Democracy is not ripping away power from incoming elected officials so that you can push through your own agenda. It isn’t trying to rig the system in your favor. And it certainly isn’t sneaking those things into legislation that was designed to help people who are still suffering in the aftermath of a natural disaster. North Carolinians deserve better, Peter. I’m honored to continue working in Congress for the future of our state, but I need your help in this fight for progress. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Since day one, my work in Congress has been guided by the principles I grew up on. I’ll never lose sight of what it means to look out for your neighbors and ensure everyone has a seat at the table. In a district as diverse as NC-04, it takes a whole lot of perseverance to usher in progress that accounts for everyone. But that’s exactly what keeps me going in this work. I’m fueled by my commitment to building a better future for our children, and a better life for our communities. I’m here to fight for you — not to rig the system to keep myself in power.** = = Thank you, Valerie Foushee | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, You can also =.

subject: Pete Hegseth, RFK Jr., and Kash Patel

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Folks —

As Donald Trump prepares to become the next president of the United States, he is nominating his most loyal supporters to serve in crucial positions of power.

Trump’s cabinet picks include none other than:

* QAnon supporter and Trump loyalist Kash Patel to lead the FBI
* Anti-vaxxer conspiracy theorist Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to lead the Department of Health and Human Services
* And Fox News host Pete Hegseth — who believes women should not serve in combat roles — as our next Defense Secretary

These picks aren’t just outlandish. They are downright dangerous.

While Trump packs his cabinet with far-right extremists and conspiracy theorists, it has never been more important that we have service-oriented leaders like Jason in Congress to hold them accountable.

Please rush a contribution of any amount before tomorrow night’s mid-month fundraising deadline to support Jason’s work in Congress: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2024]

# [The Joy of a Child, the Close of a Campaign - and, Death and Destruction in Four Acts](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=152962218&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTYyMjE4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQyMTIyODMsImV4cCI6MTczNjgwNDI4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bc8k4FuPwkq7idv0MdYdWCAWPoySstnawL7Mdukf6xY)

Dear friends - it's been longer than I'd like away from the keyboard - but life has been blessedly full of infant snuggles. Our son arrived on the morning of December 1st, and has been delighting us all ever since.
His name is Adil - which means "Justice." (And his big sister's name means Peace.) Carrying him during my Congressional campaign brought poignancy to our work for a better future, and as I settle in to mothering him, it's with memories of the work we've shared fresh and strong in my heart.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a5acf4ec-ec24-40cf-a9c9-346455dacdff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

* * *
Next, a HUGE thank-you to everyone who wrote to the King County Council and the 33rd Legislative District supporting my candidacy for the vacant seat in the Washington State Legislature. I **was** selected as a finalist for the vacant Senate seat and was interviewed by the Council this past Tuesday.
Ultimately, they selected the senior House Representative, Tina Orwall - a wonderfully competent, dedicated, and kind public servant, who will do beautifully in that role. Many council members specifically recognized my candidacy as a reflection of the strength and beauty of our diverse communities--and that is a victory we can all celebrate.
Your willingness to speak up for what--and who--matters in politics inspires me deeply. This is not the end of our journey; it's a strong foundation for what comes next.
> "The bold, visionary and very human perspective you bring to the mainstream political arena truly inspires me. It was a joy to canvas for your candidacy."
> \- Ruby
* * *
In the wider world...what a time it's been. Diving right in...
Luigi Mangione is credibly accused of killing the CEO of United Healthcare - a for-profit health insurance company with a higher-than-usual ratio of rejected claims. Its CEO, Brian Thompson, made [over $23,000,000 in 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/efe2bffa-ad86-4a3d-9789-a7e1166aad8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) even as the company he was responsible for leading contributed to the needless deaths of [over 68,000 Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/f0540b68-9e8e-458b-83a4-db6fde090daf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Lancet) per year, and puts families through devastatingly tortuous and expensive ordeals in the name of profit.
To borrow a line, "**The problem in America is that when you murder someone with paperwork, it doesn 't count.**"
I believe that looking back, we will see this as a watershed moment. I don't know what flavor of revolution America will undergo, but under the current circumstances - with [wealth inequality](https://substack.com/@sustainablyspeaking/note/c-79279007/) higher than it was before the French Revolution, with basic necessities like healthcare, childcare, and housing [out of reach](https://substack.com/redirect/606880f0-792b-47bc-ab10-2017ddbcc5e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for shocking numbers of families, I'm certain we'll see _some_ form of revolution emerging, and soon.
The broad-based support for Mangione, including many people seeking to [contribute to his legal fees](https://substack.com/redirect/0e03ecd9-4a02-43b9-b71f-6cdfd5550ed8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and articles helpfully circulating online about the [power of juries to nullify the law](https://substack.com/redirect/61f7c2ed-6a4e-42e6-a6cb-03a5d8c7c4f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and return the verdict they believe is morally right, speaks to the end of American patience with a profit-driven "healthcare" system that holds their sick loved ones hostage for money:
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid
[When Insurance Rejects Life Saving Care](https://substack.com/redirect/72902082-4ff2-429b-8f22-eed003254860?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This article is a deeply personal and vulnerable piece about our daughter Hannah Noor. It is primarily written by my wife Ayesha Noor. We are sharing this not because our daughter's story is special, but sadly, because her story is all too common. Every year thousands of children and adults suffer incomprehensible pain, suffering, and even death. They suffer not b...
[Read more](https://substack.com/redirect/72902082-4ff2-429b-8f22-eed003254860?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
6 days ago * 646 likes * 165 comments * Qasim Rashid, Esq. and Ayesha Noor
If you're interested, Mangione did provide a statement, which the mainstream media has refused to publish except as selected and heavily-inflected quotes. I don't hold with that kind of paternalism, which infantilizes the American people and demeans our intelligence by withholding information deliberately. Like the Founders of this country, I believe a well-informed public is essential to hold power to account. So, thanks to [Ken Klippenstein](https://substack.com/redirect/dac8c066-8215-4f66-880f-1becc7c45ce1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), here is Mangione's manifesto [in full](https://substack.com/redirect/50a69586-8ce1-4a47-bf04-409ce3a18f3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
You might also be interested in his [reading list](https://substack.com/redirect/d46a3ddf-c5e2-48c0-92b9-9659ddddf267?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), published by The Intercept. We have reached a point in American history where the following words - quoted from one of Mangione's book reviews - are being published in a substantial news outlet:
> "Peaceful protest is outright ignored, economic protest isn't possible in the current system, so how long until we recognize that violence against those who lead us to such destruction is justified as self-defense."
What a fascinating time to be alive.

* * *
Abroad, we've witnessed the shockingly rapid fall of the Syrian government to rebels organized as Hayat Tahrir Al-Sham (HTS), a rebranded branch of Al Qaeda and a US-designated terrorist organization. I spoke with a number of members of the Syrian diaspora over the course of the campaign, and each of them hammered home to me the point that it is necessary to both:
1. Acknowledge the violence and repression of Assad's regime, which devastated civil society and freedom of speech under threat of disappearance, torture, and death; and -

2. Support the right of the Syrian people to self-determination - eg, to stand against any foreign interference in the course of their governance (most particularly, against American and Israeli interference?, those two countries being the biggest sources of disruption in the Middle East).

So that's what I'm doing.
It's likely that the USA applied substantial pressure to ensure the success of this offensive, and Americans are on the record discussing the shocking amount of money allocated to supporting Islamist Syrian rebels since 2011 - rebels who now claim they "love Israel." If you're interested in a deep dive, take a look [here](https://substack.com/redirect/d3965773-13ed-46a1-a885-d52b283ce788?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> _How is it that the media spent two decades decrying the evils of Al Qaeda rule in Afghanistan, and is now apparently overjoyed that Al Qaeda has taken over Syria?_
Certainly, there are Syrians acting in their own interests and with their own agency in undertaking this takeover; and, is it possible their success was supported by the most powerful military force on the planet?
Could there be, at the root of this, a grand bargain between the Arab states and the US/Israel alliance? Savage Minds goes in depth on the possible nature of that bargain, and its devastating consequences for the Palestinians and for religious diversity across the region, in this piece:
Savage Minds
[The End of Pluralism in the Middle East](https://substack.com/redirect/4aca18f8-e996-4316-be1a-71863ed92a1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A truly seismic change in the Middle East appears ...
[Read more](https://substack.com/redirect/4aca18f8-e996-4316-be1a-71863ed92a1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
7 days ago * 117 likes * Craig Murray
American principles demand we uphold the values of democracy, self-determination, and pluralism - including religious liberty - wherever our influence extends. Why, then, is the American government apparently investing heavily in the _end_ of religious pluralism in Syria, and in shaping the direction of that country's government regardless of the will of the people?
The more of us ask these questions, the better chance we have of pulling our government back to the shared moral foundation of America and away from inflicting death and destruction on millions of people for the profit of a few.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=152962218&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTYyMjE4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQyMTIyODMsImV4cCI6MTczNjgwNDI4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bc8k4FuPwkq7idv0MdYdWCAWPoySstnawL7Mdukf6xY)
* * *
Speaking of death and destruction...
I don't generally follow Candace Owens, but this was a thoughtful and sincere interview and an astonishing story with substantial implications for American foreign policy and how we understand our history.
Her guest is a survivor of the [USS Liberty](https://substack.com/redirect/04bf7b93-ea4f-411a-a001-e06584a8d3bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the American Navy ship which was attacked - and then abandoned - in the Mediterranean in 1967. As of this writing, this video has received over 3 million views in two days, and I believe it's likely to shape public understanding of this issue for many years to come.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/22e21783-25fd-4fe7-b5df-9dbeca54becb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
My father is a Navy veteran, and to my eyes Candace's interviewee exemplifies the best of our military tradition - heartfelt dedication to service, solidarity and brotherhood, patriotism aligned with principle, honest obedience, and courage under fire. I find it difficult, if not impossible, to doubt his truthfulness or discredit his story.
I leave it to your judgment.

* * *
Speaking of death and destruction, again...
A homeless, mentally ill Black man was [murdered in broad daylight](https://open.substack.com/pub/frederickjoseph/p/how-dare-you-america?r=3zafez&utm_medium=ios) by white Americans on the subway in New York. Strangled to death for no other crime than verbally sharing his distress. He was hungry and thirsty and cold and lonely, and he let people know. He wasn't hurting anyone.
His murder - and the shocking indifference it drew from others seated _in the same subway car_ , who utterly ignored it - indicts, once again, our country's violent white supremacy, and its ongoing, daily, life-and-death consequences for innocent people struggling to get by.
Occasionally, on the campaign trail, I had (white) people tell me that I shouldn't refer to "white-led authoritarianism" as a characteristic of the American future we want to avoid - that it was "divisive." Yet the dynamic I was referring to is [very real](https://substack.com/redirect/255a8316-5338-4050-8f34-14819c9f9280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and any truth-based relationship with reality requires we acknowledge it.
Are all white people racist?
**No**.
Do all white people in America benefit from a racist history, institutional (legal) structure, and culture in this country?
**Yes**.
Are all of us white folks aware of that fact?
**No, but we should be**.
Once we are aware of it, we have a decision to make. Are we going to turn a blind eye, continue to collect our unearned benefits at others' expense, and allow the violence to continue? Or are we going to speak out against it, and _for_ a world of genuine liberty and justice - not to mention equality, peace, and therefore prosperity - **for** _**all**_?
**We, as individual people - by and large - have not inflicted this violence. But we benefit from it.**
And what we do with that legacy of destruction that benefits ourselves - those blood-soaked treasures... \- is the true test of our maturity and morality, and our opportunity to grow into genuinely responsible humanity.

It's likely that the USA applied substantial pressure to ensure the success of this offensive, and Americans are on the record discussing the shocking amount of money allocated to supporting Islamist Syrian rebels since 2011 - rebels who now claim they "love Israel." If you're interested in a deep dive, take a look . How is it that the media spent two decades decrying the evils of Al Qaeda rule in Afghanistan, and is now apparently overjoyed that Al Qaeda has taken over Syria? Certainly, there are Syrians acting in their own interests and with their own agency in undertaking this takeover; and, is it possible their success was supported by the most powerful military force on the planet? Could there be, at the root of this, a grand bargain between the Arab states and the US/Israel alliance? Savage Minds goes in depth on the possible nature of that bargain, and its devastating consequences for the Palestinians and for religious diversity across the region, in this piece: Savage Minds A truly seismic change in the Middle East appears ... 7 days ago 117 likes Craig Murray American principles demand we uphold the values of democracy, self-determination, and pluralism - including religious liberty - wherever our influence extends. Why, then, is the American government apparently investing heavily in the end of religious pluralism in Syria, and in shaping the direction of that country's government regardless of the will of the people? The more of us ask these questions, the better chance we have of pulling our government back to the shared moral foundation of America and away from inflicting death and destruction on millions of people for the profit of a few. Speaking of death and destruction... I don't generally follow Candace Owens, but this was a thoughtful and sincere interview and an astonishing story with substantial implications for American foreign policy and how we understand our history. Her guest is a survivor of the , the American Navy ship which was attacked - and then abandoned - in the Mediterranean in 1967. As of this writing, this video has received over 3 million views in two days, and I believe it's likely to shape public understanding of this issue for many years to come. My father is a Navy veteran, and to my eyes Candace's interviewee exemplifies the best of our military tradition - heartfelt dedication to service, solidarity and brotherhood, patriotism aligned with principle, honest obedience, and courage under fire. I find it difficult, if not impossible, to doubt his truthfulness or discredit his story. I leave it to your judgment. ? Speaking of death and destruction, again... A homeless, mentally ill Black man was by white Americans on the subway in New York. Strangled to death for no other crime than verbally sharing his distress. He was hungry and thirsty and cold and lonely, and he let people know. He wasn't hurting anyone. His murder - and the shocking indifference it drew from others seated in the same subway car , who utterly ignored it - indicts, once again, our country's violent white supremacy, and its ongoing, daily, life-and-death consequences for innocent people struggling to get by. Occasionally, on the campaign trail, I had (white) people tell me that I shouldn't refer to "white-led authoritarianism" as a characteristic of the American future we want to avoid - that it was "divisive." Yet the dynamic I was referring to is , and any truth-based relationship with reality requires we acknowledge it. Are all white people racist? No. Do all white people in America benefit from a racist history, institutional (legal) structure, and culture in this country? Yes. Are all of us white folks aware of that fact? No, but we should be. Once we are aware of it, we have a decision to make. Are we going to turn a blind eye, continue to collect our unearned benefits at others' expense, and allow the violence to continue? Or are we going to speak out against it, and for a world of genuine liberty and justice - not to mention equality, peace, and therefore prosperity - for all? We, as individual people - by and large - have not inflicted this violence. But we benefit from it. And what we do with that legacy of destruction that benefits ourselves - those blood-soaked treasures... \- is the true test of our maturity and morality, and our opportunity to grow into genuinely responsible humanity. * "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. To support the mission and access the full experience, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Melissa Chaudhry 6727 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Suite M, #1117 Seattle, WA 98118 ? ?

Peter,
Our 2024 post-election survey report is complete. Please see a summary of the results below:
**2024 POST-ELECTION SURVEY**
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
* * *
_**Donald Trump’s Most Troubling Proposals**_
1\. Defining the U.S. Supreme Court for decades by appointing even more ultraconservative justices
2\. Rolling back clean energy solutions and crucial environmental regulations
3\. Dismantling key federal agencies like the Department of Education
_**Top Priorities for the Democratic Party**_
1\. Protecting Social Security and Medicare
2\. Protecting affordable health care
3\. Blocking tax cuts that would help the wealthy get wealthier at the expense of working families
_**Strategies and Tactics to Adopt**_
1\. Increasing voter protection and registration efforts
2\. Engaging with young and new voters to share resources ahead of Election Day
3\. Focusing on messaging that connects with undecided voters
**General Takeaways:** Those surveyed want us to vigorously defend our democracy and shared values while reaching more voters of all ages with a compelling message of how politics impacts their daily lives.
Peter, as we face the reality of a second Trump administration, the feedback we received underscores the urgency of this moment.
Heading into 2025, it’s clear we must sharpen our messaging, connect with more young and undecided voters, clearly define our values, and focus on critical issues like the economy, public safety, and healthcare.
We have a great deal of work ahead of us. But if we stand united, we can hold the Trump administration accountable and protect our rights, freedoms, and critical public programs for generations to come.

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Cool as a cucumber
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBu/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBu/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
I’m as cool as a cucumber.
You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight _**one-on-one**_?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have _**[so much work to do.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBu/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President.
**I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork.**
Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBu/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBv/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBv/?__vbtrk=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1MzgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: A new birth of freedom
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps...

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=191703c1f93c4694b0942ec8a1b41f91&_t=fy900CpnGCAKzVfDDKltFlXeUi2i5Yj9zXh9W5xyZKhFSQxKmQag3csUxhFjR8-7mnrYcKsQBUwsPBAYBw8NKckVoHKd0Qi0cAP4xJ1Q4KT3noERgkXo0gIE-DqGgloy)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=191703c1f93c4694b0942ec8a1b41f91&_e=pCTZEweoOIrGEUb8_0OHwQnF6yAa1dejtxRDgdKyiWnscCRIeIbseqnDKxY0XnadeWcMjQOrOiczID3lP6xOu7tVR1ntUETlKBZOZZnIampCWB38gGBBcB9LACd5cZTDsumjY24N74k_eH1gesOpM-moKXWL0WTzwnH4_38o8Iaj7iHUTs6yrJfC_32aH4qMDX7KeRCqda2DHN_9iIjOQdJp6tepHxsySwFSSPQAkmAYZfECbTBwlIkxgceNqSXYQpJo_1WCzqf-MtdaOnOTzm9Qelr7QzF24qY4ptL1RjOor9Pke-Y_6NOffBU8-1Wr44dOjGSMS8a8gcTDJWl2PNWSl98IGu88GM0LnSOWE4xz_KSgxG-nqQXq9T2JlfRQ)
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=191703c1f93c4694b0942ec8a1b41f91&_e=pCTZEweoOIrGEUb8_0OHwQnF6yAa1dejtxRDgdKyiWnscCRIeIbseqnDKxY0XnadeWcMjQOrOiczID3lP6xOu7tVR1ntUETlKBZOZZnIampCWB38gGBBcB9LACd5cZTDsumjY24N74k_eH1gesOpM-moKXWL0WTzwnH4_38o8Iaj7iHUTs6yrJfC_32aH4qMDX7KeRCqda2DHN_9iIjOQdJp6tepHxsySwFSSPQAkmD4BJccuwOMrZKVL6Nx7B0mLXcvulMb1Ksd0_kkiuvxDfxPdsFdP-Kdvfq6kn0HK3z2XgBRrWYdVANgc7gYKh9mmKzQ3pMNR4t7jiSmcSd3hP_smsVmJxBsW5BUBR4F0L2EmlmC8ctJAy-PYKTFk0wK)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=191703c1f93c4694b0942ec8a1b41f91&_e=pCTZEweoOIrGEUb8_0OHwQnF6yAa1dejtxRDgdKyiWnscCRIeIbseqnDKxY0XnadeWcMjQOrOiczID3lP6xOu7tVR1ntUETlKBZOZZnIampCWB38gGBBcB9LACd5cZTDsumjY24N74k_eH1gesOpM-moKXWL0WTzwnH4_38o8Iaj7iHUTs6yrJfC_32aH4qMDX7KeRCqda2DHN_9iIjOQdJp6tepHxsySwFSSPQAkmATk1NS0IoXJOExDIykt3ub0lxoIzgjqLjmy0oiEffTxQ-zO7o_yl81CZF2m4iu37nIv0wUi_X1A3SV8hVeQ1ZmjxhChdQBhk0H0N1DXaPu4rpPEBlOQ0vOjsrRG-zqmERH96JcjMHEKQTHu2K3fOgE)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=191703c1f93c4694b0942ec8a1b41f91&_e=pCTZEweoOIrGEUb8_0OHwQnF6yAa1dejtxRDgdKyiWnscCRIeIbseqnDKxY0XnadeWcMjQOrOiczID3lP6xOu7tVR1ntUETlKBZOZZnIampCWB38gGBBcB9LACd5cZTDsumjY24N74k_eH1gesOpM-moKXWL0WTzwnH4_38o8Iaj7iHUTs6yrJfC_32aH4qMDX7KeRCqda2DHN_9iIjOQdJp6tepHxsySwFSSPQAkmBa4bKZS9PQ3KVAHjywdMN6JtWy8q-DMnfIwtJi9FYuJmIcgPe7o2J0m44Y3SLC0fnkciKF0d0Y0B5rEb9nyLQeupbkxXrijCl64YBab55oE9j0w86m72Naj7XwaeOgL0y-V_vuwePiuX0SiUk0tn4B)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=191703c1f93c4694b0942ec8a1b41f91&_t=fy900CpnGCAKzVfDDKltFlXeUi2i5Yj9zXh9W5xyZKhFSQxKmQag3csUxhFjR8-7mnrYcKsQBUwsPBAYBw8NKdPKLFLIQHgX0VrhcXpP0bVPXUU9I8OT8KIspaRgZe99YhFQJPUyAl195Wuv_uBcljqoz8C9HxTvjfGK4eAB8Tw%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=191703c1f93c4694b0942ec8a1b41f91&_t=fy900CpnGCAKzVfDDKltFlXeUi2i5Yj9zXh9W5xyZKhFSQxKmQag3csUxhFjR8-7mnrYcKsQBUwsPBAYBw8NKckVoHKd0Qi0cAP4xJ1Q4KT3noERgkXo0gIE-DqGgloy).

body:
Some 10,000 years ago, as humans shifted from hunter-gatherer societies to permanent settlements, the cultivation and modification of crops began.

# [5 Ways Fruits and Vegetables Evolved Over Time](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soi806&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soi806&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soi806&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| S ome 10,000 years ago, as humans shifted from hunter-gatherer societies to permanent settlements, the cultivation and modification of crops began. Plants were crossbred to enhance their best traits, and this process gradually improved the taste, size, and yield of their fruit. Today, our modern produce tells the story of the coevolution between humans and the plants we eat.

name: Mark Kelly Headquarters
subject: [Response Requested] Our Official 2025 Issue Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends, like many of you, we’ve been taking some time to rest since Election Day.
But we’ve also spent a lot of time in conversation and preparation. Mark and our team have been meeting with allies and stakeholders in Arizona and around the country to chart a course for this campaign and our work in 2025 and beyond.
**We wanted to ensure that you had a voice in those conversations, too.[So, if you have a few minutes to spare, would you take part in Mark Kelly’s Official 2025 Issue Survey?](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-dec24-issue-survey_em?source=em241214-1-120&refcode2=5933.6688874.kSzDAF&akid=5933%2E6688874%2EkSzDAF)**
**[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-dec24-issue-survey_em?source=em241214-1-120&refcode2=5933.6688874.kSzDAF&akid=5933%2E6688874%2EkSzDAF)**
It’s not lost on any of us that the most essential part of this campaign is our supporters — you, and folks like you. It’s thanks to you that we were able to hold the line in Arizona this year, and that Mark was able to support good candidates in tough races from coast-to-coast.
And now, we’re asking you for your help again. But it’s not a donation we’re asking for today, or for you to join a phonebank, or attend an event. It’s your perspective and input that we need now.
**If you’re up for it, we’re hoping you could let us know what issues and priorities are most important to you as we close out 2024 and ready ourselves for the second Trump administration.**
**[Use this link and fill out Mark Kelly’s Official 2025 Issue Survey.](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-dec24-issue-survey_em?source=em241214-1-120&refcode2=5933.6688874.kSzDAF&akid=5933%2E6688874%2EkSzDAF)**
**[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-dec24-issue-survey_em?source=em241214-1-120&refcode2=5933.6688874.kSzDAF&akid=5933%2E6688874%2EkSzDAF)**
Thank you for your input,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5933%2E6688874%2EkSzDAF).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Mark and our team have been meeting with allies and stakeholders in Arizona and around the country to chart a course for this campaign and our work in 2025 and beyond. We wanted to ensure that you had a voice in those conversations, too. It’s not lost on any of us that the most essential part of this campaign is our supporters — you, and folks like you. It’s thanks to you that we were able to hold the line in Arizona this year, and that Mark was able to support good candidates in tough races from coast-to-coast. And now, we’re asking you for your help again. But it’s not a donation we’re asking for today, or for you to join a phonebank, or attend an event. It’s your perspective and input that we need now. A Brave young man **[TOLD OFF](https://substack.com/redirect/163f6443-891d-4b2f-9bb0-eb9ba747c2a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson during a community meeting over illegal migrants flooding the city and causing rampant issues for residents.
"We don't want illegals in our community!!!" the man told the mayor. Johnson just had to sit there and take it.
**[Watch it right here:](https://substack.com/redirect/163f6443-891d-4b2f-9bb0-eb9ba747c2a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/163f6443-891d-4b2f-9bb0-eb9ba747c2a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The man continued to be brutally honest about the effects of migrants being housed in Chicago.
"We don't want migrants terrorizing our own people!" he said. "And to have y'all up here saying we have to accept $70 million being given to them when we have black people who are struggling and need help, it's a disgrace!!"
He explained that Trump's electoral victory "represents something more than just him winning."
"This is the end of 'vote blue no matter who!'"
**[Watch the mayor's horrified reaction here:](https://substack.com/redirect/163f6443-891d-4b2f-9bb0-eb9ba747c2a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Team, Donald Trump has given Elon Musk the green light to SLASH government funding -- **and he's setting his sights on PBS.**

For decades, PBS has brought free, impartial, educational programming into homes across the country. From Mr. Rogers to Big Bird to The NewsHour and so much more, it's had an INCALCULABLE positive impact on our society. **But Trump wants cuts that would start closing down PBS stations!**

**We CAN'T just stand by as Trump and Musk take direct aim at PBS,** so we've launched an urgent Live Petition to PROVE Democrats support funding this all-American institution. We need 5,000 more signatures by midnight -- **please, don't delay:**

| | Dear Peter, **President Trump was elected to change this town.** And now, he's nominating the leaders we need to _**DRAIN THE SWAMP**_ and save America: **Pete Hegseth:** A proven warrior ready to END wokeism in the military. **Tulsi Gabbard:** A former Democrat standing strong against endless wars. **Kash Patel:** The fighter we need to CLEAN HOUSE at the FBI. These are the disruptors who will hold the powerful accountable and restore America's greatness. But here's the problem: **RINOs are blocking Trump 's appointees.**
